instructions: Σε βαθιά κατσαρόλα ζεσταίνουμε το ελαιόλαδο .
Σε χαμηλή φωτιά μαραίνουμε το κρεμμύδι για 5 λεπτά, προσθέτουμε το σκόρδο και αφήνουμε για 2 λεπτά.
Προσθέτουμε όλα τα ψιλοκομμένα λαχανικά και σοτάρουμε για 5-6 λεπτά.
Προσθέτουμε το ξίδι και τη ζάχαρη.
Προσθέτουμε αλάτι και πιπέρι και σιγοβράζουμε για 10 λεπτά.
Προς το τέλος του βρασμού προσθέτουμε τα μυρωδικά.

name: Fasting Pastry
instructions: Κόβουμε όλα τα λαχανικά σε καρέ και τα βάζουμε σε ταψί.
Προσθέτουμε αλάτι και πιπέρι και περιχύνουμε με λίγο ελαιόλαδο.
Τα ψήνουμε στους 200°C, για περίπου 15 λεπτά, μέχρι να μαλακώσουν.

name: Fasting Pizza
instructions: Σε ένα μπολ ρίχνουμε όλα τα υλικά και ζυμώνουμε μέχρι να γινει εύπλαστη.
Σκεπάζουμε με νωπή πετσέτα ή μεμβράνη και την αφήνουμε να διπλασιαστεί σε όγκο για περίπου μία ώρα σε ζεστό μέρος ή για δύο ώρες σε θερμοκρασία δωματίου.
Αφού ανέβει η ζύμη , τη χωρίζουμε σε δύο κομμάτια.
Τη σκεπάζουμε ξανά και τα αφήνουμε για 30 λεπτά να φουσκώσουν πάλι.
Φτιάχνουμε δύο κομματια με διάμετρο 30-35 εκ. η κάθε μία.
Ανοίγουμε το κάθε κομμάτι ζ, είτε με τις άκρες των δαχτύλων πιέζοντας με κυκλικές κινήσεις σε αλευρωμένη επιφάνεια, είτε με πλάστη να θέλουμε να γίνει πιο λεπτή και πιο τραγανή.
Το βάζουμε πάνω σε ξύλο κοπής πασπαλισμένο με καλαμποκάλευρο .
Πασπαλίζοντας την πετυχαίνουμε πιο τραγανή κρούστα στο κάτω μέρος της.
Προθερμαίνουμε το φούρνο στους 220°C βαθμούς στις αντιστάσεις και κάτω κάτω στο φούρνο τοποθετούμε ταψί από την ανάποδη και το αφήνουμε να κάψει καλά.
Η επιφάνεια του πυρωμένου ταψιού θα την ψήσει  γρηγορότερα και θα της δώσει πιο τραγανή υφή.

name: Fasting Potato Pie With Rustic Phyllo

ingredients.item: 5μέτριες πατάτες βρασμένες με τη φλούδα τους
5μέτριες πατάτες βρασμένες με τη φλούδα τους

instructions: Καθαρίζουμε τις πατάτες, τις κόβουμε σε μεγάλα καρέ και τις βράζουμε σε αλατισμένο νερό για 15-20 λεπτά, να μαλακώσουν.
Τις στραγγίζουμε καλά σε σουρωτήρι και στη συνέχεια τις μεταφέρουμε σε ένα μπολ και τις λιώνουμε με το πιρούνι.
Ρίχνουμε σε καυτό αντικολλητικό σκεύος 1 κ.σ. ελαιόλαδο και σοτάρουμε το σκόρδο και τα μανιτάρια για 3 λεπτά σε δυνατή φωτιά, να πιούν όλα τα υγρά τους και να στεγνώσουν τελείως.
Ρίχνουμε τα στεγνά μανιτάρια στις πατάτες.
Στο ίδιο τηγάνι ζεσταίνουμε το υπόλοιπο ελαιόλαδο και σοτάρουμε το ξερό κρεμμύδι, το πράσο και την πιπεριά για 4-5 λεπτά.
Προσθέτουμε τις λιωμένες πατάτες με τα μανιτάρια και τα φρέσκα κρεμμυδάκια και ανακατεύουμε.
Αποσύρουμε το σκεύος από την εστία και πασπαλίζουμε με αλάτι, πιπέρι και τα μυρωδικά. Αφήνουμε τη γέμιση να κρυώσει.
Λαδώνουνε ελαφρά ένα φύλλο κρούστας, το διπλώνουμε στη μέση και το στρώνουμε σε μικρό λαδωμένο ταψί 20×30 εκ.
Στρώνουμε κατά τον ίδιο τρόπο άλλα δύο διπλωμένα φύλλα. Απλώνουμε ομοιόμορφα από πάνω τη γέμιση.
Καλύπτουμε την πατατόπιτα με τρία διπλωμένα και λαδωμένα φύλλα.
Ραντίζουμε με το υπόλοιπο ελαιόλαδο και λίγες σταγόνες νερό.
Χαράζουμε σε κομμάτια και ψήνουμε την πίτα στη μεσαία σχάρα καλά προθερμασμένου φούρνου, στους 170°C, στον αέρα, για 50 λεπτά, μέχρι να ροδίσει ομοιόμορφα.

name: Fasting Potato Salad

ingredients.item: 1 kgbaby πατάτες ολόκληρες (με τη φλούδα τους)
2φρέσκα κρεμμυδάκια με τα πράσινα φύλλα τους ψιλοκομμένα
2πιπεριές φλωρίνης (έτοιμες καλά στραγγισμένες κομμένες σε λεπτές λωρίδες)
1 kgbaby πατάτες ολόκληρες (με τη φλούδα τους)
2φρέσκα κρεμμυδάκια με τα πράσινα φύλλα τους ψιλοκομμένα
2πιπεριές φλωρίνης (έτοιμες καλά στραγγισμένες κομμένες σε λεπτές λωρίδες)

instructions: Πλένουμε πολύ καλά τις πατάτες και τρίβουμε τη φλούδα τους.
Τις κόβουμε σε φέτες πάχους περίπου 2 εκ.
Βράζουμε αλατισμένο νερό, ρίχνουμε τις πατάτες και τις αφήνουμε 8–10 λεπτά μέχρι να μαλακώσουν.
Σε ένα μπολ βάζουμε αλάτι, πιπέρι, ξύδι και λεμόνι και ανακατεύουμε καλά.
Προσθέτουμε τη μουστάρδα.
Ρίχνουμε σιγά-σιγά το ελαιόλαδο, χτυπώντας με σύρμα, μέχρι η σως να πυκνώσει.
Προσθέτουμε τα κρεμμυδάκια, τον άνηθο και το μαϊντανό και ανακατεύουμε καλά.
Όταν οι πατάτες μαλακώσουν, τις στραγγίζουμε σε σουρωτήρι με προσοχή να μην λιώσουν.
Τις αραδιάζουμε σε ταψί απλωτά και τις περιχύνουμε με τη σως. Τις αφήνουμε να κρυώσουν χωρίς να ανακατευτούν, για να μη λιώσουν.
Αφού κρυώσουν, τις μεταφέρουμε σε σαλατιέρα και γαρνίρουμε με πιπεριές Φλωρίνης.
Οι πατάτες όσο είναι ζεστές ρουφούν τη σως μέχρι μέσα.
Όταν κρυώσουν εντελώς, ανακατεύουμε με κουτάλι και σερβίρουμε.

name: Fasting Pudding With Strawberry Sauce

ingredients.item: Λίγες σταγόνες χυμό λεμονιού ή lime
Λίγες σταγόνες χυμό λεμονιού ή lime

instructions: Μπορούμε να χρησιμοποιήσουμε όποιο φυτικό γάλα θέλουμε, όπως γάλα αμυγδάλου, καρύδας, βρώμης κλπ.
Σε μια μικρή κατσαρόλα βάζουμε το ρευστό γάλα καρύδας.
Προσθέτουμε την ζάχαρη ή το γλυκαντικό επιλογής μας, το κορν φλάουρ, το ξύσμα και το ινδοκάρυδο.
Ανακατεύουμε τα υλικά έτσι ώστε να διαλυθεί τελείως το κορν φλάουρ πριν βάλουμε την κατσαρόλα στην φωτιά.
Βάζουμε την κατσαρόλα σε μέτρια φωτιά και ανακατεύοντας περιμένουμε λίγα λεπτά να πήξει.
Μόλις πάρει βράση η πουτίγκα αποσύρουμε από την εστία.
Θα χρησιμοποιήσουμε μικρό πυρίμαχο σκεύος 20Χ30εκ.
Ραντίζουμε την βάση του ταψιού με λίγο ανθόνερο.
Αδειάζουμε το μίγμα στο ταψί κι αφήνουμε να έρθει σε θερμοκρασία δωματίου.
Το βάζουμε στο ψυγείο να παγώσει για 1 ώρα το λιγότερο και να σταθεροποιηθεί.
Σερβίρουμε την πουτίγκα δροσερή.

name: Fasting Rice Milk Without Sugar
instructions: Ξεπλένουμε πρώτα την κινόα σε σουρωτήρι κάτω από τρεχούμενο νερό.
Σε κατσαρόλα βάζουμε το γάλα, το νερό, τη στέβια, το αλάτι, τη μαστίχα και τη βανίλια και βάζουμε σε χαμηλή φωτιά να ζεσταθεί.
Προσθέσουμε την πλυμένη κινόα και χαμηλώνουμε κι άλλο τη φωτιά.
Σιγοβράζουμε ανακατεύοντας για 30′ σε πολύ χαμηλή φωτιά.
Δεν ξεχνάμε να ανακατεύουμε για να μην κολλήσει η κινόα.
Η σιγανή φωτιά είναι απαραίτητη για να μην εξατμίζονται τα υγρά.
Αν στεγνώσει το μίγμα στο βράσιμο, συμπληρώνουμε λίγο γάλα και λίγο νερό.
Η κινόα είναι ωραία όταν έχει υγρασία γύρω της και γίνεται αφράτη. Όταν στεγνώνει, σφίγγει το μίγμα.
Ισομοιράζουμε σε ποτήρια και αφήνουμε να κρυώσει.
Βάζουμε στο ψυγείο να γίνει δροσερή.
Γαρνίρουμε με φρεσκοκομμένα φρούτα σε διάφορα χρώματα και φιστίκι Αιγίνης.

name: Fasting Scalzounia

ingredients.item: 2 κ.σ.γεμάτες μαρμελάδα πορτοκάλι ή εσπεριδοειδών (εναλλακτικά βάλτε μέλι)
2 κ.σ.γεμάτες μαρμελάδα πορτοκάλι ή εσπεριδοειδών (εναλλακτικά βάλτε μέλι)

instructions: Για τα νηστίσιμα σκαλτσούνια με μαρμελάδα , βάζουμε στον κάδο του μίξερ ή σε ένα μπολ, τη ζάχαρη, το κρασί, το λάδι, τη σόδα, το αλάτι, το γαρύφαλλο και με σύρμα ανακατεύουμε να διαλυθεί η ζάχαρη.
Προσθέτουμε το αλεύρι, μέχρι να γίνει η ζύμη μαλακή, εύπλαστη και αρκετά λαδερή όπως η ζύμη για τα μελομακάρονα .
Παίρνουμε μικρά κομματάκια ζύμης όσο ένα μεγάλο καρύδι και πατάμε ανάμεσα στις παλάμες μας να γίνει πλακέ. Γεμίζουμε με λίγη γέμιση.
Κλείνουμε σε μισοφέγγαρο.
Τσιμπάμε τις άκρες να κολλήσουν καλά.
Αραδιάζουμε τα σκαλτσούνια σε δυο ταψιά.
Όταν τα ετοιμάσουμε όλα, ψήνουμε σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο στους 160-170 βαθμούς C στον αέρα, για περίπου 30′ να φουσκώσουν και να ροδίσουν.
Κατά την διάρκεια του ψησίματος ανεβοκατεβάζουμε τι λαμαρίνες ώστε να ψηθούν ομοιόμορφα.
Αφού ψηθούν, αφήνουμε λίγο να κρυώσουν και τα αχνίζουμε με μπόλικη άχνη .
Αφού κρυώσουν τελείως, τα διατηρούμε σε αεροστεγές σκεύος ώστε να διατηρηθούν τραγανά μέχρι το τελευταίο.

name: Fasting Shortbread With Chocolate
instructions: Για φανταστικά τσουρέκια νηστίσιμα με σοκολάτα ενεργοποιούμε πρώτα σωστά τη μαγιά .
Τη διαλύουμε σε μπολ, πασπαλίζουμε με την ζάχαρη και ρίχνουμε το νερό.
Ανακατεύουμε να διαλυθεί.
Σκεπάζουμε καλά με μεμβράνη και αφήνουμε να ενεργοποιηθεί η μαγιά, να κάνει φυσαλίδες στην επιφάνεια.

name: Fasting Skirts
instructions: Θα φτιάξουμε μια ζύμη και θα την χωρίσουμε σε δύο κομμάτια. Η μια θα παραμείνει λευκή, με γεύση πορτοκαλιού και η άλλη θα γίνει σοκολατένια, και θα λειτουργήσει σαν γέμιση για τα ροξάκια.
Βάζουμε όλα τα υλικά σ’ ένα μπολ, εκτός από το κακάο και τα 25 γραμ. αλεύρι που θα προστεθούν στο τέλος του ζυμώματος.
Ανακατεύουμε με μια κουτάλα μέχρι να μαζευτεί η ζύμη γύρω από το κουτάλι.
Με τα χέρια ζυμώνουμε την αφράτη και μαλακή εύπλαστη ζύμη και την χωρίζουμε σε 2 μπολ.

name: Fasting Spinach Pie

ingredients.item: 2πράσα μεγάλα (το τρυφερό μέρος μόνο, το υπόλοιπο το κρατάμε για ζωμούς)
1 ματσ.φρέσκα κρεμμυδάκια με τα φύλλα τους
2πράσα μεγάλα (το τρυφερό μέρος μόνο, το υπόλοιπο το κρατάμε για ζωμούς)
1 ματσ.φρέσκα κρεμμυδάκια με τα φύλλα τους

instructions: Βάζουμε σε τηγάνι 3 κ.σ. από το συνολικό ελαιόλαδο, με το ξερό κρεμμύδι και τα πράσα να μαραθούν για 15′, σε μέτρια φωτιά.
Αφήνουμε να κρυώσουν.
Πλένουμε και στραγγίζουμε όλα τα χόρτα, τα φρέσκα κρεμμύδια και τα μυρωδικά, σε σουρωτήρι.
Τα ψιλοκόβουμε σε ένα μεγάλο μπολ και τα πασπαλίζουμε με το αλάτι.
Τα ανακατεύουμε και τα αφήνουμε να σταθούν για 10΄, να βγάλουν τα υγρά τους.
Έπειτα, τα σφίγγουμε στις παλάμες μας, να μαραθούν και ν’ αποβάλουν όσο το δυνατόν περισσότερα υγρά, προκειμένου να μειωθεί  στο μισό.
Προσθέτουμε το τριμμένο πιπέρι και το σιμιγδάλι (ψιλό ή χοντρό, ό,τι έχετε).
Τα ανακατεύουμε και ετοιμάζουμε το ταψί.

name: Fasting Sponge Cake
instructions: Προθερμαίνουμε το φούρνο όπου θα ψήσουμε το παντεσπάνι σοκολάτας χωρίς αυγά, στους 180°C βαθμούς.
Βουτυρώνουμε δύο στρογγυλές φόρμες δαχτυλίδι 22 εκ. ή δύο ταψάκια για παντεσπάνι.
Στρώνουμε τη λαδόκολλα.
Κοσκινίζουμε όλα τα στερεά υλικά σε ένα μπολ, αλεύρι, baking powder και κακάο.
Προσθέτουμε τη ζάχαρη, ανακατεύουμε, ρίχνουμε το γάλα με τη λιωμένη μαργαρίνη και ανακατεύουμε ξανά.
Τέλος, προσθέτουμε την τρούφα, ανακατεύουμε απαλά και ισομοιράζουμε στις φόρμες.
Ψήνουμε για περίπου 35 λεπτά, μέχρι να σταθεροποιηθούν.
Αφήνουμε τα παντεσπάνια να κρυώσουν και μετά ξεφορμάρουμε.
Τα αφήνουμε σε σχάρα για να στεγνώσουν.
Κόβουμε οριζόντια σε δύο κομμάτια το κάθε ένα.

name: Fasting Stuffed Onions
instructions: Καθαρίζουμε τα μεγάλα κρεμμύδια και κόβουμε φέτες από τις άκρες. Τα χαράζουμε κάθετα μέχρι τη μέση.

Τα βάζουμε σε μια κατσαρόλα με νερό –να τα καλύπτει– και τα αφήνουμε στη φωτιά για περίπου 15 λεπτά από τη στιγμή που θα ξεκινήσει ο βρασμός, να μαλακώσουν. Τα βγάζουμε σε πιάτο και τα αφήνουμε να κρυώσουν.
Στο μεταξύ ετοιμάζουμε τη γέμιση. Πλένουμε το ρύζι και το αφήνουμε σε σουρωτήρι να στραγγίσει. Το περιχύνουμε με το χυμό του λεμονιού.
Ζεσταίνουμε ένα τηγάνι, προσθέτουμε το μισό ελαιόλαδο και σοτάρουμε το ξερό ψιλοκομμένο κρεμμύδι για 5-6 λεπτά, να μαλακώσει και να βγάλει τη γλύκα του.
Ρίχνουμε το φρέσκο κρεμμυδάκι, το ρύζι, τον πελτέ, τη σταφίδα, το κουκουνάρι και το καρύδι. Ανακατεύουμε να λαδωθούν καλά όλα τα υλικά και σοτάρουμε για 2 λεπτά ακόμα.
Συμπληρώνουμε 1½ φλιτζ. ζεστό νερό. Χαμηλώνουμε τελείως την εστία και σιγοβράζουμε το μείγμα για λίγα λεπτά να απορροφηθούν τα πολλά υγρά.
Αποσύρουμε τη ζουμερή γέμιση από τη φωτιά, προσθέτουμε το δυόσμο, το μαϊντανό, το κύμινο, το γαρίφαλο, το μπαχάρι, αλάτι και πιπέρι, ανακατεύουμε και την αφήνουμε να κρυώσει ελαφρά.
Αφαιρούμε ένα ένα τα φύλλα από τα μεγάλα λευκά κρεμμύδια.
Βάζουμε στο κέντρο τους από 1 κ.σ. γέμιση και τα τυλίγουμε σφιχτά.
Τα αραδιάζουμε στο ταψί στριμωχτά στο ένα στο άλλο και με την ένωση προς τα κάτω για να μην ανοίξουν.
Διαλύουμε τον πελτέ στο ζεστό νερό. Προσθέτουμε αλάτι, πιπέρι και τη ζάχαρη και ανακατεύουμε καλά.
Περιχύνουμε με τη σάλτσα τα υλικά στο ταψί.
Ραντίζουμε με το υπόλοιπο ελαιόλαδο και ψήνουμε το φαγητό σε προθερμασμένο φούρνο, στους 200°C, για περίπου 30 λεπτά.
Σβήνουμε το φούρνο και αφήνουμε τα γεμιστά κρεμμύδια μέσα για 15 λεπτά ακόμα, να τραβήξουν τα υγρά και να μείνουν με το λάδι τους.

name: Fasting Sugar-free Frosting By Argyros
original_name: Νηστίσιμο frosting χωρίς ζάχαρη της Αργυρώς

ingredients.item: 3 πολύ ώριμα και μαλακά αβοκάντο (κομμένα σε κομμάτια)
1/2 φλ. (περίπου) κρέμα καρύδας (παχύρρευστο γάλα καρύδας σε κονσέρβα)
3 πολύ ώριμα και μαλακά αβοκάντο (κομμένα σε κομμάτια)
1/2 φλ. (περίπου) κρέμα καρύδας (παχύρρευστο γάλα καρύδας σε κονσέρβα)

instructions: Βάζουμε όλα τα υλικά στο μπλέντερ και τα χτυπάμε μέχρι να γίνει ομοιόμορφο το μείγμα και να σχηματιστεί μια μους σαν βουτυρόκρεμα.
Βάζουμε το vegan frosting frosting χωρίς ζάχαρη σοκολάτας σε κορνέ ζαχαροπλαστικής και το παγώνουμε στο ψυγείο να σταθεροποιηθεί.
Γαρνίρουμε κέικ, cupcakes, τούρτες, μπισκότα και ό,τι άλλο μας αρέσει.
Όσο περισσέψει, απολαύστε το με το κουτάλι γιατί αυτή η super food συνταγή μας κάνει καλό!

name: Fasting Trunk

ingredients.item: 400 grχαλβάς του μπακάλη (κομμένος σε ακανόνιστα χοντρά κομμάτια)
400 grχαλβάς του μπακάλη (κομμένος σε ακανόνιστα χοντρά κομμάτια)

instructions: Λιώνουμε την ψιλοκομμένη κουβερτούρα σε μπεν μαρί σε χαμηλή φωτιά.
Αφού την λιώσουμε  την αφήνουμε λίγα λεπτά να γίνει χλιαρή.
Σε ένα μπολ, βάζουμε το ταχίνι ολικής.
Λίγη λίγη ρίχνουμε τη  κουβερτούρα και ανακατεύουμε με κυκλικές κινήσεις το μείγμα με μια μαλακή σπάτουλα, μέχρι να ομογενοποιηθεί.
Αφήνουμε να κρυώσει τελείως σε θερμοκρασία δωματίου.
Προσθέτουμε το χαλβά χοντροκομμένο καθώς και τα αμύγδαλα και ανακατεύουμε απαλά τα υλικά.
Δημιουργείται μια μάζα.
Το βάζουμε  σε μία μεμβράνη και ρολάρουμε δίνοντας το σχήμα του.
Βάζουμε στο ψυγείο να παγώσει και να σφίξει για περίπου 2 ώρες ώσπου να κόβεται.
Κόβουμε σε φέτες και σερβίρουμε.
Είναι ένα νόστιμο γλυκό ή υγιεινό σνακ που δίνει ενέργεια.

name: Fat Dumplings
instructions: 1. Mayayı suyun içinde eritin.
2.  Yumurta, zeytinyağı, yoğurt ve tuzu geniş bir kasede karıştırın.
3.  Mayalı suyu ekleyin.
4.  Unu azar azar ekleyip yoğurun.
5.  Gerekirse un ilave edin.
6.  Üzerini nemli bir bez ile örterek 40 dakika mayalanmaya bırakın.
7. Kıymaya, pul biber, tuz, karabiber ve kimyon ekleyip yoğurun.
8.  Hamuru unlanmış tezgahta açın ve 6-7 cm’lik kareler kesin.
9.  İçlerine kıyma harcından yerleştirin.
10.  Uçlarını birleştirip kapatın.
11. Mantıları kapatma yerleri altta kalacak şekilde kızgın yağda kızartın.
12.  Kağıt havlu üzerine alarak fazla yağını süzdürün.
13. Yoğurda sarımsak rendeleyip karıştırın.
14.  Tereyağını eritip salçayı 3 dakika kavurun.
15.  Mantıları servis tabağına alıp üzerine sarımsaklı yoğurt ve salçalı yağdan gezdirerek servis yapın.
16.  Afiyet olsun.
17. Yağ Mantısı Tarifinin Püf Noktaları Nelerdir?Mantı hamurunda ılık su kullanarak, mayanın çözülme süresini kısaltabilirsiniz.
18. Kıymalı harcı streç filme sarıp 30 dakika buzdolabında bekletin.
19.  Böylece lezzeti daha yoğun olacaktır.
20. Eğer kızartmak istemiyorsanız, mantı hamurunun üzerine tereyağı sürebilir, 180 dereceli fırında kızarana kadar pişirebilirsiniz.
21. Hazırladığınız yağ mantısını, pul biber, nane ve sumak ile zenginleştirmeyi unutmayın.
22. 1 Porsiyon Yağ Mantısı Kaç Kalori?Yağ mantısının 100 gramlık bir porsiyonu, yaklaşık 275 kalori değerindedir.

name: Fat Granny's Minestrone Soup

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste
Diced san marzano tomatoes with juice

instructions: Combine Italian seasoning, onion powder, garlic powder, celery seed, parsley, thyme, basil, oregano, salt, black pepper, and bay leaf in a small bowl.
Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook elbow macaroni in the boiling water, stirring occasionally until cooked through but firm to the bite, 8 minutes. Drain.

Heat olive oil and butter together in a large saucepan over medium-high heat; cook and stir carrot, celery, and onion until heated through, 2 to 3 minutes. Add garlic, green bell pepper, red bell pepper, zucchini, and Italian seasoning mixture; stir to combine.

Stir tomatoes and their juice, tomato sauce, three bean salad, green beans, and chicken stock into seasoned vegetable mixture. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer, stirring occasionally, until flavors are blended, about 30 minutes. Stir in elbow macaroni before serving.

name: Fat Katmer Recipe
instructions: 1. Geniş bir yoğurma kabına unu alın; süt, tuz ve mayayı ekleyerek yumuşak kıvamlı bir hamur elde edene kadar yoğurun.
2. Hazırladığınız hamuru yaklaşık 10 dakika dinlenmeye bırakın.
3.  Ardından eşit büyüklükte 6 parçaya ayırıp her birini beze haline getirin.
4. Bezeleri merdane yardımıyla mümkün olduğunca ince açın ve yüzeylerine eritilmiş tereyağını eşit şekilde sürün.
5. Açtığınız hamurları rulo yapın, ardından kendi etrafında dolayarak gül şeklini verin.
6. Beş bezeyi yağladıktan sonra son bezeyi de açın ve diğerlerinin üzerine yerleştirin.
7. Hamurları tarifteki şekle uygun olarak kesin ve tekrar sararak katmanlı bir form kazandırın.
8. Hazırladığınız bezeleri bir servis tepsisine dizin, üzerlerini kapatın ve yaklaşık 30 dakika buzdolabında dinlendirin.
9. Dinlenen hamurları tava büyüklüğünde olacak şekilde yeniden açın.
10. Önceden ısıtılmış tavada az miktarda yağ kullanarak iki tarafı da kızarana kadar pişirin ve sıcak olarak servis edin.
11.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Fat Rice

ingredients.item: . sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar
. (or more) sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: oil-cured black olives, green Spanish olives, pickled chiles (such as serrano or jalapeño), pickled sweet peppers (such as Peppadew or cherry), and thinly sliced scallions (for serving)

instructions: Gochugaru and fermented black beans can be found at Asian markets.
Whisk garlic, lemon juice, paprika, curry powder, and turmeric in a medium bowl; add chicken and toss to coat. Cover and chill at least 6 hours.
DO AHEAD: Chicken can be marinated 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.
Bring raisins, vinegar, and 2 Tbsp. water to a boil in a small saucepan, reduce heat, and simmer, stirring occasionally, until liquid evaporates, 8–10 minutes.
Raisins can be prepared 3 days ahead. Let cool, then cover and chill.

Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add bell peppers and onion; season with salt. Cook, stirring often, until softened, 8–10 minutes. Reduce heat to low and cook, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are caramelized, 45–60 minutes.
Add garlic and tomato paste to skillet and continue to cook, stirring occasionally, until tomato paste begins to darken, 10–15 minutes longer. Mix in vinegar and paprika; season with salt and pepper.
DO AHEAD: Soffritto can be made 3 days ahead. Let cool, then cover and chill.

Remove chicken from marinade; season with salt and pepper. Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a heavy 5–6-qt. pot with a lid over medium-high heat. Cook chicken, skin side down, until skin is brown and crisp, 10–12 minutes; transfer to a plate. (You can remove bones at this point, if desired.)
Reduce heat to medium. Add chorizo to pot and cook, stirring often, until crisp, about 2 minutes; transfer to a small bowl.

Add soffritto to pot and cook, stirring constantly, until sizzling, about 1 minute. Add broth, scraping up any browned bits; season with salt (salting liquid adequately here is important for flavorful rice). Add rice, sausage, chorizo, and raisins. Stir and bring to a boil. Reduce heat, arrange chicken on top, cover pot, and simmer gently, until rice is tender, 20–25 minutes. Uncover; increase heat to medium-high. Drizzle remaining 2 Tbsp. oil around edges of pot and cook, undisturbed, until underside of rice is crunchy, about 5 minutes longer.

While rice is cooking, mix garlic, fermented beans, if using, cilantro stems, and chiles in a small bowl. Peel prawns, leaving heads and tails on. Devein, stuff cut side with garlic mixture, and set aside.

Combine clams and wine in a large skillet, cover, and cook over high heat, stirring often, until clams open (discard any that do not open), about 5 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer clams to a large bowl.

Reduce heat to medium-low. Lightly season prawns with salt and cook in same skillet until opaque in the centers, about 2 minutes per side. Transfer prawns to bowl with clams; pour pan juices into a small bowl.
DO AHEAD: Prawns can be stuffed 1 hour ahead. Cover and chill.
Mix gochugaru, cayenne, and salt in a small bowl. Dip cut sides of lemon wedges into seasoning mix.
Top rice with prawns and clams and drizzle with reserved pan juices. Top with lemon wedges, eggs, olives, pickled chiles and peppers, and scallions.

name: Fat-free Vanilla Coffee Creamer
instructions: Combine evaporated milk, sweetener, and vanilla extract in a small saucepan; bring to a boil, stirring constantly, to allow alcohol in extract to cook off, 1 to 2 minutes. Remove from heat; cool before using or place in an airtight container and refrigerate.

name: Fat-free, Flour-free, Refined Sugar-free Cake
instructions: 1. Önce muz ve yumurtaları, daha sonra diğer malzemeleri blender’da kek harcı kıvamına gelene kadar karıştırın.
2.  İnce uzun bir kek kalıbını yağlayın ve harcı içine boşaltın.
3.  Önceden 180 dereceye ısıtılmış fırında yaklaşık 30-40 dakika pişirin.
4.  Soğuduktan sonra dilimleyerek servis yapın.
5.  * Formsante dergisinden alınmıştır.
6. Unsuz ve şekersiz kek tarifini de deneyebilirsiniz.

name: Fatayer (lebanese Meat Pies)

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add steak pieces, onions, parsley, salt, and pepper and cook until steak is browned on all sides, about 5 minutes. Remove from the heat.

Pat bread dough on a lightly floured surface into 4- to 5-inch rounds. Place about 2 tablespoons meat mixture on each dough round. Fold dough over the mixture to make a triangle. Pinch the edges of the dough together but make sure to leave the very center of the meat pie unsealed so steam can escape while cooking. Set on the prepared baking sheet. Repeat with remaining dough and meat mixture and cover with a clean kitchen towel. Let rise for 10 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Bake fatayer in the preheated oven until lightly browned, about 25 minutes.

name: Father's Day Pork Chops

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Arrange pork in a single layer in a large baking dish and cover with vinegar. Let sit 1 hour at room temperature.
Set up your dredging stations: one small baking dish with flour; one with eggs; and one with panko, zest, thyme, and oregano.

Heat a large cast-iron or heavy nonstick skillet over medium heat and add 3 tablespoons olive oil. Season each chop generously with salt and pepper. Have the kids use a fork to dredge each chop first in the flour, then in the egg, then in the panko mixture; make sure they coat the sides as well as the tops and bottoms, as every inch of crust is cru- cial. Then have the kids hand them over to Mom (or whoever is cooking) so she can put them into the hot oil. Working in 2 batches, cook pork chops—wiping out skillet with a paper towel after the first batch and adding the remaining 3 tablespoons oil—until crispy and cooked through, about 4 minutes per side.

name: Fatous (lebanon)

ingredients.item: 2αγγουράκια μικρά με τη φλούδα σε φέτες
2αγγουράκια μικρά με τη φλούδα σε φέτες

instructions: Ενώνουμε σε μπολ όλα τα υλικά για τη σως.
Κόβουμε οριζόντια τις πίτες και τις χωρίζουμε σε κομμάτια των 3 εκ.
Ζεσταίνουμε ελαιόλαδο σε ένα κατσαρολάκι και όταν κάψει ρίχνουμε τις κομμένες πίτες να ροδίσουν για 3΄-4΄.
Τις βάζουμε σε απορροφητικό χαρτί, θα τις χρησιμοποιήσουμε στη λιβανέζικη σαλάτα.
Βάζουμε σε μια σαλατιέρα τις ντομάτες, την πιπεριά, τα αγγουράκια, τα φρέσκα κρεμμυδάκια, τα ραπανάκια, τα φύλλα μαϊντανού και δυόσμου.
Ρίχνουμε επάνω τις μισές ψημένες πίτες και περιχύνουμε με τη σως, αφού πρώτα τη χτυπήσουμε καλά να γίνει κρέμα.
Ανακατεύουμε πολύ καλά και μοιράζουμε τη σαλάτα σε 4 πιάτα.

name: Fattoush

ingredients.prep: halved, toasted until golden brown, broken into bite-size pieces
chopped, or 4 cups cherry tomatoes, halved
or one 1-pound English hothouse cucumber, quartered lengthwise

ingredients.item: Little gem or baby romaine lettuces
ingredients.prep: or 1 small head romaine lettuce, trimmed, cut crosswise into 3/4-inch strips

ingredients.item: Purslane leaves or additional 3/4-inch-strips romaine lettuce

instructions: Combine sumac with soaking liquid, 3 Tbsp. lemon juice, 2 Tbsp. pomegranate molasses, garlic, 2 tsp. vinegar, and dried mint in a small bowl. Gradually add oil, whisking constantly, until well blended. Season with salt; add more lemon juice, pomegranate molasses, and vinegar to taste, if desired.
Place pita pieces in a medium bowl; pour oil over and toss to coat. Season pita to taste with salt.

Mix tomatoes and next 6 ingredients in a large bowl. Add ¾ of dressing; toss to coat, adding more dressing by tablespoonfuls as needed. Season with salt. Add pita; toss once. Sprinkle sumac over, if desired.

name: Fattoush With Queso Fresco

ingredients.prep: sliced in half crosswise, torn into 1-inch pieces
halved lengthwise, then cut crosswise  0.5 inch thick
cut lengthwise into quarters, then crosswise  0.5 inch thick

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Mix 4 tsp. za’atar into ⅓ cup oil in a small bowl. Spread out pita on a parchment-lined baking sheet, drizzle with za’atar oil, and toss until evenly coated. Bake, tossing once, until golden and crisp, 12–15 minutes. Let cool.

Whisk lemon juice, honey, remaining 3 Tbsp. oil, and remaining 1 tsp. za’atar in a large bowl. Add romaine, onion, cucumbers, tomatoes, cilantro, parsley, dill, mint, and pita chips to vinaigrette and toss to coat; season with salt.
Transfer to a platter. Top with queso fresco and sprinkle with sumac if using.
Do Ahead: Pita chips can be made 3 days ahead; store airtight at room temperature. Vinaigrette can be made 6 hours ahead; cover and chill.

name: Faux Shoyu Ramen
instructions: To a pot with 2 cups (480 ml) of boiling water add the ramen seasoning packet and a tablespoon of butter. Stir until the butter melts and then add the ramen noodle cube and cook until the noodles become tender, 2 minutes. Pour the ramen into a bowl.
To the prepared ramen, add the soy sauce and stir to incorporate.
Top with the nori, egg, bacon, scallions, and season with salt and pepper. Sprinkle with sesame seeds, if using.
Enjoy!

name: Faux Smoked Pulled Pork (carnitas)
instructions: Mix brown sugar, garlic powder, chili powder, paprika, oregano, onion powder, mustard seed, black pepper, cumin, coriander, and salt together in a small bowl.
Rub pork roast liberally with brown sugar mixture.
Heat oil in a large skillet over high heat. Add pork roast; cook until browned, 3 to 5 minutes per side.
Transfer pork to a slow cooker. Add water, liquid smoke, and chipotle peppers.
Cook on Low until pork is tender, about 6 hours. Transfer pork to a cutting board and pull apart with tongs.

name: Faux-chicken Stir-fry
instructions: Stir together soy sauce, brown sugar, rice vinegar, ginger, cornstarch, and red pepper in a small bowl.

Heat oil in a wok or extra-large skillet over medium-high heat. Add onion, carrots, mushrooms, and garlic; cook, stirring, for 5 minutes. Add broccoli, bell pepper, and meatless fillets; cook, stirring, until vegetables are crisp-tender, 3 to 5 minutes more.

Push mixture to edges of wok or skillet. Stir sauce and pour into center of wok. Cook until slightly thickened, then stir to coat vegetables and fillets; heat through. Serve over hot rice and sprinkle with cashews.

name: Faux-jito Mocktail
instructions: Add mint leaves and lime to a tall glass.
Using a muddler or a spoon, mash the lime and mint well.
Add sweetener, ice, and soda water. Stir to combine.
Garnish with lime and mint. Enjoy!

name: Fava
instructions: 1. İlk olarak kuru baklayı bol suyla ıslatın ve tencerede bekletin.
2.  Ertesi gün bol suda yıkayıp süzün.
3. Kullanacağınız soğanı temizleyin ve ince ince kıyın.
4.  Zeytinyağını tencereye alıp ısıtın.
5. Soğanı tavaya ekleyip pembeleşinceye kadar kavurun.
6.  Üzerine baklaları ilave edin.
7.  3-4 su bardağı su ekleyip baklalar yumuşayıncaya kadar pişirin.
8. Dereotunu temizleyip kıydıktan sonra, tencereye ilave edip karıştırın ve ocaktan alın.
9.  Robotla püre haline getirin.
10. Limon suyunu ekleyip karıştırın ve soğumaya bırakın.
11.  Favayı kıyılmış maydanoz ve kırmızı biberle süsleyebilirsiniz.
12.  Şimdiden afiyet olsun.

name: Fava Bean Aguachile

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
. shelled fresh or frozen fava beans
Diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Preheat oven to 375°. Toss 9 corn tortillas, each cut into 8 wedges, with 3 Tbsp. avocado oil and season with ¾ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt on a baking sheet.
Arrange in a single layer and bake tortillas until starting to dry out, 5–7 minutes. Using tongs, turn and continue to bake until lightly browned and crispy, 5–7 minutes more.

Fill a medium pot with water and bring to a boil. Prepare an ice water bath. Cook 1 lb. shelled fresh or frozen fava beans until bright green and crisp-tender, 30–60 seconds if using fresh and 2–3 minutes if using frozen. Drain and transfer to ice water bath. Let cool, then drain again and pat dry. Remove papery membranes from beans, if needed. Transfer to a large glass or ceramic bowl.

Blend 2 serrano chiles, stemmed, seeded, ½ cup chopped cilantro, ⅓ cup fresh lime juice (from about 3 limes), 2 Tbsp. avocado oil, 2 Tbsp. mint leaves (from about 2 small sprigs), 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. plus ⅛ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 2 Tbsp. water in a blender until smooth, about 2 minutes.
Add aguachile to bowl with beans and toss to combine. Let sit at room temperature 15 minutes.

If desired, transfer fava bean mixture to a large shallow serving bowl. Top with 4 small radishes, thinly sliced, and 1 medium avocado, finely chopped. Garnish with whole cilantro leaves. Season with remaining ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. plus ⅛ tsp. Morton kosher salt. Serve with baked totopos alongside.

name: Fava Bean And Asparagus Salad

ingredients.prep: sliced thinly lengthwise on a mandoline

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast pistachios on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing occasionally, until fragrant but not browned, 5–8 minutes. Let cool.

Cook fava beans in a large saucepan of boiling salted water until tender, about 4 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer to a colander set in a bowl of ice water. Drain, remove skins, and transfer beans to a small bowl.
Combine shallot and vinegar in another small bowl; season with salt and pepper and set aside at least 10 minutes. Whisk oil into shallot mixture; season vinaigrette with salt and pepper.
Combine beans, asparagus, watercress, mint, and tarragon in a large bowl; add vinaigrette and pistachios and toss to combine. Transfer to a serving platter and top with chive blossoms, if using.

name: Fava Bean And Pea Salad With Poppy Seed Dressing

ingredients.item: Shelled fava beans (from about 2 lb. pods) or frozen fava beans
Shelled fresh peas (from about 2 lb. pods) or frozen peas

instructions: If using fresh fava beans, cook in a medium saucepan of boiling salted water until tender, about 4 minutes. Using a sieve, transfer to a colander set in a bowl of ice water. Drain well and peel; place in a medium bowl. (If using frozen fava beans, cook 2 minutes; do not peel.)

Return water in saucepan to a boil; add peas and cook until tender, about 2 minutes. Drain; transfer to colander in ice water. Drain and add to bowl with fava beans. (If using frozen peas, cook 30 seconds.)

Whisk sour cream, goat cheese, buttermilk, and lemon juice in a medium bowl, thinning with more buttermilk as needed, until pourable; season with salt and pepper. Arrange lettuce and pea shoots on a platter, top with fava beans and peas, drizzle with dressing, and sprinkle with poppy seeds.
DO AHEAD: Fava beans and peas can be cooked 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

name: Fava Bean Bruschetta With Chicory And Red Onion

ingredients.item: Aleppo-style pepper or crushed red pepper flakes

instructions: Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a small pot over medium. Cook yellow onion, stirring occasionally, until soft and golden, 10–12 minutes. Add garlic, rosemary, and red pepper flakes and cook, stirring, until fragrant and garlic is soft, about 3 minutes. Add fava beans and pour in cold water to cover by 2". Bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low, season with salt, and simmer until tender, 45–60 minutes. Let cool slightly. Drain, reserving 1 cup cooking liquid.

Purée fava beans in a blender with ¼ cup reserved cooking liquid and 1 Tbsp. lemon juice, adding more cooking liquid as needed, until smooth. Taste and adjust seasoning with more salt, oil, and lemon juice as needed.
Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a medium skillet over medium-high. Add red onion, season with salt, and cook, stirring often, until brown but not soft, about 5 minutes. Transfer to a plate.
Wipe skillet clean and heat 1 Tbsp. oil over medium-high. Add chicory, season with salt, and cook, tossing, until wilted slightly, about 3 minutes.
Spoon fava bean purée onto toast; top with red onion, chicory, and Aleppo-style pepper. Drizzle with oil.
Do Ahead: Fava beans can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.

name: Fava Bean Cream With Lentils
instructions: Num tacho, adicione as favas e cubra com água. Tempere com sal e deixe cozer, durante 5 minutos. Retire, escorra-as, passe por água fria e retire a pele. Reserve a água e 50 g de favas.
Noutro tacho, adicione as lentilhas, previamente lavadas, cubra com água, tempere com sal e deixe cozer, durante 12 minutos. Retire e escorra.

Numa panela grande, junte a água da cozedura das favas e adicione a cebola e o alho, previamente descascados e cortados grosseiramente, as favas e 150 g de lentilhas cozidas e deixe cozinhar, durante 10 minutos. Retire do lume, reduza a puré com uma varinha mágica e adicione mais água, se desejar.
Tempere com sal e pimenta e envolva. Divida a sopa por pratos e sirva decorada com as lentilhas e as favas reservadas, um fio de azeite e trevos.

name: Fava Bean Soup
instructions: Descasque a batata, a cenoura, a cebola e os alhos; pique a cebola e os alhos; corte a cenoura em quartos e a batata e a couve em cubos; descasque o tomate, retire-lhe as sementes e corte também em cubos.

Leve ao lume um tacho com o azeite, os alhos, a cebola e a folha de louro e deixe alourar ligeiramente. Junte o tomate, adicione a água e o sal e deixe levantar fervura. Acrescente o chouriço, previamente picado com um garfo, a couve, a batata, as favas e a cenoura, mexa e deixe cozinhar.
Retire o chouriço, corte-o em rodelas e volte a juntar à sopa. Retifique os temperos e polvilhe com os coentros picados. Retire do lume e sirva de imediato.

name: Fava Bean Soup With Vegetables
instructions: Μουσκεύουμε τη φάβα σε μπολ με νερό για 30 λεπτά. Στη συνέχεια την ξεπλένουμε και τη στραγγίζουμε καλά.
Ζεσταίνουμε σε μια κατσαρόλα με χοντρή βάση 2 κ.σ. ελαιόλαδο και σοτάρουμε τα λαχανικά για 3-4 λεπτά. Τα βγάζουμε σε ένα μπολ.
Ρίχνουμε στο ίδιο λάδι τη στεγνή φάβα και ανακατεύουμε να λαδωθεί. Συμπληρώνουμε 1½ λίτρο νερό.
Μόλις πάρει βράση, χαμηλώνουμε την εστία σε μέτρια ένταση και αφαιρούμε τον αφρό που σχηματίζεται στην επιφάνεια.
Βράζουμε τη φάβα στην ανοιχτή κατσαρόλα (χωρίς καπάκι) για 30 λεπτά ανακατεύοντας μια-δυο φορές ενδιάμεσα.

Προσθέτουμε στη συνέχεια τα σοταρισμένα λαχανικά, τον κουρκουμά και την πάπρικα και συνεχίζουμε το μαγείρεμα για περίπου 20 λεπτά ακόμα σε χαμηλή φωτιά, μέχρι να λιώσει τελείως η φάβα και να αρχίσει να αποκτά κρεμώδη υφή.
Στο τέλος του βρασμού ενσωματώνουμε και το υπόλοιπο ελαιόλαδο ανακατεύοντας συνεχώς με ξύλινη κουτάλα – σε χαμηλή πάντα εστία γιατί όσο πυκνώνει η φάβα, κοχλάζει έντονα και πιτσιλάει ολόγυρα.
Η φάβα σε αυτήν τη φάση έχει λιώσει σχεδόν τελείως και έχει γίνει μια αραιή κρέμα, με τον καρπό της όμως να διακρίνεται ακόμη.
Προσθέτουμε λίγο αλάτι και πιπέρι και ανακατεύουμε.
Αν θέλουμε πιο λεία υφή, πολτοποιούμε τη μισή ποσότητα και την επαναφέρουμε στη σούπα.
Ελέγχουμε την πυκνότητα της σούπας. Στο τέλος πρέπει να είναι ρευστή και κρεμώδης με κομμάτια λαχανικών και όχι σε μορφή πουρέ όπως η κλασική φάβα που γνωρίζουμε.
Τη μεταφέρουμε σε μπολ. Κατά το σερβίρισμα, ραντίζουμε με λίγο ελαιόλαδο και χυμό λεμονιού.

name: Fava Beans Stewed With Fried Streaks
instructions: Tempere a entremeada com sal grosso e deixe repousar no frio de um dia para o outro. No dia, lave as batatas, leve-as a cozer com a pele em água temperada com sal durante 20 minutos, depois escorra-as, deixe-as arrefecer um pouco e retire-lhes a pele. Coza também as favas em água durante 15 minutos, depois escorra-as, deite-as para um tacho, junte as batatas cozidas, os alhos picados e o azeite, leve ao lume e deixe saltear um pouco.

Leve ao lume outro tacho com a banha, deixe derreter, junte a entremeada cortada em pedaços e deixe-a fritar até ficar douradinha. Depois escorra a entremeada, adicione-a ao tacho com as favas, tempere com uma pitada de pimenta, tape e deixe cozinhar durante 10 minutos, em lume brando e sacudindo o tacho de vez em quando.
Lave as folhas do alho-francês, corte-as em tiras finas, junte-as ao tacho, adicione igualmente os coentros picados, envolva, retire do lume e sirva quente.

Tempere a entremeada com sal grosso e deixe repousar no frio de um dia para o outro. No dia, lave as batatas, leve-as a cozer com a pele em água temperada com sal durante 20 minutos, depois escorra-as, deixe-as arrefecer um pouco e retire-lhes a pele. Coza também as favas em água durante 15 minutos, depois escorra-as, deite-as para um tacho, junte as batatas cozidas, os alhos picados e o azeite, leve ao lume e deixe saltear um pouco.

Leve ao lume outro tacho com a banha, deixe derreter, junte a entremeada cortada em pedaços e deixe-a fritar até ficar douradinha. Depois escorra a entremeada, adicione-a ao tacho com as favas, tempere com uma pitada de pimenta, tape e deixe cozinhar durante 10 minutos, em lume brando e sacudindo o tacho de vez em quando.
Lave as folhas do alho-francês, corte-as em tiras finas, junte-as ao tacho, adicione igualmente os coentros picados, envolva, retire do lume e sirva quente.

name: Fava Beans With Caramelized Onions
instructions: Βάζουμε πρώτα τη φάβα σε ένα μπολ και την καλύπτουμε με νερό.
Αφήνουμε για 30 λεπτά να μουλιάσει και έπειτα τ η στραγγίζουμε.
Ζεσταίνουμε το ελαιόλαδο σε μέτρια φωτιά, σε μία φαρδιά κατσαρόλα με χοντρή βάση.
Σοτάρουμε τα χοντροκομμένα κρεμμύδια, για τη φάβα με καραμελωμένα κρεμμύδια, με το θυμάρι, ανακατεύοντας τακτικά και αφήνουμε για 6-7′ λεπτά να γυαλίσουν τα κρεμμύδια χωρίς να πάρουν χρώμα.
Προσθέτουμε τη φάβα και το νερό.
Ανακατεύουμε τα υλικά και αφήνουμε τη φάβα να πάρει βράση.
Μόλις αρχίσει να κοχλάζει και να βράζει η φάβα, χαμηλώνουμε τη φωτιά και σιγοβράζουμε χωρίς καπάκι.
Με μία κουτάλα αφαιρούμε τον σκούρο αφρό που σχηματίζεται στην επιφάνεια της φάβας.
Αφήνουμε να σιγοβράσει για περίπου 50 λεπτά (ανάλογα με το πόσο βραστερό είναι το όσπριο).
Αφήνουμε σχεδόν μέχρι η φάβα να να λιώσει από το βράσιμο.
Αλατίζουμε στο τέλος του βρασμού.
Πολτοποιούμε τη φάβα για πιο λείο και βελούδινο αποτέλεσμα με τη ράβδο ή στο μπλέντερ.
Μπορούμε να τη σερβίρουμε σκέτη, με ελαιόλαδο και λεμόνι ή να παντρέψουμε τη φάβα με καραμελωμένα κρεμμύδια.

name: Fava Is Married
instructions: Mουλιάζουμε τη φάβα σε νερό για 30΄ και στη συνέχεια την στραγγίζουμε.
Τη βάζουμε σε κατσαρόλα και την καλύπτουμε με νερό (5 δάχτυλα επιπλέον).
Μόλις πάρει βράση ξαφρίζουμε καλά.
Ανακατεύουμε και χαμηλώνουμε τη φωτιά.
Προσθέτουμε το κρεμμύδι ολόκληρο.
Σιγοβράζουμε μέχρι να βράσει καλά, 30΄ έως 45΄ (δεν ανακατεύουμε από την ώρα που θα πάρει βράση διότι θα κολλήσει).
Αφού βράσει καλά, σβήνουμε τη φωτιά και με ξύλινη κουτάλα την ανακατεύουμε συνεχώς, να κρεμώσει, ή την περνάμε από μύλο λαχανικών για να αποκτήσει βελούδινη υφή.
Προσθέτουμε το ελαιόλαδο και το αλάτι.
Ζεσταίνουμε 3 κ.σ. ελαιόλαδο.
Σοτάρουμε τα κρεμμύδια και την κάπαρη για 3΄-4΄, να γίνουν διάφανα.
Αν θέλουμε προσθέτουμε και 4-5 ντοματίνια κομμένα στη μέση.
Σερβίρουμε με κάπαρη, κρεμμύδια σε πιατέλα και τη γαρνίρουμε με τα καραμελωμένα κρεμμύδια και φρέσκο ψωμί .

name: Fava Of Santorini
instructions: Αρχικά ξεπλένουμε την φάβα Σαντορίνης, τη βάζουμε σε μια κατσαρόλα με μπόλικο νερό (περίπου 5 κούπες) να βράσει σε δυνατή φωτιά.
Πριν αρχίσει ο βρασμός με ένα τρυπητό την ξαφρίζουμε, στη συνέχεια προσθέτουμε το ελαιόλαδο, αλάτι, πιπέρι, θρούμπι και τα κρεμμύδια αφού πρώτα τα έχουμε τσιγαρίσει.
Μόλις πάρει βράση χαμηλώνουμε τη φωτιά και αφήνουμε την φάβα να βράσει μέχρι να μαλακώσουν καλά και το μείγμα να χυλώσει και να πήξει. (Αν χρειαστεί προσθέτουμε και άλλο ζεστό νερό).
Η φάβα Σαντορίνης δε χρειάζεται πολτοποίηση γιατί λιώνει στο βράσιμο και γίνεται κρέμα.

name: Fava With Broad Broad Beans

ingredients.item: 500 gr iç bakla (önceden çizilmiş, haşlanmış, ayıklanmış)

instructions: 1. Ayıklanmış, haşlanmış iç baklaları, küçük küçük doğradığınız soğanlarla zeytinyağında kavurun.
2.  Daha sonra  tuz ve şekeri ilave edip 1 çay bardağı su koyun ve baklalar yumuşayıncaya kadar kavurmaya devam edin.
3.  Baklalar yumuşadıktan sonra el blenderi ile pütürsüz olana kadar çekin.
4.  Cam bir kabın dibini ıslatın.
5.  Bakla püresini içine dümdüz yayın.
6.  Baklayı kare şeklinde kesin.
7.  Üzerine 1 limonun suyu  ile 2 yemek kaşığı zeytinyağını karıştırıp dökün.
8.  Buzdolabında 3-4 saat donması için bekletin.
9.  Üzerini dereotu ile süsleyin.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Fava With Caviar
instructions: 1. Fava için tüm malzemeyi bir tencere alarak kısık ateşte koyulaşıncaya kadar kaynatın.
2.  Blender yardımıyla püre haline getirin ve belli yoğunluğa ulaşınca bir süzgeçten geçirerek bir tepsiye alın.
3. Kalınlığını ayarladıktan sonra üzerine zeytinyağı sürün ve yağlı kağıt ile kapatarak soğumaya bırakın.
4. Soğuduktan sonra bir kalıp yardımı ile ya da bıçakla istediğiniz şekilde keserek servis tabağına alın.
5. Kırmızı pancarı haşladıktan sonra soyun ve ince şerit halinde koparmadan keserek favanın üzerine gül şeklinde yerleştirin.
6.  Siyah havyar ve taze fesleğeni arzu ettiğiniz şekilde yerleştirin ve grissini ile birlikte servis edin.

name: Fava With Cumin And Onion
instructions: 1. Baklaları su dolu bir tencereye alıp 8 saat bekletin.
2.  Suyunu değiştirip 10 dakika haşlayın.
3.  İkinci kez süzüp teker teker kabuklarını soyun.
4. Baklaları yeniden bir tencereye alıp 10 bardak su ekleyin.
5.  Kısık ateşte 1-2 dakika boyunca karıştırarak haşlayın.
6.  Baklalar yumuşamaya başlayıp püre kıvamına gelinceye kadar arara ara karıştırarak haşlayın.
7.  Servis tabağına alıp soğumaya bırakın.
8.  Kimyonu küçük bir tavaya alıp 4-5 dakika kavurun.
9.  Bir çorba kaşığı zeytinyağı ekleyip 1 dakika kızartın.
10.  Soğanı soyup ince kıyın.
11.  Tuzla karıştırıp tuz ve kimyonla birlikte favanın üzerine yayın.
12.  Geri kalan zeytinyağını da üzerine döküp dilimleyerek soğuk servis yapın.
13.  Afiyet olsun.
14. Dilerseniz, yemeklerin yanında sunabileceğiniz pratik fava tarifini de deneyebilirsiniz.

name: Faye's Duck Dressing
instructions: Place duck in a 12-quart stockpot with enough water to cover by 2 to 3 inches. Bring to a boil, reduce heat to medium-low, and simmer until meat is tender, about 1 hour. Remove duck from broth, allow to cool, and pull meat from the bones into bite-sized pieces. Reserve broth.
Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).

Mix together cornbread, biscuits, onion, sage, pepper, garlic salt, and salt in a large roasting pan. Beat eggs in a bowl; pour over cornbread mixture. Add duck pieces to the pan; mix thoroughly. Stir in reserved duck broth until dressing is very moist (about the consistency of thick pancake batter).
Bake in the preheated oven until a spoon inserted into the center of dressing can stand up, 45 minutes to 1 hour.

name: Febras With Roasted Potatoes
instructions: Lave bem as batatas com a pele, mantenha-as inteiras ou corte-as em gomos se forem grandes. Disponha-as num tabuleiro e tempere com sal. Leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 160ºC, durante 30 minutos.

Descasque as cebolas, corte-as em meias-luas e reserve. Aqueça uma frigideira com azeite, os alhos descascados e esmagados e as folhas de louro. Adicione as febras, tempere com sal e pimenta e deixe cozinhar de ambos os lados. Retire para um prato e reserve.

Mantenha a frigideira ao lume, junte a cebola e deixe refogar até ficar bem macia. Regue com o vinagre, mexa e deixe cozinhar mais um pouco. No final, tempere este escabeche com um pouco de sal e pimenta.
Sirva as febras cobertas com o molho de escabeche e acompanhe com as batatas assadas.

name: February Recipe

ingredients.item: Tavuk yerine ton balığı veya haşlanmış et kullanabilirsiniz.
Vejetaryen versiyon için protein olarak haşlanmış mercimek veya nohut eklenebilir.
Mayonez yerine süzme yoğurt veya yoğurt–mayonez karışımı tercih edilebilir.
Patates yerine tatlı patates kullanarak farklı bir aroma elde edebilirsiniz.
Havuç yerine kabak veya közlenmiş biber eklenebilir.
Pancar yerine kırmızı lahana kullanarak benzer renkli bir alternatif hazırlanabilir.
Yumurtayı çıkartarak daha hafif bir versiyon yapılabilir.
Dereotu yerine maydanoz veya taze nane kullanılabilir.
üzeri için nar yerine mısır veya zeytin eklenebilir.
Ceviz yerine fındık veya badem kullanarak farklı bir kıtır doku kazandırabilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Patates, havuç ve pancarı ayrı ayrı haşlayın.
2.  Haşlanan sebzeleri kabuklarını soyduktan sonra rendeleyip tamamen soğumaya bırakın.
3.  Yumurtaları da haşlayıp ince şekilde rendeleyin.
4. Servis tabağına ilk kat olarak rendelenmiş patatesi yayın ve hafifçe bastırarak düz bir zemin oluşturun.
5.  Üzerine ince bir tabaka mayonez sürün.
6. İkinci kat olarak havucu ekleyin ve yine nazikçe bastırın.
7.  Üzerine tekrar az miktarda mayonez sürerek katları dengeleyin.
8. Ardından didiklenmiş tavuk veya tercih ederseniz ton balığını ekleyin.
9.  Bu katın üzerine rendelenmiş yumurtayı yayın ve tekrar ince bir mayonez tabakası ekleyin.
10. Son kat olarak pancarı yerleştirerek salatanın üzerini tamamen kaplayın.
11.  Üzerine tekrar mayonez sürerek düzgün bir yüzey elde edin.
12. Salatayı buzdolabında en az 1–2 saat dinlendirin.
13.  Servis öncesinde üzerini ince kıyılmış dereotu, nar taneleri ve iri çekilmiş ceviz ile süsleyerek görsel olarak zengin ve iştah açıcı bir sunum hazırlayabilirsiniz.
14.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Feijoada
instructions: Deite as carnes e o chouriço num tacho e junte água até ficarem cobertos. Leve ao lume e deixe cozer, retirando as carnes conforme forem ficando cozidas.

Descasque as cebolas e os alhos, pique tudo, deite para um tacho, junte o azeite e as folhas de louro, leve ao lume e deixe cozinhar até a cebola ficar douradinha. Junte o tomate pelado, previamente escorrido e picado, o colorau e os cominhos, mexa e deixe cozinhar alguns minutos.

Junte as carnes e o chouriço, tudo cortado em pedaços pequenos e misture. Adicione o feijão cozido e as cenouras cortadas em rodelas e mexa. Acrescente a água de cozer as carnes, até cobrir tudo, e deixe levantar fervura.

De seguida, retifique o sal e deixe cozinhar, em lume brando, durante 15 minutos ou até apurar. Se necessário, junte mais água de cozer as carnes. Sirva a feijoada polvilhada com a salsa picada e acompanhada com arroz branco.

name: Feijoada De Domingo (sunday Bean Stew)

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Combine 6 quarts water, black beans, bay leaves, salt, and pepper in a large saucepan. Bring to boil; simmer for 50 minutes.

Bring remaining 2 quarts water to boil in a large saucepan. Stir in dried beef, pork ribs, and pig's feet; simmer until flavors combine, about 25 minutes. Add smoked sausage, spicy sausage, large bacon pieces, pork belly, pig's ear, and pig's tails; simmer until meat mixture is softened, about 25 minutes.
Stir meat mixture to the bean mixture; simmer until flavors combine, about 45 minutes.

Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat; add garlic. Cook until warmed through, about 45 seconds; transfer to bean mixture. Add small bacon pieces to the skillet; cook and stir until lightly golden, about 2 minutes. Stir in onion; cook until onion is soft and browned, about 5 minutes. Stir in parsley.
Stir the onion mixture into the bean mixture; simmer until tender, about 25 minutes. Transfer meat mixture to a serving dish. Pour beans into a separate serving dish.

name: Feijoada Nordestino (northeastern Brazilian Black Bean Stew)

ingredients.prep: cut into fine ribbons, or to taste
cut in wedges, or as desired

instructions: Combine beans, onion, ham, calabresa, 3 cloves garlic, salt, cumin, black pepper, and bay leaf in a pressure cooker; cover with water to fill line.

Close cooker securely and place pressure regulator over vent according to manufacturer's instructions. Cook at high pressure until regulator is gently rocking, 5 to 7 minutes. Reduce pressure to low. Cook, adding water halfway if needed, until beans are tender and water is reduced to your liking, about 1 hour.
Turn off heat. Let pressure release naturally according to manufacturer's instructions, about 5 minutes. Unlock lid and remove. Let feijoada cool until ready to serve.
Heat olive oil in a saucepan over medium-high heat. Saute remaining 1 clove garlic and collard greens until just tender, about 2 minutes.
Place cassava flour in a skillet over medium-high heat. Cook and stir until toasted, about 3 minutes. Stir in butter.
Serve feijoada with the collards-garlic mixture, toasted cassava flour, rice, orange wedges, and cilantro.

name: Feijoada Saloia With Poached Eggs
instructions: Demolhe e coza o feijão de véspera, reservando a água. Deite num tacho a banha, a cebola e os alhos picados, o toucinho cortado em dois pedaços e a folha de louro. Leve ao lume, moderado, e deixe alourar mexendo com uma colher.

Adicione o vinho branco e a polpa de tomate e mexa. Junte o entrecosto cortados em pedaços, bem como o chouriço e a morcela, tape e deixe cozinhar durante 2 minutos. Acrescente depois 2 ou 3 dl da água do feijão e deixe cozer, em lume moderado. Vá retirando os enchidos e o toucinho à medida que forem ficando cozidos.

Junte, de seguida, o feijão escorrido e acrescente a água do mesmo, apenas o suficiente para formar molho. Deixe cozinhar durante 8 a 10 minutos, mexendo de vez em quando. Retifique o sal e tempere com um pouco de pimenta.
Por fim, disponha os ovos sobre o feijão, tape o tacho e deixe cozinhar até ficarem a seu gosto. Junte novamente os enchidos cortados em rodelas e o toucinho em fatias e sirva bem quente.

name: Feijoada Soup
instructions: Aloure as cebolas e os alhos, descascados e picados, num tacho com o azeite, depois adicione as sobras da feijoada (as carnes devem estar desfiadas ou cortadas em pedaços pequenos), envolva, junte água até cobrir e deixe cozer por alguns minutos.
Descasque a cenoura e o nabo, corte-os em pedacinhos, assim como a couve, e junte os legumes à sopa.
Adicione as massinhas, retifique o sal, tempere com pimenta e deixe cozinhar, até a massa ficar cozida. Sirva quente.

name: Fellah Meatballs Recipe

ingredients.item: Sosuna nar ekşisi ekleyerek hafif ekşi ve geleneksel bir tat katabilirsin.
üzerine yoğurt ekleyerek daha yumuşak ve dengeli bir sunum elde edebilirsin.
Acı sevenler için sosuna acı biber veya pul biber miktarı artırılabilir.

instructions: 1. İnce bulguru geniş bir kaba alın ve üzerini biraz geçecek kadar sıcak su ekleyin.
2.  Üstünü bir kağıt havlu ile kapatıp bulgur yumuşayana kadar dinlenmeye bırakın.
3. Bulgur şiştikten sonra içine irmik, rendelenmiş soğan, yumurta ve domates salçasını ekleyin.
4.  Tuz, karabiber ve kimyonu da ilave ederek iyice yoğurmaya başlayın.
5.  Ardından unu ekleyip yoğurma işlemine devam edin.
6.  Karışım fazla sert olursa biraz su ekleyebilir, çok yumuşak olursa az miktarda un ilavesi yapabilirsiniz.
7. Hazırladığınız harçtan küçük parçalar koparıp yuvarlayın.
8.  Her birinin ortasına parmağınızla bastırarak klasik fellah köftesi şeklini verin.
9.  Tüm harcı bu şekilde tamamlayın.
10. Şekil verdiğiniz köfteleri kaynar ve tuzlu suyun içine atarak haşlayın.
11.  Pişen köfteleri sudan alıp süzün.
12. Sosu hazırlamak için geniş bir tava ya da wok tavayı ocağa alın.
13.  Zeytinyağını ekleyip ısıtın.
14.  Ardından domates ve biber salçasını ekleyerek birkaç dakika kavurun.
15.  Üzerine domates püresi, ezilmiş sarımsak, su ve baharatları ekleyip karıştırarak sosu hazırlayın.
16. Haşlanmış köfteleri hazırladığınız sosun içine alın ve nazikçe karıştırın.
17.  Son olarak ince doğranmış maydanozu ekleyip harmanladıktan sonra sıcak olarak servis yapın.
18.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Felopita, Sweet Pumpkin Pie Of Lemnos
instructions: Κόβουμε την κολοκύθα σε λεπτές φέτες με πάχος ανάμεσα σε 1/2 και 1 εκατοστό.
Σε μικρό ταψί βάζουμε το ελαιόλαδο.
Πανάρουμε την κολοκύθα στο αλεύρι και τινάζουμε να φύγει το περιττό.
Τοποθετούμε την κολοκύθα στο ταψί με το ελαιόλαδο, χωρίς αφήνουμε κενά ανάμεσα στις φέτες.
Πασπαλίζουμε με τις σταφίδες, την κανέλα και τη ζάχαρη. Μπορείτε αντί ζάχαρης να βάλετε πετιμέζι.
Ραντίζουμε με λίγο ελαιόλαδο τη επιφάνεια της κολοκύθας.
Ψήνουμε σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο στους 180°C στον αέρα, στη μεσαία σχάρα, μέχρι να καραμελώσει η κολοκύθα για περίπου 40 λεπτά.
Παραδοσιακά σερβίρεται σκέτη αλλά μπορείτε να την απολαύσετε με μια μπάλα παγωτό ή λίγο στραγγιστό γιαούρτι.

name: Feneo Vanilla Beans With Rice And Fennel
original_name: Φασόλια βανίλιες Φενεού με ρύζι και μάραθο

ingredients.item: 500 grβανίλιες φενεού  (ψιλά, λευκά και γλυκά φασόλια)
4φρέσκα κρεμμυδάκια, (και τα φύλλα τους) σε φέτες
500 grβανίλιες φενεού  (ψιλά, λευκά και γλυκά φασόλια)
4φρέσκα κρεμμυδάκια, (και τα φύλλα τους) σε φέτες

instructions: Ξεπλένουμε τα φασόλια και τα βάζουμε σε μια κατσαρόλα με κρύο νερό, να τα καλύπτει.
Τα βράζουμε για περίπου 20 λεπτά αφαιρώντας σχολαστικά στην αρχή του βρασμού τον αφρό που συγκεντρώνεται στην επιφάνεια του νερού. Όταν μισομαλακώσουν, τα σουρώνουμε.
Στο μεταξύ, καθαρίζουμε και κόβουμε τα υλικά σύμφωνα με τις οδηγίες της συνταγής. Κόβουμε τα κοτσάνια του μάραθου και κρατάμε χωριστά τα τρυφερά φύλλα.
Ζεσταίνουμε σε μια κατσαρόλα 3 κ.σ. ελαιόλαδο (από τη συνολική ποσότητα) και σοτάρουμε το πράσο, το ξερό κρεμμύδι και το λευκό μέρος των φρέσκων κρεμμυδιών για 5-6 λεπτά, μέχρι να ροδίσουν ελαφρά.
Προσθέτουμε τα κοτσάνια του μάραθου, τα πράσινα φύλλα από τα φρέσκα κρεμμυδάκια, τα αγριόσκορδα και τον πελτέ και ανακατεύουμε να λαδωθούν.
Ρίχνουμε στην κατσαρόλα τα μισοβρασμένα φασόλια και 3 φλιτζ. νερό. Μόλις έρθουν σε σημείο βρασμού, χαμηλώνουμε την ένταση της εστίας και τα αφήνουμε σε μέτρια φωτιά για 5 λεπτά.
Ξεπλένουμε σε ένα σουρωτήρι το ρύζι κάτω από τη βρύση, μέχρι το νερό που βγαίνει να είναι διάφανο. Το περιχύνουμε με το μισό χυμό λεμονιού και ανακατεύουμε.
Ρίχνουμε το ρύζι στα φασόλια, χαμηλώνουμε κι άλλο την εστία και σιγοβράζουμε για 20 λεπτά μέχρι να σωθούν τα πολλά υγρά.
Προς το τέλος, προσθέτουμε αλάτι, πιπέρι, τα τρυφερά φύλλα του μάραθου, το υπόλοιπο ελαιόλαδο και τον υπόλοιπο χυμό λεμονιού.
Ανακατεύουμε και σβήνουμε την εστία όσο έχει ακόμη υγρασία το ρύζι. Σκεπάζουμε με καθαρή πετσέτα και αφήνουμε το φαγητό να σταθεί για 5 λεπτά προτού σερβίρουμε.

name: Fennel And Carrot Soup

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Coarsely chopped roasted chestnuts from a jar

instructions: Heat 4 Tbsp. butter in a large heavy pot over medium. Add fennel, onion, carrots, potato, thyme, and bay leaf; season with salt and pepper. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and cook, stirring occasionally and reducing heat if needed, until vegetables are soft but not browned and have released their moisture, 45–60 minutes (this will give them deep flavor).
Add broth, bring to a boil, and season with salt and pepper. Reduce heat and simmer until potato is falling apart, 8–10 minutes. Let cool slightly. Remove herbs.
Working in batches, purée in a blender until smooth. Strain into a clean pot; season with salt and pepper.
Heat remaining 2 Tbsp. butter in a small saucepan over medium. Add chestnuts and cook, stirring often, until butter is browned and chestnuts are toasted, about 4 minutes.
Mix crème fraîche and maple syrup in a small bowl. Serve soup topped with maple crème fraîche and chestnuts.
DO AHEAD: Soup can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.

name: Fennel And Celery Root Salad

ingredients.prep: very thinly sliced on a mandoline, plus  0.25 cup coarsely chopped fennel fronds
peeled, very thinly sliced on a mandoline

ingredients.item: Head of treviso or chioggia radicchio

instructions: Toss sliced fennel, fennel fronds, celery root, radicchio, celery leaves, parsley, and marjoram in a large bowl to combine; season with salt and pepper. Drizzle with oil and lemon juice and toss to coat; taste and season with more salt and pepper if needed. Pile salad lightly onto plates.

name: Fennel And Celery Salad

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Combine celery, fennel, and red onion in a bowl. Mix in parsley. Add lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper. Mix together and let sit for 2 hours or more for flavors to develop.

name: Fennel And Celery Salad With Pumpkin Seeds
instructions: Combine celery, fennel, parsley, and pumpkin seeds in large bowl. Whisk oil and lemon juice in small bowl. Season with salt and pepper; toss with vegetables. Toss in most of cheese; top with remaining cheese.

name: Fennel And Ginger Tea
instructions: Fill a mug with boiling water.
Place fennel seeds in a tea ball; add to boiling water. Add grated ginger; steep for 2 minutes. Remove tea ball; serve.

name: Fennel And Orange Salad

ingredients.item: 2 bulbos de hinojo grandes, limpios y cortados en rodajas finas
4 naranjas grandes, peladas y cortadas en rodajas
1 cebolla roja pequeña, cortada en rodajas finas
3 cucharadas de aceite de oliva extra virgen
1 cucharada de vinagre de vino blanco o zumo de limón
Sal y pimienta negra al gusto

instructions: Comienza por cortar el hinojo en rodajas finas, utilizando una mandolina si es posible para asegurar uniformidad. Haz lo mismo con la cebolla roja.
Con un cuchillo afilado, pela las naranjas, asegurándote de remover toda la piel blanca. Luego, corta las naranjas en rodajas o en segmentos, según prefieras.

En una fuente grande, dispón una base de rodajas de hinojo, seguido por las rodajas de naranja y cebolla roja. Si decides incluir aceitunas negras, esparce unas cuantas por encima. Añade también piñones que le aportarán un contraste delicioso.

Mezcla el aceite de oliva con el vinagre o zumo de limón, sal y pimienta en un cuenco pequeño. Vierte el aderezo sobre la ensalada justo antes de servir para mantener la frescura y la textura crujiente del hinojo.

name: Fennel And Orange Salad With Lemon-ginger Vinaigrette

ingredients.prep: trimmed, very thinly sliced, plus  0.25 cup fennel fronds
center ribs and stems removed, leaves torn into bite-size pieces (about 4 cups)

instructions: Preheat oven to 375°. Place baguette slices on a rimmed baking sheet and toast, 8–10 minutes. Let cool and break into pieces.
Meanwhile, whisk vinegar, lemon and orange zests, ginger, and pepper in a large bowl; season with salt and whisk in oil.

Using a sharp knife, cut all peel and white pith from oranges; discard. Working over bowl with dressing, cut between membranes to release segments into bowl; discard membranes. Add fennel, fennel fronds, mustard greens, and croutons to bowl; toss to combine.

name: Fennel And Potato Hash

ingredients.prep: peeled, cut into 1/2- to 3/4-inch cubes, patted dry

instructions: Cut fennel into 1/2-inch cubes (there should be about 4 scant cups). Finely chop enough fennel fronds to measure 1/4 cup. Cook fennel in boiling salted water until just tender, 3 minutes. Drain; set aside.

Heat 2 tablespoons oil in heavy large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add potatoes. Cook until golden and crisp, turning often, 20 to 25 minutes. Using potato masher, crush potatoes in skillet. Add fennel, salt, and pepper. Cook until fennel is golden, stirring often, 2 to 3 minutes. Add garlic and cook 2 minutes. Stir in parsley. Serve hot.

name: Fennel And Zucchini Soup With Warm Tomato Relish
instructions: Heat 1 1/2 tablespoons olive oil in large saucepan over medium-high heat. Add diced fennel, zucchini, onion, and fennel seeds. Sauté until fennel is translucent, 4 to 5 minutes. Add broth; bring to boil. Cover; reduce heat and simmer until vegetables are tender, about 15 minutes. Puree in blender until smooth; return soup to saucepan. Season to taste with salt and pepper.

Meanwhile, heat remaining 1/2 tablespoon olive oil in medium skillet over medium heat. Add tomatoes and sauté until just heated through, 1 to 2 minutes. Remove from heat. Mix in 1 tablespoon chopped fennel fronds; season relish with salt and pepper. Serve soup with relish.

name: Fennel Cream, And Delicious
original_name: Crema de hinojo, fácil y deliciosa
instructions: Comienza limpiando y cortando el hinojo, la cebolla y el puerro. Para el hinojo, retira la capa externa más dura y corta en trozos medianos. Pica finamente la cebolla y el puerro.

En una olla grande, añade un poco de aceite de oliva y sofríe la cebolla y el puerro hasta que estén tiernos y transparentes. Agrega el hinojo a la olla y sofríe durante unos minutos. Busca que se impregne bien del sabor del sofrito. Salpimenta ligeramente

Vierte el caldo de verduras en la olla y lleva a ebullición. Reduce el fuego y deja cocinar a fuego lento hasta que el hinojo esté completamente tierno. Una vez que el hinojo esté suave, retira la olla del fuego. Usa una batidora de mano o un procesador de alimentos para triturar todos los ingredientes hasta obtener una crema suave y homogénea.
Vuelve a colocar la olla en el fuego y añade la nata. Mezcla bien y cocina a fuego lento durante unos minutos. Ajusta de sal y pimienta al gusto. Sirve la crema caliente.

name: Fennel Gratin With Pecorino And Lemon
instructions: Lightly oil shallow 2-quart glass or ceramic baking dish. Heat 5 tablespoons oil in large wide pot over medium heat. Add onion and garlic; sauté until soft but not brown, about 5 minutes. Add fennel; increase heat to medium-high and sauté until fennel is slightly softened and beginning to brown, stirring frequently, about 18 minutes. Stir in broth and next 4 ingredients. Reduce heat to medium-low; simmer until most of broth is absorbed, about 5 minutes. Transfer to dish. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cool slightly; cover and chill. Let stand at room temperature 1 hour before baking.

Melt butter in large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add panko; sauté until golden, about 3 minutes. Remove from heat; cool to room temperature. Stir Pecorino, parsley, and peel into panko. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Store airtight in refrigerator.
Preheat oven to 218°C. Sprinkle panko mixture over fennel. Bake until gratin is heated through and topping is deep golden, about 20 minutes. Serve warm.

name: Fennel Gratin With Walnut-thyme Breadcrumbs
instructions: Place rack in upper third of oven; preheat to 400°. Place fennel, onion, cream, butter, and 1 Tbsp. thyme in a large bowl. Season with salt and pepper and toss to combine. Transfer to an 8x8" baking dish; bake until fennel is crisp-tender and cream is reduced by half, 30–35 minutes.

While fennel is baking, combine breadcrumbs, walnuts, and oil in a medium bowl. Season with salt and pepper and toss until bread is evenly saturated and walnuts are coated. Add Parmesan and remaining 1 Tbsp. thyme and toss again to combine.
Scatter breadcrumb mixture evenly over gratin and bake until breadcrumbs and walnuts are deep golden brown and fennel is tender, 12–15 minutes. Let cool slightly before serving.

name: Fennel Potlikker

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions:
Heat oil in a large pot over medium. Add onion, fennel, celery, and salt; cook, stirring often, until vegetables are translucent, about 4 minutes. Add Pernod and red pepper flakes; cook, stirring, until Pernod is evaporated, about 1 minute. Pour in 5 cups water and bring to a simmer. Reduce heat to medium-low and cook 45 minutes. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a medium heatproof bowl; discard solids.
Do Ahead: Potlikker can be made 5 days ahead. Let cool. Transfer to an airtight container and chill, or freeze up to 3 months.

name: Fennel Salad
instructions: To make the dressing: Whisk together sugar, vinegar, oil, basil, salt, and pepper in a small bowl until sugar dissolves.
To make the salad: Toss salad greens, orange sections, fennel, onion, almonds, and cranberries together in a large bowl.
Pour dressing over salad and toss to combine.

name: Fennel Salad Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 adet portakal veya 1/2 adet greyfurt (soyulmuş ve dilimlenmiş)
1 yemek kaşığı limon suyu veya narenciye suyu
20 gr kavrulmuş ceviz veya badem (isteğe bağlı)
1 tatlı kaşığı bal veya akçaağaç şurubu (isteğe bağlı)
Rezene yerine kıyılmış kereviz sapı veya ince dilimlenmiş salatalık kullanabilirsiniz; ferahlatıcı bir dokunuş sağlar.
Hafif tatlı ve aromatik bir seçenek için taze roka veya mizuna ekleyebilirsiniz.
Portakal yerine mandalina, greyfurt veya lime kullanabilirsiniz.
Tropikal bir aroma için mango veya ananas dilimleri ekleyerek farklı bir tat elde edebilirsiniz.
Ceviz yerine badem, fındık veya kaju kullanabilirsiniz.
Daha çıtır ve aromatik bir sonuç için kuruyemişleri hafifçe kavurabilirsiniz.
Limon suyu yerine nar ekşisi veya balsamik sirke ile farklı bir aroma katabilirsiniz.
Bal yerine akçaağaç şurubu veya agave şurubu kullanılabilir.
Zeytinyağı yerine susam yağı veya avokado yağı ile daha farklı bir tat profili elde edebilirsiniz.
Roka yerine marul, kıvırcık veya karışık yeşillik tercih edebilirsiniz.
Soğan yerine taze kırmızı soğan, pırasa veya yeşil soğan ekleyerek aromayı zenginleştirebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Rezene ve kırmızı soğanı ince dilimleyin.
2.  Portakal veya greyfurt dilimlerini ayırın.
3. Roka veya karışık yeşillikleri geniş bir salata kasesine alın.
4.  Üzerine rezene ve narenciye dilimlerini ekleyin.
5. Zeytinyağı, limon suyu, tuz, karabiber ve isteğe bağlı balı karıştırarak sos hazırlayın.
6. Sosu salatanın üzerine gezdirin, hafifçe karıştırın.
7. Kavrulmuş ceviz veya badem ile servis edin.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Fennel Salad With Plums

ingredients.item: Champagne vinegar or white wine vinegar

instructions: Remove stalks and fronds from fennel bulbs. Cut fennel bulbs in half lengthwise and thinly slice on a mandoline; place in a large bowl. Remove fronds from stalks and set aside. Thinly slice stalks and add to bowl along with plums, vinegar, and 2 Tbsp. oil. Season with salt and pepper and toss well. Let salad sit 5 minutes.
Coarsely chop reserved fennel fronds; scatter over salad. Drizzle with more oil.

name: Fennel Salad With Walnuts And Croutons

ingredients.item: . sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar

instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Place 2 cups coarsely torn sourdough bread on one side of a rimmed baking sheet and ½ cup walnuts or pecans on the other side (they cook at different rates). Drizzle bread with 3 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil; season with kosher salt. Toss, squeezing bread with your hands to help it absorb as much oil as possible, until evenly coated. Bake until nuts are golden brown and croutons are deeply browned and very crisp, 8–10 minutes for nuts, 12–15 minutes for croutons. Let cool, then coarsely chop nuts.

Meanwhile, combine 3 Tbsp. sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar, 1 garlic clove, finely grated, and ¼ tsp. crushed red pepper flakes in a medium bowl. Let sit 10 minutes to let garlic mellow and flavor the vinegar.

Whisk 3 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil into vinegar mixture, then add croutons and chopped nuts. Season crouton mixture with some kosher salt and toss to coat and let croutons soften slightly; set aside.

Remove stalks and fronds from 2 fennel bulbs. Remove fronds from stalks and coarsely chop; thinly slice stalks. Place in a large bowl. Cut fennel bulbs in half and thinly slice on a mandoline (if you have one; if not, practice your knife skills). Add to same bowl along with ¾ cup torn fresh mint leaves. Zest ½ lemon over salad, then squeeze in juice. Season with kosher salt and toss to combine.

Divide reserved crouton mixture among plates and top with 1 oz. Parmesan, shaved. Arrange fennel salad over; top with remaining 1 oz. Parmesan, shaved, and drizzle with extra-virgin olive oil.


Editor’s note: This fennel salad recipe was first printed in our April 2018 issue. Head this way for more great Thanksgiving salads →

name: Fennel Seed And Orange Peel Bread

ingredients.item: Warm water (100 degrees f (38 degrees c))

instructions: Pour scalded milk over honey, maple syrup, and salt in a large bowl. Let cool to lukewarm, 2 to 3 minutes.

Soften yeast in warm water in a bowl until frothy, about 5 minutes. Combine with milk mixture. Beat in 2 cups flour, orange zest, and fennel seeds using an electric mixer. Blend in butter. Stir in 5 cups flour to make a soft dough.

Sprinkle last 1/2 cup flour on a board; turn dough onto floured board and knead until smooth, about 5 minutes. Place dough in a greased bowl; turn dough over to grease top. Cover and let rise in a warm place until doubled in size, about 1 1/2 hours.
Punch dough down and divide in half. Shape loaves. Place in 2 lightly greased bread pans. Cover and let rise until almost doubled in size, about 45 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Brush tops of loaves with egg white.
Bake loaves in the preheated oven until a toothpick or knife inserted into the center of a loaf comes out clean, about 45 minutes.

name: Fennel Seed Spiked Pork Roast
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C).

Toast fennel seeds, rosemary, thyme, and peppercorns in a heavy skillet over medium-low heat until fragrant and fennel seeds are lightly browned, 1 to 3 minutes; do not let burn. Place toasted fennel seeds mixture, garlic, ouzo, and salt into a mortar and pestle or a spice grinder; grind to a paste. Score pork roast fat layer with a sharp knife; rub spice paste all over roast.
Spread onions and fennel in a large roasting pan; add enough water just to cover vegetables. Place roast on onions and fennel, fat-layer up.

Roast in the preheated oven until pork is tender, 5 to 6 hours (about 40 minutes per pound). An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read 85°C (85 degrees C). Add extra water if needed during roasting to prevent onions and fennel from burning.

name: Fennel Seed-salt Rub
instructions: Toast fennel seeds in a small heavy dry skillet over medium heat, shaking skillet often, until fragrant, 1-2 minutes. Let cool. Finely grind fennel seeds and whole black peppercorns in a spice mill; transfer to a small bowl. Stir in kosher salt and cayenne pepper. DO AHEAD: Can be made 1 month ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

name: Fennel Soda Bread
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 10 inch round cake pan.

In a large bowl, stir together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, sugar, and fennel seed. In another bowl, stir together the eggs, buttermilk, and melted butter. Stir the wet ingredients into the flour mixture, until just blended using a large spoon. Spoon the batter into the prepared pan. Dot with the 3 tablespoons of chilled butter.
Bake for about 1 hour in the preheated oven, or until puffed and golden. Cut into wedges and serve warm.

name: Fennel Soup
instructions: 1. Zeytinyağını ve tereyağını tencerede ısıtın.
2.  Soğanı ekleyin, yumuşayana kadar kavurun.
3.  Rezeneyi, patatesi ve yeşil elmayı ilave edip birkaç dakika daha kavurun.
4.  Sarı mercimek ile sıcak suyu ekleyin.
5.  Orta ateşte, yarım saat pişirip ocaktan alın.
6.  Tuzunu ve karabiberini ilave edip blender’da iyice ezin.
7.  Tekrar ocağın üzerine alın.
8.  Birkaç taşım daha kaynattıktan sonra ocaktan alın ve sıcak servis yapın.

name: Fennel, Avocado, And Clementine Salad With Arugula And Mint

ingredients.prep: trimmed, quartered vertically, cored, sliced paper-thin (2 1/3 to 2 1/2 cups)

instructions: Combine clementine juice, lemon juice, clementine peel, and sugar in medium bowl. Slowly whisk in olive oil. Season to taste with salt and coarsely ground black pepper.

Peel clementines, separate into segments, and place in medium bowl. Add fennel, avocado, and mint. Toss with enough vinaigrette to coat. Season fennel mixture to taste with salt and coarsely ground black pepper.
Toss arugula with 1 tablespoon olive oil in another medium bowl. Season to taste with salt and coarsely ground black pepper.
Arrange fennel mixture on serving platter, top with arugula, and drizzle with additional olive oil. Season to taste with coarsely ground black pepper.

name: Fennel, Celery, And Pomegranate Salad

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Toss fennel, celery, shallot, parsley, celery leaves, if using, and half of pomegranate seeds in a large bowl.
Drizzle with lime juice and oil and toss to coat; season with salt and pepper.
Serve topped with remaining pomegranate seeds.

name: Fennel, Chile, And Maple Dry Brine

ingredients.item: Maple sugar or 3 tbsp. brown sugar

instructions: Toast star anise and fennel seeds in a small skillet over medium heat, stirring often, until fragrant, about 2 minutes. Transfer to a food processor; add salt, maple sugar, thyme, and red pepper flakes and pulse to blend, about 30 seconds.
DO AHEAD: Dry brine can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.

name: Fennel, Chile, And Maple Dry-brined Turkey

ingredients.item: Maple sugar or 3 tbsp. light brown sugar

instructions: Toast star anise and fennel seeds in a small skillet over medium heat, stirring often, until fragrant, about 2 minutes. Transfer to a food processor; add salt, maple sugar, thyme, and red pepper flakes and pulse to blend, about 30 seconds.
DO AHEAD: Dry brine can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.
Rub dry brine all over turkey; chill uncovered, 6–7 hours.

Preheat oven to 425°. Rinse turkey clean under cold water; pat dry and place, breast side up, on a rack set in a large roasting pan. Stuff turkey with onion, garlic, and herbs. Working from neck end of turkey, gently loosen skin from breasts and rub butter under skin and all over outside of bird. Tie legs together with kitchen twine, pour broth into pan, and roast turkey 30 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 325° and roast, basting with pan juices every 30–40 minutes, adding more broth as needed to maintain some liquid in pan, and tenting with foil if skin is browning too quickly, until an instant-read thermometer inserted into thickest part of thigh registers 165°, 2½–3 hours.
Transfer turkey to a platter; tent with foil. Let rest at least 30 minutes before carving.

name: Fennel- And Coriander-spiced Salmon Fillets
instructions: Prepare barbecue for high heat.
Coarsely grind fennel seeds and coriander seeds in a spice grinder.
Brush salmon fillets generously with extra-virgin olive oil.
Sprinkle both sides of the fillets with salt and pepper, then with the ground spice mixture, pressing gently to ensure adherence.
Grill salmon, covered, until the center is just opaque, about 4 minutes per side.

name: Fennel-celery Salad With Blue Cheese And Walnuts

ingredients.item: Sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast walnuts on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until golden brown, 5–8 minutes; let cool.

Finely chop 1 shallot half, then thinly slice the other half crosswise; set sliced shallot aside. Combine chopped shallot, mustard, sugar, and ¼ cup vinegar in a resealable jar. Add oil and season with salt and pepper. Cover and shake to emulsify; set vinaigrette aside.
Toss figs, reserved sliced shallot, and remaining ¼ cup vinegar in a small bowl; let sit until figs and shallots are softened, at least 30 minutes.

Just before serving, toss fennel, celery, blue cheese, and toasted walnuts in a large bowl. Drain figs and shallot and add to bowl. Drizzle with vinaigrette and toss to coat; season with salt and pepper.

Do Ahead: Vinaigrette can be made 1 day ahead; cover and chill. Figs and shallot can be soaked 4 hours ahead; store covered at room temperature. Fennel and celery can be sliced 4 hours ahead; place in a large bowl. Cover with a damp paper towel and chill.

name: Fennel-crusted Ahi Tuna With Lemon Aïoli Over Couscous
instructions: Combine first 3 ingredients in heavy small skillet. Toast over medium heat until fragrant, shaking skillet occasionally, about 3 minutes. Grind spice mixture in spice grinder. Transfer to bowl; mix in 1 teaspoon salt.
Whisk mayonnaise, lemon juice, chives, and half of garlic in small bowl. (Can be made 2 days ahead. Store spice mixture airtight at room temperature. Cover and refrigerate lemon aioli.)

Heat 2 tablespoons oil in heavy large skillet over medium-high heat. Add carrot and onion and sauté until crisp-tender, about 3 minutes. Add thyme and remaining garlic and sauté 1 minute. Add 2 1/4 cups water and remaining 1/2 teaspoon salt; bring to boil. Add sugar snap peas and cook until crisp-tender, about 1 minute. Using slotted spoon, transfer peas to plate. Immediately add couscous to water in skillet and stir to combine. Cover and remove from heat. Let stand 5 minutes. Fluff couscous with fork. Transfer to bowl and cool completely. Mix in sugar snap peas and dill. Season to taste with pepper. (Couscous can be made 2 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature.)

Prepare barbecue (high heat). Coat tuna with 6 tablespoons oil. Sprinkle with spice mixture. Grill tuna until seared outside and rare in center, about 4 minutes per side. Refrigerate uncovered for 1 hour, then cut into 1/2-inch-thick slices. Spoon couscous onto plates. Top with tuna and drizzle with lemon aioli.

name: Fennel-crusted Pork Chops With Potatoes And Shallots

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: cut into quarters with some root attached

instructions: Preheat oven to 450°. Toast fennel seeds in a small dry skillet over medium heat, tossing often, until fragrant, about 4 minutes. Let cool.

Combine fennel seeds, garlic, paprika, and 2 Tbsp. oil in a small bowl. Season pork with salt and pepper and place in a resealable plastic bag. Add spice mixture; seal bag and turn to coat. Let sit at least 30 minutes.

Heat remaining 1 Tbsp. oil in a large ovenproof skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium-high heat. Cook pork chops until golden brown on 1 side, about 4 minutes; turn. Add potatoes and shallots to skillet; season with salt and pepper and toss to coat in pan drippings. Cook, tossing potatoes and shallots occasionally, until pork is golden brown on second side, about 4 minutes.

Transfer to oven and roast until potatoes are tender and an instant-read thermometer inserted into thickest part of chops registers 135°, 10–15 minutes. (If potatoes need more time, transfer chops to a plate and continue to roast potatoes until tender; transfer chops back to skillet when potatoes are done.) Remove skillet from oven and mix in parsley and vinegar. Let pork chops rest 5 minutes in skillet.
Transfer chops to a cutting board; cut meat from bones and slice against the grain. Serve with potatoes, shallots, and any pan juices.
Do Ahead: Pork chops can be marinated 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.

name: Fennel-honey Granola
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast pine nuts, sunflower seeds, almonds, sesame seeds, and fennel seeds on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing occasionally, until lightly golden, 5–7 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 275°.

Meanwhile, whisk honey, peanut butter, oil, orange zest and juice, and vanilla in a medium bowl until smooth. Toss nuts and seeds, oats, and salt in a large bowl. Pour honey mixture over and gently mix until oat mixture is completely coated.

Spread out on a parchment-lined rimmed baking sheet and bake, stirring halfway through (edges will take on color before center does), until golden brown, 20–25 minutes. Let cool; granola will crisp as it cools. Break up into pieces, then stir in apricots and cranberries.
Do Ahead: Granola can be made 1 week ahead. Store tightly covered at room temperature.

name: Fennel-rubbed Chick-etta
