Pour 1½ cups water into same baking sheet, then cover tightly with more foil. Bake on middle rack until meat is very tender and bones are exposed, 1½–2 hours.

Heat broiler. Carefully uncover ribs and brush on both sides
with half of glaze. Broil ribs, meat side up, on upper rack until lacquered and lightly
charred in spots, about 4 minutes. Brush remaining glaze over, then transfer ribs to a
cutting board.

To serve, cut between bones to form individual riblets and arrange on a platter.
Do ahead: Glaze can be made 3 days ahead. Let cool; cover and chill. Reheat before using.

name: Fig And Orange Cake
instructions: Peneire a farinha integral e de trigo para uma tigela e junte o fermento. Deite os ovos para outra tigela e bata, junte o óleo, o sumo, a raspa de laranja e o açúcar e misture. Adicione a mistura das farinhas e envolva, junte os figos picados e mexa até os ingredientes ficarem bem misturados.

Forre uma forma redonda de 20 cm com papel vegetal e unte-a com manteiga. Verta a massa para a forma e leve ao forno pré-aquecido a 180ºc durante cerca de 35 minutos. Verifique a cozedura com um palito, retire do forno, desenforme e deixe arrefecer. Polvilhe com açúcar em pó e sirva decorado a gosto.

name: Fig And Rosemary Cranberry Sauce
instructions: Bring water, brown sugar, and maple extract to a boil in a non-reactive saucepan. Add cranberries and figs. Cook over medium heat, stirring frequently, until slightly thickened, about 5 minutes. Add rosemary and cook until sauce is thickened, about 5 minutes more.
Carefully remove rosemary sprig and discard. Remove pot from the burner and let cool, about 10 minutes. Pour sauce into a bowl and refrigerate until ready to serve.

name: Fig And Thyme Jam
instructions: Place sorghum syrup in a medium saucepan. Bring to a simmer over medium heat. Add orange zest, thyme sprigs, and pinch of salt. Simmer sorghum mixture for 1 minute. Add figs. Continue to simmer, gently stirring occasionally, until figs are soft but still hold their shape, 5-10 minutes, depending on firmness of figs. Let jam cool. DO AHEAD: Jam can be made 2 weeks ahead. Transfer to a jar. Cover and chill.

name: Fig And Walnut Bostock
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast walnuts on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing occasionally, until fragrant, 8–10 minutes; let cool. Pulse in a food processor until finely ground.
Using an electric mixer on high speed, beat butter and honey until light and fluffy, about 4 minutes. Mix in egg, then flour, baking powder, salt, and walnuts just to blend.
DO AHEAD: Walnut crème can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.

Preheat oven to 350°. Whisk eggs and 1 tsp. water in a small bowl and brush 1 side of brioche slices with egg wash. Place on a rimmed baking sheet and spread each slice with about 2 Tbsp. walnut crème. Top with figs, cut sides up. Brush figs with butter and drizzle with honey.
Bake bostock until edges are golden brown and figs look softened and juicy, 20–25 minutes. Transfer baking sheet to a wire rack and let bostock cool.
Dust with powdered sugar just before serving.

name: Fig And Walnut Sweets
instructions: Retire o pé aos figos secos, deite-os numa picadora ou robot de cozinha, adicione a aguardente e triture tudo muito bem, até obter uma pasta.
Unte as mãos com óleo e molde bolinhas com a massa anterior. Coloque uma metade de noz pecan sobre cada uma e leve ao frio até servir.

name: Fig Baton Cake
instructions: 1. İncirleri yıkayın.
2.  Küp doğrayarak bir kaseye alın.
3.  Şeker ve yumurtayı çırpma kabına alın, karışımı şeker tamamen eriyene kadar mikserle çırpın.
4.  Çırpt��ğınız yumurtalara yoğurt ve zeytinyağını ekleyerek çırpmaya devam edin.
5.  Unu, kakaoyu ve vanilya ekleyerek akıcı bir hamur elde edene kadar karıştırın.
6.  En son kabartma tozunu ekleyin ve 1 dakika daha karıştırın.
7.  Doğradığınız incirleri kek karışımına ekleyin ve kaşık yardımıyla iyice karıştırın.
8.  Baton bir kek kalıbını yağlayıp hamuru kalıba dökün.
9.  Önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında yaklaşık 45-50 dakika pişirin.
10.  Pişen kekinizi tamamen soğuduktan sonra kalıptan çıkartın.
11.  İyice soğuduktan sonra dilimleyerek servis yapın.

name: Fig Bread Kadayıf

ingredients.item: 2-3 yemek kaşığı file badem veya file antep fıstığı

instructions: 1. Tam kıvamında incirli ekmek kadayıfı tarifimiz.
4. Yumurtaları toz şekerle birlikte iyice çırpın.
5.  Sütü, unu, kabartma tozunu ve vanilyayı ilave edip birkaç dakika daha çırpın.
6.  Hazırladığınız hamuru yağlı kağıt serilmiş orta boy, kare fırın kabına dökün.
7.  Önceden ısıtılmış 175 derece fırında 30-35 dakika pişirin.
8.  Şerbeti için, toz şekeri tencereye alın.
9.  Orta ateşte, koyu karamel rengini alana dek eritin.
10.  Şeker eriyince sıcak suyu ilave edin.
11.  Sıvı ve homojen bir kıvam olunca ocaktan alın.
12.  Muhallebisi içini toz şekeri, unu, sütü başka bir tencereye alın.
13.  Orta ateşte, sürekli karıştırarak muhallebi kıvamına gelene kadar pişirin.
14.  Vanilya ile rendelenmiş Hindistan cevizini ekleyip birkaç taşım daha kaynattıktan sonra ocaktan alın.
15.  Arada bir çırpma teliyle karıştırarak kabuk bağlamadan ılınmasını sağlayın.
16.  Fırında pişirdiğiniz ekmek hamuru soğuyunca tırtıklı bir bıçak yardımı ile enine ikiye keserek 2 dilim elde edin.
17.  Bir dilimini tekrar fırın kabının içine veya aynı boyutlarda kelepçeli bir kalıbın içine yerleştirin.
18.  Üzerine ılık şerbetin 1/3’ünü kepçe yardımı ile dökün.
19.  Şerbeti birkaç dakika kadar emince üzerine hazırladığınız muhallebinin yarısını dökün.
20.  Üzerine diğer katı yerleştirip, kalan şerbeti dökün.
21.  10 dakika bu şekilde bekletin.
22.  En son kalan muhallebiyi dökün, mini kayık şeklinde kestiğiniz incirleri de dekoratif bir şekilde muhallebinin üzerine dizin.
23.  En son kalan şerbetinden 1-2 yemek kaşığı kadar döküp, file badem veya file Antep fıstığı serpin.
24.  Buzdolabında birkaç saat beklettikten sonra dilimleyip servis yapın.
25. Çok sevilen klasik ekmek kadayıfı tarifine buradan ulaşabilirsiniz.

name: Fig Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Coat a 12-cup fluted tube pan (such as Bundt) with cooking spray.
Beat sugar and eggs in a large bowl with an electric mixer until sugar dissolves; stir in oil. Add milk; mix well.
Combine flour, cinnamon, baking soda, and salt in a separate bowl; beat into egg mixture until blended. Fold in fig preserves and pecan pieces until incorporated. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into center comes out clean, about 1 hour. Cool in the pan for 10 minutes, then invert onto a wire rack to cool completely before slicing.

name: Fig Cake (sykomelo)
instructions: Διαλέγουμε ώριμα σύκα , όχι λιωμένα. Τα πλένουμε πολύ καλά και τα κόβουμε στη μέση.
Βάζουμε τα σύκα σε κατσαρόλα και τα σκεπάζουμε με νερό, ώστε να τα καλύπτει.
Αφήνουμε να πάρουν βράση σε μέτρια φωτιά. Βράζουμε για περίπου 25 λεπτά, μέχρι να μαλακώσουν πολύ καλά τα σύκα και η φλούδα τους.
Πολτοποιούμε το μείγμα.
Σουρώνουμε τον πολτό μέσα από τουλπάνι ή λεπτή σίτα, πιέζοντας καλά για να πάρουμε όλο το υγρό.
Ξαναβάζουμε το σουρωμένο υγρό στην κατσαρόλα.
Αφήνουμε να βράσει σε χαμηλή φωτιά, μέχρι να πυκνώσει και να πάρει υφή ρευστού μελιού. Μη σας ανησυχεί αν το υγρό είναι αρχικά θολό — καθώς δένει, θα γίνει διάφανο και γυαλιστερό.
Είναι έτοιμο όταν αρχίσουν να εμφανίζονται χοντρές φουσκάλες.
Αφήνουμε το συκόμελο να κρυώσει.
Το βάζουμε σε αποστειρωμένο μπουκάλι.
Βγαίνει περίπου 1/2 λίτρο πετιμέζι σύκου.
Σφραγίζουμε καλά και φυλάσσουμε σε σκιερό, δροσερό μέρος ή στο ψυγείο.

name: Fig Cake, Traditional In The Oven Or In The Air Fryer
original_name: Bizcocho de higos, tradicional al horno o en freidora de aire

ingredients.item: 2 vasitos (con la medida del yogur) de azúcar (unos 200 g)
1 vasito de aceite de girasol o de oliva suave (unos 120 ml)
1 cucharadita de esencia de vainilla o ralladura de limón
Mantequilla y azúcar moreno para el molde

instructions: Engrasamos un molde rectangular (30×20 cm) con mantequilla y espolvoreamos azúcar moreno en la base.
Lavamos los higos y los partimos por la mitad.
Los colocamos en el molde con el corte hacia abajo, cubriendo todo el fondo.
En un bol, echamos el yogur y usamos el vasito como medida. Añadimos dos vasitos de azúcar y batimos.
Añadimos tres huevos, y batimos hasta que la mezcla quede espumosa.
Vertemos un vasito de aceite y la vainilla o ralladura, y mezclamos bien.
Incorporamos tres vasitos de harina, la levadura y la pizca de sal, removiendo con suavidad hasta obtener una masa lisa.
Vertemos la mezcla sobre los higos y nivelamos la superficie.
Horneamos a 180 ºC (calor arriba y abajo) durante unos 40 minutos, hasta que el palillo salga limpio.
Dejamos enfriar unos 10 minutos y desmoldamos al revés, para que los higos queden arriba con su jugo caramelizado.

name: Fig Candy Step By Step
original_name: Dulce de higos paso a paso
instructions: Lave bien los higos, bajo el chorro de agua y si es posible páseles un cepillito suave.
Haga una incisión o corte en forma de cruz en la parte superior,  la parte angosta de cada higo.
Ponga los higos en un recipiente y cúbralos con agua, déjelos remojar durante un día entero.

Cierna los higos y póngalos en una olla, cúbralos con agua, aproximadamente 8 tazas de agua. Añada la pizca de bicarbonato y haga hervir el agua con los higos, cocínelos durante 15 a 20 minutos o hasta que estén suaves.
Deje los higos en el agua en el que se cocinaron durante otro día entero.
Al día siguiente cierna el agua y escurra cada higo, con delicadeza,  hasta sacarle la mayor cantidad de agua.

Ponga la panela o piloncillo y las especias en una olla de buen tamaño, agregue 6 tazas de agua y cocínela a fuego lento hasta que la panela este completamente disuelta y se empiece a convertir en miel.
Añada los higos y siga cocinando a fuego lento hasta que la miel esté espesa, aproximadamente unas 2 a 3 horas.
Sirva los higos, calientes o fríos,  acompañados con rodajas o tajadas de quesillo o queso.

name: Fig Caprese Salad
instructions: Tear mozzarella into medium pieces and arrange on a platter. Tuck figs around cheese and scatter basil over top. Season with pepper and lots of salt. Drizzle generously with oil.

name: Fig Cheesecake
instructions: 1. İrili ufaklı parçalara ayırdığınız bisküvileri mutfak robotunda ufalayın.
2.  Tereyağını eritip bisküvilere ekleyin ve karıştırın.
3.  22 santimlik kelepçeli kalıbın tabanına yağlı kağıt serin.
4.  Kenarlarını hafifçe yağlayın ve bisküviyi tabana bastırarak yayın.
5.  Buzluğa koyup donmasını sağlayın.
6.  Diğer yanda fırını 170 dereceye ayarlayın.
7.  Derin bir kaseye süzme yoğurt, labne peyniri ve toz şekeri alıp çırpın.
8.  Vanilya, un ve yumurtayı ekleyerek birkaç dakika daha çırpın.
9.  Karışımı bisküvi tabanının üzerine yayın.
10.  Önceden ısıtılmış fırında 25-30 dakika kadar pişirin.
11.  Fırın soğuyana kadar fırından çıkarmayın.
12.  Bir sos tenceresinde kremayı ısıtın ve çikolata parçalarını ekleyin.
13.  Eriyene kadar karıştırıp ocaktan alın.
14.  Ilındıktan sonra mikserle hafifçe çırpın ve cheesecake’in üzerine yayın.
15.  İncir dilimleri ile süsleyin.
16.  Servis yapın.

name: Fig Chocolate Mousse
instructions: 1. Çikolatayı benmari usulü eritin.
2.  Ocaktan alıp soğumaya bırakın.
3.  Yumurta sarılarını bir kasede çırpıp kenara alın.
4.  Küçük bir sos tenceresinde süt ve toz şekeri sürekli karıştırarak pişirin.
5.  Kaynamaya başlayınca ocaktan alıp ılınmaya bırakın.
6.  Ilınan sütü azar azar yumurta sarılarının üzerine ekleyerek bir çırpıcı yardımıyla çırpın.
7.  Eriyen çikolatayı da sütlü karışıma ekleyerek çırpmaya devam edin.
8.  Yumurta beyazlarını ayrı bir kapta çırpıp, sürekli karıştırarak benmari usulü pişirin.
9.  Yumurta beyazları ısınmaya başlayınca benmariden alıp bir tutam kadar tuz ilave edin.
10.  Çırpıcı yardımıyla yumurta beyazları iyice kabarana kadar çırpmaya devam edin.
11.  Yumurta beyazlarının 1/3’ünü çikolatalı karışıma ekleyip iyice karıştırın.
12.  Kalan kısmını da ekleyin ve bütün malzeme iyice özdeşleşene kadar hafif hafif karıştırın.
13.  Ayrı bir kasede kremayı iyice çırpın ve çikolatalı karışıma ekleyin.
14.  Karışımı servis kaplarına paylaştırın.
15.  Buzdolabında 2 saat dinlendirin.
16.  Üzeri için, yıkayıp süzdüğünüz incirleri dörde bölün ve bir tavaya alın.
17.  Üzerlerine toz şeker serpip 7-8 dakika pişirin.
18.  Ocaktan alıp soğumaya bırakın.
19.  Dinlenen musların üzerini soğuyan incirler ve iri kırılmış ceviz ile süsleyerek servis yapın.
20.  Afiyet olsun.
21. Muzla süslenen pratik çikolatalı mus tarifini de deneyebilirsiniz.

name: Fig Clafoutis Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 çay bardağı krema (isteğe bağlı, yerine 1/2 su bardağı süt eklenebilir)

instructions: 1. Fırını 180 dereceye (alt-üst ayar) ısıtın.
2.  Kalıbınızı tereyağı ile güzelce yağlayın.
3.  (28 cm çapında bir tart kalıbı ya da borcam uygundur.
4. ) İncirleri yıkayıp kurulayın.
5.  Saplarını kesip ortadan ikiye bölün.
6.  Yumurtaları ve şekeri geniş bir kapta çırpın.
7.  Vanilyayı ekleyin.
8.  Süt ve kremayı ekleyip karıştırın.
9.  Elenmiş unu ve bir tutam tuzu ilave edip pürüzsüz, akışkan bir hamur elde edin.
10.  Bu hamuru yağlanmış fırın kabına dökün.
11.  Kestiğiniz incirleri, kesik yüzeyleri yukarı gelecek şekilde hamurun üzerine güzelce dizin.
12.  Önceden ısıtılmış fırında 35–40 dakika, üzeri altın sarısı olana ve kabarana kadar pişirin.
13.  Fırından çıkarıp ilk sıcaklığı geçince servis edin.

name: Fig Compote
instructions: Retire a pele aos figos e esmague a polpa. Coloque num tacho, junte a água e o açúcar e leve ao lume. Deixe ferver, mexendo de vez em quando, até obter a textura de compota.
Coloque a compota em frascos esterilizados, feche-os e vire-os ao contrário, até arrefecerem. Guarde em local escuro e seco.

name: Fig Custard Cake
instructions: 1. Oda ısısındaki yumurtaları derin bir kaba kırın.
2.  Şekeri ekleyip mikserle 4-5 dakika çırpın.
3.  Un, ceviz içi, kabartma tozu ve tavla zarı şeklinde doğranmış incirleri ilave edip kaşıkla karıştırın.
4.  25-30 santim çapında içi yağlanmış yuvarlak bir cam kaba hazırladığınız kek hamurunu aktarın.
5.  Kek harcını önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında 40 dakika pişirin.
6.  Keki fırından alıp sıcak olacak şekilde saklayın.
7.  Granül kahve ve toz şekeri ılık suya aktarıp karıştırarak eritin ve sıcak kekin üzerine gezdirin.
8.  Muhallebi için, nişasta, un ve şekeri bir tencereye aktarıp sütü de azar azar ekleyin ve tel çırpıcı yardımıyla çırpın.
9.  Orta ısılı ateşte, sürekli karıştırarak koyulaşıp muhallebi kıvamına gelinceye kadar pişirin.
10.  Kremayı da ilave edip mikserle 7-8 dakika çırpın.
11.  Muhallebiyi kekin üzerine gezdirip buzdolabında bir gece bekletin.
12.  Cevizle süsleyerek servise yapın.

name: Fig Dessert
instructions: 1. İlk olarak kuru incirleri iyice yıkayıp sap kısmından kesin.
2.  Üzerlerini biraz geçecek şekilde su ekleyin ve bir tencereye alıp kaynatın.
3. Suyu çekip yumuşayana kadar 8 saat tencerede bekletin.
4.  Her bir incirin tepe kısmından cevizleri doldurup fırın tepsisine dizin.
5. İncirleri beklettiğiniz suyun kalanını tepsiye ilave edin.
6.  175 dereceye ayarlı fırında incirler hafif koyu renk alana ve suyunu çekene kadar pişirin.
7.  Şimdiden afiyet olsun.

name: Fig Dessert Recipe In 15 Minutes

ingredients.item: 500 gr kuru incir (önceden ılık suda bekletilip yumuşatılmış)
Küçük küpler halinde doğranmış tereyağı (tatlıya parlaklık vermesi için)
Toz şeker yerine bal veya pekmez kullanarak tatlıya daha doğal ve farklı bir aroma katabilirsiniz.
Tatlıya hafif bir koku vermek için pişirme aşamasında bir çubuk tarçın veya birkaç karanfil ekleyebilirsiniz.
Tereyağı yerine az miktarda hindistancevizi yağı kullanarak farklı bir lezzet elde edebilirsiniz.
Tatlıyı servis ederken üzerine dövülmüş ceviz, fındık veya antep fıstığı serpiştirerek daha zengin bir sunum hazırlayabilirsiniz.
İncirlerin arasına küçük parçalar halinde ceviz veya badem yerleştirerek tatlıyı daha doyurucu hale getirebilirsiniz.
Şerbetine birkaç damla limon suyu eklemek tatlının şeker dengesini daha hoş bir hale getirebilir.
Servis sırasında üzerine kaymak veya vanilyalı dondurma ekleyerek tatlıyı daha özel bir sunuma dönüştürebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Öncelikle ılık suda bekletip yumuşattığınız incirleri bir fırın kabına yerleştirin.
2. Üzerine toz şekeri ve suyu ekleyin.
3.  Ardından küçük parçalara ayırdığınız tereyağını incirlerin üzerine serpiştirin.
4. Fırını 170°C’ye ayarlayıp kabı fırına verin.
5.  İncirler yumuşayıp şerbeti koyulaşana ve üzerleri hafif parlak bir görünüm alana kadar pişirin.
6. Fırından çıkardıktan sonra biraz dinlendirip servis edebilirsiniz.
7.  İsterseniz yanında kaymak veya bir top dondurma ile sunabilirsiniz.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Fig Dessert With Walnuts
instructions: 1. Bir gece önceden ıslatılan incirleri bol suda hafifçe haşlayın.
2.  Saplarını çıkardıktan sonra şeker ekleyerek tatlıkıvamına gelene kadar pişirin.
3. Soğuduktan sonra servis tabağına alıp ortalarına ceviz yerleştirin.
4.  Ilık servis yapın.
5. Detaylı anlatımı ile klasik incir tatlısına buradan ulaşabilirsiniz.

name: Fig Filled Cookies

ingredients.item: 1 su bardağı ince çekilmiş ceviz içi

instructions: 1. Kurabiye hamuru için gerekli malzemeleri derin bir kapta yoğurun.
2.  Üzerini örterek 30 dakika dinlendirin.
3.  Kuru incirleri ince olacak şekilde kıyın.
4.  Tencereye elma suyu, şeker ve inciri ekleyip orta ateşte kaynatın.
5.  Kaynamaya başlayınca ocağın altını kısın.
6.  Suyunu çekip koyulaşıncaya kadar pişirin.
7.  Ocaktan alıp üzerine ceviz içi ve tarçını ekleyip karıştırın ve soğumasını sağlayın.
8.  Hamuru merdane yardımıyla yarım parmak kalınlığında dikdörtgen şekilde açın.
9.  Hazırladığınız dikdörtgeni dörde bölün.
10.  Her dikdörtgenin üzerine incirli harcı sürün.
11.  Her iki tarafını ortada birleştirerek hamuru kapatın.
12.  Dilediğiniz ölçülerde kesin.
13.  Önceden ısıtılmış 160 dereceye ayarlı fırında pembeleşinceye kadar pişirin.
14.  Soğuduktan sonra servis yapın.

name: Fig Galette Recipe

ingredients.item: 70 gram (5 yemek kaşığı) soğuk tereyağı, küçük küpler halinde
1 yemek kaşığı mısır nişastası (incir suyunu çekmesi için)
1 adet yumurta (üzeri için, fırça ile sürmek için)
Tam buğday unu (daha besleyici ve yoğun aroma)
Yulaf unu (glutensiz değil ama daha hafif)
Soğuk hindistancevizi yağı (bitkisel ve hafif aroma verir)
Erik veya kırmızı erik (ekşi-tatlı dengesi için)
Bal veya akçaağaç şurubu (daha doğal tatlandırıcılar)
Anason veya kakule (değişik ve egzotik tatlar için)

instructions: 1. Un ve tuzu derin bir kapta karıştırın.
2.  Soğuk tereyağını ekleyip, parmak uçlarınızla tereyağı unla iyice karışana kadar ezin.
3. Buzlu suyu yavaş yavaş ekleyerek hamuru toparlayın.
4.  Hamur top haline geldiğinde streç filme sarıp buzdolabında 30 dakika dinlendirin.
5. Dinlenen hamuru unlanmış yüzeyde yaklaşık 25-30 cm çapında açın.
6. İnce dilimlenmiş incirleri bir kapta toz şeker, tarçın, limon suyu ve mısır nişastası ile karıştırın.
7. Hamurun ortasına incirli karışımı yerleştirin, kenarlarını içe doğru katlayarak galette şeklini verin.
8. Üzerine çırpılmış yumurta sürün.
9. Önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında 35-40 dakika, hamur altın sarısı ve iç malzeme yumuşayıncaya kadar pişirin.
10. Fırından çıktıktan sonra isteğe bağlı olarak bal veya pudra şekeri ile servis yapabilirsiniz.
11.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Fig Ice Cream
instructions: Soak figs in a bowl of water until softened, 3 to 4 hours. Drain figs and chop.

Combine chopped figs, 2 tablespoons sugar, and lemon juice in a medium pot over medium heat; cook and stir until sugar is dissolved and figs begin to break down, 4 to 5 minutes. Cool to room temperature, 15 to 20 minutes. Cover the pot with a lid; refrigerate.
Heat half-and-half in a heavy saucepan over medium-high heat until hot but not boiling, 5 to 6 minutes. Set aside.

Whisk ½ cup sugar, egg yolks, and salt in a large bowl until smooth; whisk in 1 to 2 tablespoons hot half-and-half, while continuously whisking, until egg mixture is slightly warmed. Pour egg mixture into remaining half-and-half in the saucepan; return to medium-low heat. Cook, whisking constantly, until custard is smooth and thickened, about 5 minutes.

Place saucepan with custard in the refrigerator, stirring occasionally, until chilled, about 30 minutes. Stir in sour cream and vanilla. Cover the saucepan; chill custard completely, at least 3 hours.

Pour custard into an ice cream maker and freeze according to manufacturer's instructions. Stir fig mixture into ice cream during the last 5 minutes of processing. Transfer fig ice cream to an airtight container and freeze until firm.

name: Fig Jam
instructions: Bring figs, water, sugar, cinnamon, allspice, and peppercorns to a boil in a saucepan over medium-high heat. Boil until figs begin to liquefy, about 10 minutes. Reduce heat and simmer, stirring frequently to break down the figs, until jam is slightly thickened, about 15 minutes more.
While jam is simmering, whisk lemon juice and agar-agar together. Set aside to gel.

Take jam off the heat and remove the cinnamon stick. Add the lemon mixture and mix well. Let cool slightly. Pour jam into a pint jar with a hermetic seal. Allow to cool completely before refrigerating.

name: Fig Jam Recipe

ingredients.item: Kuru incir (taze incir bulunmadığında, pişirme süresini biraz uzatabilirsiniz)
Siyah veya yeşil incir (farklı renk ve tat vermesi için)
Esmer şeker (daha karamelimsi bir tat için)
Bal (daha doğal ve hafif aromalı bir seçenek; kıvamı biraz daha akışkan olur)
Agave şurubu veya akçaağaç şurubu (düşük glisemik indeks isteyenler için)
Portakal suyu veya elma suyu (hafif meyvemsi aroma için)
Limon suyu yerine lime veya nar ekşisi (farklı tat ve renk)
Tereyağı yerine margarin veya hindistancevizi yağı (farklı aroma ve vegan alternatif)
Tarçın veya karanfil (soğuk kış günleri için baharatlı aroma)

instructions: 1. İncirlerin sap kısımlarını kesin ve yıkayın.
2.  Büyük incirleri ikiye veya dörde bölün.
3. Orta boy bir tencerede su ve şekeri kaynatın.
4.  Şeker tamamen eriyene kadar karıştırın.
5. İncirleri kaynayan şekerli suya ekleyin.
6.  Orta ateşte 20–25 dakika, incirler yumuşayıncaya kadar pişirin.
7. Limon suyunu ve tereyağını ekleyin, birkaç dakika daha kaynatın.
8.  Tereyağı reçelin fazla köpürmesini önler.
9. Reçelin kıvamını kontrol edin; bir tabağa damlattığınızda yavaş akıyorsa hazır demektir.
10. Sıcak reçeli sterilize edilmiş kavanozlara doldurun, kapağını kapatın ve soğumaya bırakın.
11.  Serin ve karanlık bir yerde muhafaza edin.

name: Fig Milk Dessert
instructions: 1. Süt, un, mısır nişastası, pudra şekeri ve şekerli vanilini tencereye alıp karıştırın.
2.  Orta ateşte muhallebi kıvamına gelene kadar pişirin.
3.  Koyulaştıktan sonra ocaktan alıp iri kırılmış beyaz çikolatayı ekleyin ve karıştırın.
4.  Silikon veya cam kaseleri ıslatın ve muhallebiyi paylaştırın.
5.  Oda ısısında soğuduktan sonra buzdolabında en az 3-4 saat dinlendirin.
6.  İnciri dilimleyin.
7.  Sos tenceresine inciri, suyu, pudra şekeri ve nişastayı alıp karıştırın.
8.  Koyulaştıktan sonra ocaktan alın.
9.  Tatlıyı tabağa ters çevirerek aktarın.
10.  Üzerine incirli sosu gezdirip servis yapın.

name: Fig Newtons
instructions: Whisk all-purpose and whole wheat flours, cardamom (if using), baking powder, and salt in a medium bowl. Using an electric mixer on medium-high speed, beat butter and brown sugar in a large bowl until light and fluffy, 3–4 minutes. Add yolks and beat until mixture is fluffy, about 2 minutes. Add honey, vanilla, and orange zest and beat until incorporated, about 1 minute. Reduce mixer speed to low and slowly add dry ingredients, beating just to blend (dough will be very soft). Divide dough into thirds and wrap each piece tightly in plastic, flattening into a ½" disk. Chill at least 3 hours.
Do Ahead: Dough can be made 3 days ahead. Keep chilled.

Cook figs, orange juice, honey, and salt in a large saucepan over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until figs are very soft and no liquid remains, 25–30 minutes. Using a potato masher or large spoon, smash figs into small pieces and continue to cook, stirring frequently, until mixture is very thick and paste-like, 5–7 minutes. Scrape jam onto a plate and spread into an even layer; chill, uncovered, until cold, about 1 hour.
Beat egg and 1 Tbsp. water in a small bowl. Scrape cold jam into a large zip-top bag or disposable pastry bag and cut a ¾" opening at 1 corner (or the tip if using a pastry bag).

This dough will sense your fear, so you have to show it who’s boss. It goes from cold and stiff to room temperature, soft, and hard to manage very quickly. If it gets too soft, put it back in the fridge and chill about 10 minutes. If you think you’ve messed up, gather it into a disk, chill, and roll it out again.

Roll out 1 disk of dough on a piece of generously floured parchment or waxed paper to a 10"x4½" rectangle about ⅛" thick. Trim edges to make even. With one of the shorter sides facing you, pipe a 1"-thick line of filling slightly off-center lengthwise down dough. Brush long edge of dough closest to filling with egg wash. Using the parchment to help you, fold opposite side of dough up and over jam, aligning all the edges. Very lightly press to seal, then trim sealed edge to square off. Chill 10 minutes.

Place a rack in center of oven; preheat to 325°. Using a bench scraper or knife, cut filled dough crosswise into 1" lengths. Transfer to a rimmed baking sheet and brush with egg wash. Chill while you roll out and fill remaining dough. (If you have any dough scraps and filling left over, repeat process to make a few more cookies.) Place all bars on the same sheet, spacing about ½" apart; they will not spread as they bake. Freeze 10 minutes.
Bake bars, rotating sheet halfway through, until golden brown and slightly cracked on top, 14–16 minutes. Let bars cool on sheet 5 minutes, then transfer to a wire rack and let cool completely.
Do Ahead: Fig Newtons can be made 1 day ahead. Store in an airtight container at room temperature.

name: Fig Preserves
instructions: Place figs in a large bowl; sprinkle baking soda over figs. Carefully cover figs with boiling water and soak for 1 hour. Drain figs and rinse thoroughly with cold water.
Combine sugar and 4 cups of water in a large Dutch oven; bring to a boil and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add figs and lemon slices to syrup and simmer for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.

Spoon figs into hot, sterilized jars and spoon syrup over figs, leaving ½ inch of head space. Run a clean knife or thin spatula around the insides of the jars to remove any air bubbles. Wipe rims with a moist paper towel to remove any residue. Top with lids and screw rings on tightly.

Place a rack in the bottom of a large stockpot and fill halfway with water. Bring to a boil and lower jars 2 inches apart into the boiling water using a holder. Pour in more boiling water to cover jars by at least 1 inch. Bring to a rolling boil, cover, and process for 10 minutes.

Remove the jars from the stockpot and let rest, several inches apart, for 12 to 24 hours. Press the center of each lid with a finger to ensure the lid does not move up or down. Remove the rings for storage and store in a cool, dark area for up to 1 year.

name: Fig Pudding Recipe

ingredients.item: Daha yoğun kıvam için nişasta miktarını biraz artırabilirsiniz.
Daha hafif bir tatlı için şeker miktarını azaltabilir ya da doğal tatlandırıcı kullanabilirsiniz.
Farklı aroma katmak için muhallebiye bir tutam tarçın veya birkaç damla portakal kabuğu rendesi ekleyebilirsiniz.
Daha kremamsı bir doku için pişirme aşamasının sonunda bir kaşık tereyağı ilave edebilirsiniz.
Katmanlı sunum için kaselerin altına rondodan geçirilmiş bisküvi ekleyerek farklı bir taban oluşturabilirsiniz.
Vegan alternatif için süt yerine badem sütü veya hindistan cevizi sütü tercih edebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Öncelikle kuru incirleri boyutlarına göre 9–10 adet olacak şekilde küçük küpler halinde doğrayın.
2.  Doğradığınız incirleri bir kaseye alın ve üzerlerini geçecek kadar sıcak su ekleyerek yaklaşık 10 dakika yumuşamaya bırakın.
3. Bu sırada muhallebi için sütü bir tencereye aktarın.
4.  Üzerine toz şeker, un ve nişastayı ilave edin.
5.  Ocağı orta ateşe alın ve karışımı tel çırpıcıyla sürekli karıştırarak koyulaşıncaya kadar pişirin.
6.  Tatlıyı daha şekerli seviyorsanız bu aşamada şeker miktarını damak zevkinize göre artırabilirsiniz.
7. Muhallebi kaynamaya başlayıp kıvam aldığında, suda beklettiğiniz incirleri süzüp tencereye ekleyin.
8.  İncirlerle birlikte birkaç dakika daha pişirerek aromalarının muhallebiye geçmesini sağlayın.
9. Son olarak vanilyayı ilave edip karıştırın ve ocağı kapatın.
10.  Hazırladığınız incirli muhallebiyi kaselere paylaştırın.
11.  Son olarak üzerlerini nar taneleri, toz Antep fıstığı ve ince dilimlenmiş incirlerle süsleyerek servis edebilirsiniz.
12.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Fig Salad With Goat Cheese And Walnuts
original_name: Ensalada de higos con queso de cabra y nueces

ingredients.item: 100 g de queso feta o de cabra (½ taza desmenuzado)
1 cucharada colmada de mermelada de higos
2 cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra
Sal y pimienta negra al gusto

instructions: Lavamos y secamos la rúcula, la colocamos en un plato grande.
Cortamos los higos en cuartos y los distribuimos sobre la rúcula.
Desmenuzamos el queso de cabra y lo repartimos por encima junto con las nueces troceadas.
Para la vinagreta, mezclamos la mermelada de higos con el aceite de oliva, el vinagre balsámico, el zumo de limón, sal y pimienta. Batimos bien hasta emulsionar.
Aliñamos la ensalada justo antes de servir y mezclamos suavemente para no romper los higos.

name: Fig Salad With Goat's Milk Yogurt And Pepper Cress
instructions: Whisk together first 5 ingredients in medium bowl. Season with salt and reserve.
Sprinkle figs with fleur de sel; set in center of plate. Drizzle dressing on figs; scatter pepper cress and mint over. Season with olive oil and Indonesian pepper.
* Also known as Balinese long pepper; available at specialty foods stores, Middle Eastern markets, and from zingermans.com.

name: Fig Smoothie Recipe
instructions: Inicia la receta y toma los higos, retira el tallo y corta en cubos. Agrega a la licuadora.
Posteriormente, vierte las tres tazas de leche, el zumo de limón, la esencia de vainilla y la canela. Licúa muy bien hasta que todos los ingredientes se procesen perfectamente.
Ahora, incorpora el azúcar morena y los hielos. Licúa por dos minutos para que los cristales del azúcar se procesen y el hielo se integre.
Sirve inmediatamente y degusta para que lo tomes fresco.
¡Disfruta!

name: Fig Spice Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease and flour a 10-inch tube pan.
Place dried figs into a saucepan and cover with water. Bring to a simmer over low heat and cook until soft, about 5 minutes. Drain figs, reserving 1/2 cup cooking liquid.
Sift flour, baking powder, salt, baking soda, cinnamon, and cloves into a bowl.
Cut figs into 1/4-inch cubes. Combine buttermilk and reserved cooking liquid in a medium bowl.

Beat sugar and butter in a large bowl with an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs, one at a time, then stir in vanilla. Beat in flour mixture alternately with buttermilk mixture, then stir in figs and walnuts. Pour into the prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean, 50 to 60 minutes. Cool in pan for 15 minutes, then turn out onto a wire rack and cool completely.

name: Fig Tiramisu Recipe

ingredients.item: Yarım su bardağı espresso veya çok güçlü kahve
3–4 yemek kaşığı pudra şekeri (tat tercihine göre ayarlayın)
Taze incir yoksa kuru incirleri sıcak suda 5–10 dakika bekletip yumuşatabilirsiniz.
Alternatif olarak kuru kayısı, erik veya taze mevsim meyveleri de kullanılabilir.
üzerini karamelize etmek yerine kakaolu toz, çikolata rendesi veya file badem ile süsleyebilirsiniz.
Taze nane yaprağı veya yenilebilir çiçeklerle görsellik artırılabilir.

instructions: 1. Kremayı geniş bir kapta pudra şekeriyle iyice çırpın.
2.  Çırpmaya devam ederken labne ve krem peyniri azar azar ekleyin ve karışım pürüzsüz ve kabarık bir kıvam alana kadar çırpın.
3.  Hazırladığınız kremayı soğuması için buzdolabına kaldırın.
4. İncirleri temizleyip kurulayın, ardından ince yuvarlak dilimler halinde kesin.
5.  Kahveyi demledikten sonra bir süre ılımasını bekleyin.
6. Servis kabının tabanına kremadan biraz sürün.
7.  Kedi dili bisküvilerini hazırladığınız kahveye hızlıca batırıp tabana dizin.
8.  Üzerine kremadan bir kat yayın ve bu işlemi malzemeler bitene kadar tekrarlayın; en üst kat mutlaka kremayla kaplı olmalı.
9. Son katın üzerine incir dilimlerini düzenli bir şekilde yerleştirin.
10.  Tatlıyı buzdolabında yaklaşık 3–4 saat dinlendirin.
11.  Servis yapmadan önce incirlerin üzerine biraz toz şeker serpin ve pürmüz yardımıyla şekeri karamelize edin.
12.  Ardından büyük bir kaşıkla porsiyonlayarak tabaklara alın ve servis edin.
13.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Fig Toasties
instructions: Preheat oven to 250°. Mix jam, red pepper flakes, and vinegar in a small bowl; season with salt. Set half of spicy fig jam aside.

Spread 6 slices of bread with remaining spicy fig jam and top with cheddar and remaining 6 slices of bread. Spread outside of sandwiches with butter. Heat a large skillet over medium heat. Working in 2 batches, cook sandwiches, pressing down firmly, until golden brown and cheese is melted, about 1 minute per side. Transfer to a wire rack set inside a baking sheet and keep warm in oven until ready to serve.
Cut each sandwich into 4 triangles and serve with reserved spicy fig jam for dipping.

name: Fig, Goat Cheese, And Prosciutto Crostini
instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C.
Slice 12 ½-inch slices of bread from the baguette. Place on a baking sheet, and brush generously with the olive oil. Sprinkle a little salt if desired on each slice.
Bake for about 10 mins, or until crisp and slightly golden. Remove from oven and cool slightly.
Spread goat cheese on each crostini. Spread about a tablespoon of Bonne Maman Fig Preserves on top of the goat cheese.
Fold the slices of prosciutto neatly and place on top of each crostini.
Lay fresh arugula leaves on top of each crostini to taste.

name: Fig-prosciutto Bites
instructions: Place goat cheese on a sheet of plastic wrap. Top with another sheet of plastic wrap and use a rolling pin to flatten into a 4x8-inch rectangle.

Remove the top sheet of plastic wrap and cover goat cheese with slices of prosciutto, slightly overlapping the edges. Cover prosciutto with a new sheet of plastic wrap and flip both sheets over so the goat cheese layer is now facing up.

Remove top sheet of plastic wrap. Cover goat cheese evenly with figs, basil, and black pepper. Starting from the long edge, roll tightly to form a log. Wrap log in plastic wrap and refrigerate at least 2 hours.

name: Fig-ricotta Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Spray a 9x5-inch loaf pan with nonstick spray.
Whisk 1 1/2 cups flour, baking powder, and salt together in a medium bowl.

Beat ricotta cheese, sugar, and butter in a bowl with an electric mixer on medium speed until smooth, about 2 minutes. Beat in eggs, one at a time, followed by almond extract. Beat in flour mixture on low speed, scraping down the sides of the bowl until combined; beat batter for about 30 seconds more.
Place chopped figs into a bowl, sprinkle with 1 tablespoon flour, and stir to coat. Fold figs into batter, then pour into the prepared loaf pan. Place fig slices on top of batter, down the center.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean, 45 to 60 minutes. Remove from the oven and place on a wire rack to cool, 20 to 30 minutes.
Remove cooled cake from the pan and dust with confectioners' sugar.

name: Figgy Almond-polenta Tea Cake

ingredients.prep: room temperature, plus more for pan

ingredients.item: Instant polenta or fine-ground yellow cornmeal
. diamond crystal or 1 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt
. vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 325°. Lightly grease sides of a 9"-diameter cake pan with unsalted butter; line bottom with a parchment round. Stir 2 cups (200 g) almond flour, ⅔ cup (103 g) instant polenta or fine-ground yellow cornmeal, 2 tsp. baking powder, 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 1 cup (200 g) sugar in a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment on low speed until combined. Add 10 Tbsp. unsalted butter, room temperature, increase speed to medium-low, and beat until incorporated and no lumps remain, about 1 minute (it will look clumpy). Add 4 large eggs, zest of 1 large lemon, 1 cup sour cream (not low-fat), 2 tsp. vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract, and ½ tsp. almond extract; beat, scraping down sides of bowl occasionally, until batter is smooth and fluffy, about 3 minutes (it’s okay if it looks curdled).

Scrape batter into prepared pan and smooth surface with an offset spatula or a spoon. Arrange 6–8 oz. fresh figs, trimmed, halved, cut side up, on top in even rows, pressing gently into batter. Sprinkle all over with remaining 2 tsp. (8 g) sugar. Bake cake until golden brown with no damp spots in the center and a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, 50–60 minutes. Transfer pan to a wire rack and let cake cool in pan.

Run offset spatula or a butter knife around cake to release. Carefully invert onto a large plate, then invert again onto a cake plate or platter.
Do Ahead: Cake can be baked 1 day ahead. Store loosely covered at room temperature.

name: Figs With Bacon And Chile

ingredients.item: Sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar

instructions: Cook bacon pieces in a large nonstick skillet over medium-low, stirring often, until brown and crisp, 8–10 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer bacon to a small bowl.

Pour off all but 2 Tbsp. fat from skillet; save for another use. Add maple syrup to skillet, swirling to combine, and heat over medium-high. Arrange figs in skillet in a single layer, cut side down. Cook, swirling liquid occasionally, until figs are slightly softened and caramelized, about 5 minutes.
Arrange figs cut side up on a platter and press pieces of bacon onto the surface of each fig.

Set the skillet over medium heat, add vinegar, and stir into juices. Bring to a simmer and cook, stirring constantly, until syrupy, about 1 minute. Drizzle syrup over figs, then sprinkle with red pepper.

name: Filet Mignon For Two

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste
Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 260°C (260 degrees C). Place a large, oven-proof skillet in the oven as it preheats.
Bring steaks to room temperature. Rub with olive oil and season generously with salt and pepper.
Remove the hot skillet from the oven carefully and place it on a burner set to high heat. Leave the oven on.
Place steaks into the dry pan immediately and sear, turning with tongs, 1 to 2 minutes on both sides.

Transfer the pan back into the preheated oven and cook until desired doneness is reached, 3 to 5 minutes. For medium doneness, an instant-read thermometer inserted into the centers should read 60°C (60 degrees C). Transfer steaks to a warm platter and tent loosely with foil. Let rest for 5 to 10 minutes; the steaks will continue to cook during this process and the internal temperature will rise 5 to 10 degrees.

Meanwhile, heat butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Add shallot and garlic and saute until shallot is tender, 5 to 7 minutes. Pour in cream; let cook until reduced by half, about 10 minutes. Turn heat to low and add Gorgonzola cheese. Let cheese melt; season with salt and pepper. Serve sauce with steaks.

name: Filet Mignon With Bell Pepper Haystack And Fresh Guacamole Served With Corn Chips
instructions: Stir the avocado, roma tomatoes, minced shallot, jalapeno pepper, and lemon juice in a bowl. Chill in refrigerator to allow flavors to meld.
Place the chicken stock in a small saucepan over medium-low heat; simmer the stock until reduced to about 1/2 cup.

Heat 1/4 cup corn oil in a skillet over medium heat; cook the red bell pepper and yellow bell pepper in the hot oil until tender, 5 to 7 minutes. Stir the mushrooms into the peppers; season with the coriander seeds, sea salt, and black pepper. Add the reduced chicken stock and the water; cook and stir until the moisture has been absorbed, another 5 to 7 minutes. Transfer the mixture to a plate lined with paper towels to allow the grease to drain.

Heat the olive oil in a saucepan over medium heat; cook and stir the sliced shallots in the hot oil until softened, about 3 minutes. Stir in the crushed garlic and cook another 3 minutes. Pour 3 1/2 cups water over the mixture and bring to a boil; cook at a boil until the liquid reduces to 1 cup. Strain the mixture through a fine-mesh strainer and return the strained liquid to the saucepan, keeping it over medium heat. Add the white wine vinegar and return to a boil; continue cooking at a boil until the liquid reduced to about 1/4 cup. Quickly whisk in the chilled butter until just melted, whisking constantly. Remove from the heat and keep warm while you prepare the steaks.

Place a cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat and allow get hot. Heat the oil in the skillet. Cook the steaks in the hot oil until they start to firm, and are reddish-pink and juicy in the center, about 5 minutes per side. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read 54°C (54 degrees C). Cover the meat with two layers of aluminum foil and allow to rest in a warm area for 10 minutes.

Place a mound of the bell pepper mixture into the center of each serving plate. Slice the rested steaks in half and place atop each mound. Spoon a few spoonfuls of the butter mixture onto the plate to surround the stack. Serve with the chilled guacamole and corn chips.

name: Filipa’s Banana Muffins
instructions: 1Warm up the oven to 177°C (180°C) and line a muffin tray with paper muffin cases (or grease them with a bit of oil). Move the oven rack a notch down from the middle position.
Mash both bananas with a fork.
Combine the mashed up bananas with maple syrup or sugar and peanut butter in a medium-size bowl. Mix very well.
Add the dry ingredients and mix them well until there is no dry flour left.
Transfer the cake batter into the prepared muffin tray. Decorate the tops with slivered almonds (if using).
Bake for about 18 minutes, or until a toothpick comes out fairly clean.
Remove the muffins from the oven and allow them to cool down before eating.
Enjoy!

name: Filipino Beef Giniling (afritada Style)
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add beef and 1/2 cup water; cook and stir until browned and crumbly, 5 to 7 minutes. Season with black pepper and add more water as needed; do not let beef dry out.
Add potatoes, carrots, and 3 tablespoons soy sauce; cook for 4 minutes, adding more water if mixture is too dry. Add raisins and cook for 2 to 3 minutes, again adding water as needed.

Pour in one can tomato sauce. Fill the can with water and swirl to remove excess sauce; pour into the saucepan. Stir in remaining 1/2 can sauce until combined. Add more water as needed to create a saucy but not soupy consistency.

Stir in bell pepper, sugar, and remaining 3 tablespoons soy sauce. Cook, stirring occasionally and adding water as needed so sauce does not dry out, until all vegetables are tender, about 3 to 5 minutes.

name: Filipino Chicken Adobo

ingredients.item: Palm sugar or light brown sugar

ingredients.prep: green parts only, thinly sliced on a diagonal (for serving)

instructions: Place chicken, garlic, chiles, ginger, vinegar, soy sauce, peppercorns, palm sugar, and bay leaves in a large reasalable plastic bag or 13x9" baking dish; toss to combine. Chill, turning chicken once, at least 2 hours and up to 2 days.

Heat oil in a medium heavy saucepan over medium. Add chicken, reserving marinade, and cook, turning occasionally and adjusting heat to medium-low if needed, until skin starts to brown and caramelize, 6–8 minutes. Add marinade and ½ cup water; bring to a simmer. Cover saucepan and cook 35 minutes. Uncover, turn chicken, and continue to simmer, turning chicken occasionally and adjusting heat if needed, until meat is very tender and liquid is reduced and starting to glaze, about 25 minutes.
Serve chicken over rice. Spoon sauce over, then top with scallions.

name: Filipino Chicken Sisig Wraps
instructions: In a pan on high heat, cook ground chicken on high until lightly browned. Once cooked, add  black pepper , soy sauce and salt.
Continue to stir until the chicken has absorbed juice and become golden-brown. To this, add chopped onion and jalapeño.
Let the onions cook slowly until about half done. At this point, add mayonnaise  and lemon juice into the mixture and mix well.
Garnish with chopped green onions, scoop into lettuce cups, garnish if desired, and serve.
Enjoy!

name: Filipino Chicken Sopas

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Combine water and onion in a pot and bring to a boil. Add chicken, garlic powder, and onion powder. Bring back to a boil and reduce heat to medium-low. Simmer broth until chicken thighs are tender, about 30 minutes.
Remove chicken and add carrots to the broth. Stir in 2 tablespoons fish sauce, chicken bouillon, and black pepper.

Shred chicken meat and discard bones; return meat to the broth and simmer until carrots are tender, about 10 minutes. Add macaroni; cook until tender, about 20 minutes, adding more water if needed. Stir in evaporated milk and butter; simmer until butter is melted. Add more fish sauce and season with salt and pepper to taste. Pour soup into serving bowls.

name: Filipino Coconut Garlic Fried Rice (sinangag)
instructions: Place rice in a large bowl with enough water to cover by a few inches; swirl with your fingers, then drain. Repeat until water runs clear, about 3 times.

Combine rice, 1 ½ cups water, coconut cream, turmeric, and salt in a saucepan; bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, until rice is tender and liquid is absorbed, about 20 minutes. Chill, uncovered, 2 to 4 hours to overnight.

Heat coconut oil in a 12-inch skillet or wok over high heat. Add garlic; cook until it just begins to brown, about 1 minute. Add rice and spread in an even layer; cook, without stirring, until lightly browned and crisp on the bottom, about 4 minutes. Add fish sauce; cook, stirring, until fully combined and heated through, about 2 minutes.

name: Filipino Embutido

ingredients.item: Plus 1 0.5 teaspoons diamond crystal or 4 0.5 teaspoons morton kosher salt; plus more

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Gently lower 6 eggs into a large saucepan of boiling salted water and cook 5 minutes. Transfer to a bowl of ice water and let cool 2 minutes. Drain and carefully peel.

Mix remaining 6 eggs in a large bowl with garlic, Parmesan, panko, butter, pickles, olives, raisins, vinegar, both paprikas, pepper, and 2 Tbsp. plus  1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 4½ tsp. Morton salt, then mix in pork.

Line two 9x5" loaf pans with a sheet of foil, leaving 3" overhang on long sides. Lightly coat with nonstick spray. Divide half of meat mixture between pans. Place 3 boiled eggs in a line down the center of each pan. Top with remaining meat mixture, packing tightly around eggs and making sure they are completely covered.

Mix ketchup and Worcestershire sauce in a small bowl and spread over both embutidos. Bake until an instant-read thermometer inserted into several places, avoiding eggs if possible, registers 155°, 55–70 minutes. Let cool 10 minutes.
Transfer embutidos to a platter; slice.
Do Ahead: Embutidos can be baked 4 days ahead. Let cool, cover and chill.

name: Filipino Lechon Kawali
instructions: Combine pork belly, garlic, bay leaves, salt, and pepper in a skillet; pour in enough water to cover. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer until skin is tender, 35 to 45 minutes.
Drain and let sit at room temperature until pork has air-dried.
Heat oil in a deep-fryer or large saucepan to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Fry pork in the hot oil, working in batches, until golden brown, 3 to 5 minutes.
Remove fried pork with a slotted spoon and drain on a paper towel-lined plate.

name: Filipino Spaghetti

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
. orange edam cheese or cheddar cheese

instructions: Cook 1 lb. spaghetti in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until al dente. Drain, reserving 1 cup pasta cooking liquid.

Meanwhile, heat 2 Tbsp. vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook 4 beef hot dogs, sliced ½" thick, turning halfway through, until deep golden brown, about 4 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer to a plate.

Place 1 lb. ground pork in same pan; sprinkle with ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt and ¼ tsp. freshly ground black pepper. Cook, breaking up meat and spreading across pan, until browned underneath, about 4 minutes. Stir meat, then continue to cook, stirring and breaking up more, until cooked through, about 2 minutes longer. Using slotted spoon, transfer pork to plate with hot dogs.

Combine 1 medium onion, finely chopped, 2 medium carrots, peeled, finely chopped, 4 garlic cloves, thinly sliced, ¼ tsp. Diamond Crystal or Morton kosher salt, and ¼ tsp. freshly ground pepper in same skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, until onion is translucent and vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes. Add hot dogs and pork back to pan and stir to coat. Mix in 2¼ cups marinara sauce (about 24 oz.) and 1 cup banana ketchup or banana sauce, bring sauce to a simmer, and cook, stirring occasionally, until flavors come together, about 10 minutes. Mix in 1 tsp. granulated sugar; taste and season with more salt and pepper if needed. Remove pan from heat. Transfer 2 cups sauce to a small bowl; set aside.

Add spaghetti and 2 Tbsp. pasta cooking liquid to sauce in pan; toss, adding more pasta cooking liquid 1 Tbsp. at a time if needed, until noodles are well coated. Divide among plates and spoon reserved sauce over; top with 4 oz. orange Edam cheese or cheddar cheese, coarsely grated (about 1¼ cups), and 2 oz. Parmesan, finely grated (about 1 cup).

name: Filipino-style Barbecue Chicken
instructions: Make banana ketchup: Mash banana, tomato paste, vinegar, brown sugar, oil, ginger, onion powder, garlic powder, cayenne, salt, allspice, and turmeric together in a medium saucepan. Add water and stir to combine.

Place over medium-high heat and bring to a simmer. Reduce heat to medium and simmer until reduced and thickened, 7 to 10 minutes. Remove from heat; reserve 3 tablespoons for basting sauce, leaving about 1/2 cup for marinade.
Make chicken and marinade: Transfer ½ cup prepared banana ketchup to a large bowl and add lemon-lime soda, soy sauce, lemon juice, brown sugar, garlic, and black pepper. Whisk until combined.
Add halved chicken thighs to marinade and toss to coat. Cover with plastic wrap and marinate in the refrigerator for 4 to 18 hours.
When you are ready to cook chicken, make basting sauce: Whisk together reserved 3 tablespoons banana ketchup, soy sauce, brown sugar, oil, and fish sauce in a small bowl until smooth.

Preheat a charcoal grill until the coals are very hot. Remove chicken from the refrigerator and place on metal skewers, folding it in half with the smooth side facing outward and the rougher side folded inward.
Grill chicken in batches over hot coals until no longer pink in the centers, 15 to 20 minutes, turning and basting every 2 to 3 minutes.
Serve with accumulated juices or extra basting sauce.

name: Filled Eggplant Roll
instructions: 1. Patlıcanları yıkayıp kurulayın.
2.  Uzunlamasına incecik dilimleyip zeytinyağında kızartın.
3.  İnce kıyılmış soğan ve sarımsağı tavada çok az zeytinyağı ilavesiyle soteleyin.
4.  Domatesleri ve biberleri çok ufak doğrayıp ekleyin ve karıştırın.
5.  Pişince ocaktan alın ve kıyılmış maydanozu ekleyip harmanlayın.
6.  Tuzla tatlandırın.
7.  Her patlıcan diliminin uç kısmına harçtan yerleştirip rulo şeklinde sarın.
8.  Dik şekilde tabağa yerleştirin ve servis yapın.

name: Filled With Oatmeal

ingredients.item: 1ντομάτα  αποφλοιωμένη και ψιλοκομμένη, με  τους χυμούς της
1ντομάτα  αποφλοιωμένη και ψιλοκομμένη, με  τους χυμούς της

instructions: Κόβουμε μία φέτα από τις ντομάτες (θα τη χρησιμοποιήσουμε στη συνέχεια ως καπάκι) και τις αδειάζουμε προσεκτικά αφήνοντας 1 εκ. σάρκας περιμετρικά.
Αλέθουμε στο μπλέντερ την ψίχα από τις ντομάτες και την κρατάμε στην άκρη για το τελείωμα του φαγητού.
Πασπαλίζουμε το εσωτερικό των αδειασμένων λαχανικών με αλάτι και προχωράμε στη γέμιση.

name: Fillet With Mushrooms, Thyme And Bay Leaf
original_name: Φιλέτο με μανιτάρια, θυμάρι και μαυροδάφνη

ingredients.item: 2φιλέτα μοσχαρίσια (μερίδες) πάχους 3 5 εκ. το καθένα αχτύπητα
16ασπρομανίταρα καθαρισμένα και κομμένα σε χοντρές φέτες
2φιλέτα μοσχαρίσια (μερίδες) πάχους 3 5 εκ. το καθένα αχτύπητα
16ασπρομανίταρα καθαρισμένα και κομμένα σε χοντρές φέτες

instructions: Σε ένα μπολ ξεπλένουμε με κρύο νερό τα αποξηραμένα μανιτάρια για να απομακρύνουμε σκόνη, χώμα κ.λπ.
Τα καλύπτουμε με βραστό νερό, σκεπάζουμε μ’ ένα πιάτο και αφήνουμε να φουσκώσουν και να μαλακώσουν για 20΄.
Στο μεταξύ, σε βαθύ τηγάνι ή πλατιά κατσαρόλα ζεσταίνουμε το ελαιόλαδο και σε δυνατή φωτιά ροδίζουμε τα φιλέτα 1΄ από κάθε πλευρά.
Προσθέτουμε το ψιλοκομμένο κρεμμύδι και το σκόρδο έως ότου γυαλίσουν, για 2΄-3΄.
Σβήνουμε με το κονιάκ και αφήνουμε 1΄ με 2΄ να εξατμιστεί το αλκοόλ.
Προσθέτουμε τα φρέσκα μανιτάρια καθώς και τα αποξηραμένα, αφού τα στραγγίξουμε καλά με τα χέρια.
Προσθέτουμε τη μαυροδάφνη, το 1 δαφνόφυλλο, το θυμάρι και το μοσχοκάρυδο.
Αλατίζουμε και τρίβουμε μπόλικο πιπέρι.
Γυρίζουμε τα φιλέτα (με λαβίδα, όχι με αιχμηρό αντικείμενο γιατί θα χαθούν τα πολύτιμα υγρά).
Σκεπάζουμε, χαμηλώνουμε τη φωτιά και σιγομαγειρεύουμε για 6΄-7΄.
Βγάζουμε τα φιλέτα σε πιατέλα και δυναμώνουμε τη φωτιά για 2΄-3΄ έως ότου ρεντουίρει (πυκνώσει) και γλασάρει η σάλτσα.
Περιχύνουμε τα φιλέτα και σερβίρουμε με πουρέ πατάτας ή πράσινη σαλάτα .

name: Fillets In The Air Fryer
instructions: Raspe a casca do limão e esprema-lhe o sumo. Tempere os filetes com sal, pimenta,a raspa e o sumo do limão, reserve. Desfaça o miolo da broa, junte-lhe 2 colheres (sopa) do azeite e misture bem.
Forre a air fryer com papel vegetal anti-aderente para que fique com as laterais cobertas com o papel vegetal, de modo a fazer um "cesto".

Descasque a cebola, pique-a grosseiramente e coloque na air fryer. Limpe o pimento de sementes, corte-o em pedaços pequenos e junte à cebola. Corte o bacon em tiras e adicione à airfryer. De seguida regue com o restante azeite. Tempere com sal e pimenta, junte os orégãos e envolva.
Programe 180º, durante 10 minutos, a meio do tempo abra e mexa.

Passados 10 minutos adicione os filetes e regue-os com a marinada. Programe 180º durante 10 minutos. Depois cubra com a broa e programe 200º durante 5 minutos. Polvilhe com coentros picados e sirva com batatas cozidas.

name: Filo Pastry Pies With Chicken And Almonds
original_name: Empadas de massa filo com galinha e amêndoas

ingredients.item: 100 g de miolo de amêndoa laminado
Salada de tomates-cereja, cebola roxa e salsa para acompanhar
Utilize massa filo de boa qualidade, pois sua leveza e crocância são essenciais.
Certifique-se de pincelar cada folha de massa com manteiga para garantir a textura perfeita.
As amêndoas laminadas podem ser levemente tostadas antes de usar para intensificar o sabor.
A salada de tomate-cereja, cebola roxa e salsa oferece um contraste refrescante e equilibrado ao prato principal.

instructions: Descasque e corte a cebola em rodelas finas, bem como o alho-francês. Descasque e pique o alho. Desfie a galinha e reserve.

Leve ao lume um tacho com o azeite, junte a cebola, o alho e o alho-francês e deixe alourar. Adicione a galinha e envolva. Retire o tacho do lume, junte as amêndoas e a salsa picada, tempere com sal e pimenta e envolva tudo. Reserve.

Corte as folhas de massa filo em quadrados, pincele-os com manteiga e sobreponha cada três quadrados. Use cada conjunto para forrar o interior de pequenas formas. Leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºc, por cerca de 7 minutos.
Retire o tabuleiro do forno, recheie as formas com o preparado de galinha, deixe arrefecer um pouco e desenforme. Sirva com salada de tomate-cereja, cebola roxa e salsa.

name: Filo Pastry Puffs With Goat Cheese
original_name: Folhadinhos de massa filo com queijo de cabra

ingredients.item: Sementes de sésamo brancas ou pretas q.b.

instructions: Ligue o forno a 180 graus. Pincele 4 folhas de massa filo com manteiga derretida e coloque-as umas sobre as outras. Repita a operação até ficar com 5 conjuntos.

Corte os queijos chèvre em fatias, divida-as pelas folhas de massa, enrole em forma de trouxa e feche bem as extremidades, como vê na foto. Pincele com mais manteiga derretida, polvilhe com sementes de sésamo a gosto e leve ao forno até ficarem douradinhos.
Retire do forno, regue com o mel e sirva decorados a gosto e acompanhados com salada.

name: Fine Crisp Cakes
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C).
Beat butter in a large bowl with an electric mixer until creamy; beat in sugar until light and fluffy. Beat in egg yolk.
Whisk flour, allspice, and turmeric together in a bowl until well combined; sift into butter mixture and stir until dough is combined. Press dough into a 9-inch square baking dish.
Beat egg white in a small bowl; brush over dough.
Bake in the preheated oven until cake feels firm when lightly pressed in center, 30 to 45 minutes. Cut into squares while cake is still hot; cool in the baking dish.

name: Fine Sweet From The Algarve

ingredients.item: 300 g  miolo de amêndoa sem pele

instructions: Triture muito bem a amêndoa num liquidificador ou processador de alimentos, até obter uma farinha e reserve. Num tacho, coloque o açúcar e um pouco de água, o suficiente para absorver o açúcar, leve a lume brando até levantar fervura e deixe ferver durante 2 a 3 minutos.
De seguida, junte a amêndoa moída peneirada e envolva muito bem, até obter uma mistura sem grumos. Retire do lume e continue a mexer até arrefecer o suficiente para poder moldar com as mãos.
Nessa altura, transfira a massa para uma bancada limpa, amasse bem, faça uma bola e coloque numa tigela de vidro. Cubra com película e deixe descansar, de um dia para o outro.

No dia seguinte, divida a massa em pequenas porções, use diferentes corantes alimentares consoante o quiser recriar e molde-as em formatos a gosto (bolinhas, quadrados, formatos de frutas, concha, etc). Decore com fios de ovos ou a gosto e leve ao frio até ao momento de servir.

name: Finger Licking Ribs
instructions: Cut ribs into 1-rib pieces and toss with 1 teaspoon garlic powder. Brown half of ribs in hot oil in Dutch oven over medium-high heat; remove. Brown remaining ribs. Drain fat from pan. Return ribs to pan; stir 1/3 cup water, less sodium soy sauce, sherry and brown sugar. Cover and simmer 1 hour, or until ribs are done, stirring occasionally.

name: Finger-licking Good Banana Fritters!
original_name: Buñuelos de plátano ¡para chuparse los dedos!

ingredients.item: Aceite de oliva virgen o virgen extra para freír

instructions: Batimos los huevos, añadimos la mantequilla fundida,  el azúcar y  la leche y mezclamos bien. Incorporamos la harina, la sal, la levadura química y la canela, mezclamos muy bien. Cortamos los plátanos en trozos, deben estar en su punto óptimo, pero tirando a blandos. Los sumergimos en la mezcla.
Vamos friendo por tandas hasta que estén dorados.
Sacamos y dejamos sobre un papel de cocina para que éste absorba el aceite sobrante. Y aún calientes rebozamos en azúcar.

name: Fingerling Potato Salad

ingredients.item: Kosher salt plus more for seasoning
Leeks (white and pale green parts only)
ingredients.prep: halved lengthwise, cut crosswise into 1/4' slices (about 5 cups)

instructions: Place potatoes in a large pot. Add enough cold water to cover by 3". Stir in 1 tablespoon salt and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium and simmer until potatoes are tender, about 10 minutes. Drain. Transfer to a large rimmed baking sheet and let cool slightly.

Heat 3 tablespoons oil in a small skillet over medium-high heat. Add mustard seeds to skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, until seeds start to pop, about 2 minutes. Pour oil with seeds into a large bowl.
Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add leeks, season with salt, and cook, stirring occasionally, until just tender, 10-12 minutes.

Wisk 4 tablespoons oil, vinegar, Dijon mustard, and 1 tablespoon water into mustard-seed oil. Add potatoes and leeks; toss to coat. Season with salt and pepper. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover; chill. Return to room temperature before serving, adding more oil and vinegar if dry.

name: Finnan Haddie Chowder

ingredients.prep: unpeeled if new, and chopped into 3/4-1 1/4-inch cubes
drained, or 2 large corn on the cobs, kernels removed

instructions: In a large saucepan, heat the butter and oil, add the onion, and sauté over low heat for 5 minutes. Add the potatoes and cook for an additional 5 minutes. Add the thyme and wine and boil for a minute or so before pouring in the stock and stirring. Add the milk and bring to nearly boiling, then reduce the heat and simmer until the potatoes are almost tender, about 10 minutes.
Add the corn, finnan haddie, and a grinding of pepper and bring to a simmer. Let simmer until the haddock is just cooked, about 10 minutes. Taste for seasoning, adding a little salt if needed.

name: Finnish Long Drink

ingredients.item: Fluid ounce freshly squeezed lemon juice

instructions: Fill a highball glass with ice. Add grapefruit soda, grapefruit juice, gin, and lemon juice; stir to combine.
Top with club soda, lightly stir again, and garnish with grapefruit slice.

name: Finnish Oven Pancakes
instructions: {'step': '1', 'description': 'Place an 11x13-inch baking pan into the oven.'}
{'step': '2', 'description': 'Preheat the oven to 220 degrees C (218°C) with the pan in place.'}
{'step': '3', 'description': 'Beat eggs in a large bowl with a wire whisk; add milk, lemon zest, white sugar, and salt and beat together.'}
{'step': '4', 'description': 'Add flour and beat until mixture is very smooth. Mix in lemon juice until incorporated.'}
{'step': '5', 'description': 'Place the butter into the preheated pan and allow it to melt until it is bubbling.'}
{'step': '6', 'description': 'Spread the butter over the entire bottom of the pan by rocking it back and fourth.'}
{'step': '7', 'description': 'Pour the batter in the buttered pan.'}
{'step': '8', 'description': 'Bake in the preheated oven until top of the pancake is lightly browned and puffed, 20 to 30 minutes.'}
{'step': '9', 'description': 'Mix coarse sugar and cardamom together and sprinkle over the top.'}
{'step': '10', 'description': 'Cut and serve.'}

name: Finnish Pulla
instructions: Warm milk in a small saucepan over medium heat until it bubbles, then remove from heat. Let cool until lukewarm.
Stir together warm water and yeast in a large bowl. Let stand until yeast softens and begins to form a creamy foam, about 5 minutes.

Stir lukewarm milk, sugar, 4 beaten eggs, salt, and cardamom into yeast mixture. Beat in 2 cups flour until combined. Add 3 cups flour and beat until dough is smooth and elastic. Add melted butter; beat until glossy. Mix in remaining flour until dough is stiff.
Transfer dough to a floured surface, cover with an inverted mixing bowl, and let rest for 15 minutes.

Knead dough until smooth and satiny, then place in a lightly greased mixing bowl and turn dough to coat. Cover with a dish towel; let rise in a warm place until doubled, about 1 hour. Punch down dough; let rise again until almost doubled, about 1 hour.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (205 degrees C). Grease 2 baking sheets.

Turn dough out again onto a floured surface and divide into 3 equal pieces. Divide each piece into thirds. Roll each piece into a 12- to 16-inch strip. Braid 3 strips into a loaf to get 3 large, braided loaves.
Lift loaves onto the prepared baking sheets. Cover with a dish towel and let rise for 20 minutes.
Beat together 1 egg and water in a small bowl. Brush over loaves and sprinkle with sugar.
Bake in the preheated oven until the top is golden brown, 25 to 30 minutes. Check occasionally because the bottoms of loaves can burn quickly.

name: Finnish Salmon Soup (lohikeitto)

ingredients.item: 500 g de salmón fresco (sin piel y sin espinas)
200 ml de nata para cocinar (crema de leche)
Eneldo o perejil fresco para decorar

instructions: Primero, pelamos y cortamos las patatas en cubos pequeños. Luego, limpiamos el puerro y la zanahoria, y los cortamos en rodajas finas. Picamos finamente la cebolla y los dientes de ajo. Finalmente, lavamos el salmón y lo cortamos en trozos de tamaño bocado.

En una olla grande, derretimos la mantequilla a fuego medio. Añadimos la cebolla, el puerro y el ajo, y los salteamos hasta que estén tiernos y fragantes. Después, añadimos la zanahoria y las patatas, y cocinamos durante unos minutos más, removiendo ocasionalmente.

Vertemos el caldo de pescado en la olla y añadimos la hoja de laurel. Llevamos a ebullición, reducimos el fuego y dejamos que las verduras se cocinen a fuego lento durante unos 15-20 minutos, o hasta que estén tiernas.

Agregamos los trozos de salmón a la olla. Cocinamos a fuego lento durante unos 5-7 minutos, o hasta que el salmón esté cocido y tierno. Después, añadimos la nata a la olla y removemos bien para que la sopa tenga una textura cremosa. Cocinamos a fuego lento durante unos minutos más para que todos los sabores se mezclen bien.

Sazonamos la sopa con sal y pimienta al gusto. Dejamos que se cocine a fuego lento durante unos minutos más para que todos los sabores se integren. Servimos la lohikeitto caliente, decorada con un poco de eneldo o perejil fresco por encima.

name: Finnish-american Flatbread
instructions: Stir together warm water and sugar in a large bowl. Sprinkle yeast over the top and let stand until foamy, about 5 minutes.

Stir in whole wheat flour, rye flour, and salt. Mix in bread flour, 1 cup at a time, until dough is not sticky. Knead on a floured surface until smooth and elastic, about 10 minutes. Place in an oiled bowl, turning to coat. Set aside to rise until doubled in size, about 1 hour.
Punch down dough and divide into 4 or 5 portions. Form each portion into a ball; let rise again until doubled, about 20 minutes.
Place each ball onto a baking sheet and flatten out into an oval, 1/2 to 3/4 inch thick. Poke holes all over using the tines of a fork. Let rise again until doubled, 20 to 30 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Bake in the preheated oven until browned on the top and bottom, about 20 minutes. Brush the tops with melted butter while still warm.

name: Fino Martini
instructions: Combine 2 oz. gin and ¾ oz. fino sherry in a mixing glass with ice. Stir until thoroughly chilled, 30–40 seconds. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass and garnish with a lemon twist or olive.

name: Fiorentini With Butternut Squash

ingredients.prep: from about 1/2 peeled medium squash; shredded with the coarse grating attachment on a food processor or on a box grater

ingredients.item: Fiorentini or other short curled pasta
Finely grated parmesan or grana padano plus more

instructions: Heat oil and butter in a large heavy pot over medium heat. Add squash and sage and cook, stirring occasionally, until squash begins to brown, about 2 minutes.
Meanwhile, cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until al dente. Drain pasta, reserving 2 cups pasta cooking liquid.

Add pasta and 1/2 cup pasta cooking liquid to squash and stir to coat. Cook over medium heat, stirring, adding more cooking liquid as needed, until sauce coats pasta. Stir in 1/2 cup Parmesan. Divide pasta among bowls; top with more Parmesan.

name: Fiori Di Sicilia Pound Cake

ingredients.prep: weighing roughly 200 g, in their shells
preferably european, melted and slightly cooled

ingredients.item: The grated zest of 1 lemon or orange

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C. Butter and flour a 9 x 5-inch loaf pan.

Separate the eggs and let them come to room temperature. In a good-sized mixing bowl, whisk the egg yolks to break them up a bit. Add the sugar and whisk until they are thick and pale. Add the melted butter, vanilla, fiori di Sicilia extract, and lemon zest and whisk until smooth. Add the flour and stir with a rubber spatula until no streaks remain.

Using electric beaters or in a stand mixer, beat the egg whites until they form soft peaks. Add the salt and beat until they form stiff peaks. Stir a quarter of the whites into the yolk mixture to lighten it. Then gently fold the remaining egg whites into the batter.

Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake for 55 minutes, or until a knife inserted into the center of the cake comes out nearly clean. Allow the cake to cool for 10 minutes in the pan, then remove to a wire rack.
Serve at room temperature. If not eating the cake until later, allow it to cool all the way to room temperature, then wrap it in plastic and store at room temperature.

name: Fire-roasted Cherry Tomato Salsa

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Set oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source and preheat the oven's broiler. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and brush with olive oil.
Spread tomatoes, onion, garlic, and jalapeño peppers onto prepared baking sheet.
Cook under the preheated broiler for 5 minutes. Turn the baking sheet and continue broiling until vegetables are charred, about 5 minutes more. Cool slightly.
Remove garlic from skins; discard skins.

Blend tomatoes, onion, peeled garlic, jalapeños, any accumulated juices from the baking sheet, cilantro leaves, lime juice, cumin, cayenne pepper, and oregano in a blender until salsa is smooth. Transfer to a bowl, cover with plastic wrap, and refrigerate until flavors blend, at least 2 hours. Season with salt and black pepper.

name: Fire-roasted Corn And Beef Skillet Pie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Cook ground beef, stirring and breaking up lumps, in a large cast iron skillet until browned, about 10 minutes. Stir in pasta sauce and corn. Bring to a boil, then stir in cheese.
Unroll breadstick dough and loosely weave on top of filling.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown and bubbly, 20 to 25 minutes. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.

name: Fire-roasted Corn Salsa
instructions: Combine tomatoes, onion, cilantro, lime juice, and cumin in a large bowl.
Preheat an outdoor grill to medium heat and lightly oil the grate.
Coat corn and jalapeno peppers with olive oil.
Place corn and jalapenos on the preheated grill and cook, turning every 3 minutes, until corn is charred, about 15 minutes total. Transfer to a cutting board and let cool 5 minutes.
Dice jalapenos and cut corn kernels from the cob. Add jalapenos and corn kernels to the bowl of tomato-onion mixture; stir until well combined. Season with salt and pepper.

name: Fireball® Horchata Pops
instructions: Grind rice finely using a coffee or spice grinder. Transfer to a large bowl; add cinnamon sticks. Pour in warm water. Cover with plastic wrap and let sit, 8 hours to overnight.

Strain rice mixture through a sieve set over a bowl. Press against the rice with a wooden spoon to squeeze out as much liquid as possible; discard rice. Stir rice milk and sugar into strained liquid to make horchata.
Measure 2 1/2 cups horchata into another bowl. Add cinnamon whiskey, cayenne pepper, and 1/4 teaspoon ground cinnamon. Pour into ice pop molds.
Freeze until solid, at least 12 hours.
Run molds under warm water to release ice pops. Sprinkle with an additional dash of cinnamon before serving.

name: Firebird Chicken
instructions: Combine habanero peppers, garlic, and salt in a mortar and pestle; mash into a fine paste. Whisk in Sriracha and egg to combine; set aside.
Remove tenderloins from breasts; slice each remaining breast in half lengthwise, cutting at a 45-degree angle to create two relatively equal strips.
Place all 6 chicken strips on a plate; generously dust all sides with rice flour until completely covered.

Pour habanero mixture over chicken strips using tongs to make sure each chicken strip is evenly coated and that there are no dry spots. Wrap the plate in plastic wrap; marinate in the refrigerator 2 to 12 hours.
Heat oil in a nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add chicken; cook until well browned and no longer pink in centers, about 3 minutes per side. Serve immediately.

name: Firecracker Chicken
instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Place a rack in the center of the oven.
Combine cornstarch, ginger, pepper, and 1 teaspoon salt in a large bowl. Place beaten eggs in a separate large, shallow bowl. Add chicken to cornstarch mixture and toss to coat.
Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high until shimmering.
While oil is heating, transfer 1/3 of the chicken to dish with eggs and toss to coat.

Use a slotted spoon to transfer chicken to the hot skillet and cook in hot oil, turning once, until chicken is golden on both sides, about 2 minutes per side (chicken will not be cooked through at this point). Transfer to a 9x13-inch baking dish. Repeat with remaining chicken, adding 1 tablespoon of oil to the skillet per new batch (3 batches total).
Stir together honey, hot sauce, vinegar, crushed red pepper, and remaining 1/2 teaspoon salt in a bowl. Pour over chicken in the baking dish and stir to coat.

Bake in the preheated oven until chicken is no longer pink in the center and the juices run clear, stirring halfway through, 25 to 30 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center of the chicken should read 74°C (74 degrees C).
Serve over rice and sprinkle with scallions and sesame seeds.

name: Firecracker Salmon
instructions: Combine 1/4 cup maple syrup, 1/2 of the jalapeño pepper, garlic, vinegar, salt, and black pepper in a mini food processor or small blender jar; blend until smooth.

Place salmon fillets in a gallon-sized resealable plastic bag. Pour marinade on top, seal, and refrigerate for 20 minutes. Remove from refrigerator and let the bag sit at room temperature for 10 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Remove salmon from marinade and pat dry. Place salmon on the prepared baking sheet and season with additional salt and pepper. Slice remaining jalapeno pepper thinly and place on top of salmon.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10 minutes. Brush 2 teaspoons maple syrup onto the fillets and return to the hot oven. Bake until fish flakes easily with a fork, an additional 3 to 5 minutes.

name: Firehouse Chicken
instructions: Purée garlic, vinegar, olive oil, salt, parsley, paprika, pepper, and ½ cup vegetable oil in a blender until smooth. Place chicken in a large resealable plastic bag and pour marinade over. Seal bag and chill chicken 1–3 days.
Remove chicken from marinade and pat dry with paper towels. Let sit uncovered at room temperature 1 hour.

Preheat oven to 400°. Heat remaining ½ cup vegetable oil in a large cast-iron skillet over medium heat. Place 1 chicken half, skin side down, in skillet, set another skillet or heavy pot on top, and add a couple of cans to weigh it down. Cook until skin is browned and crisp, 15–20 minutes. Transfer chicken to a wire rack set inside a rimmed baking sheet. Repeat with remaining chicken half.

Roast chicken in oven, skin side up, until cooked through and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of thigh registers 165°, 20–25 minutes. Transfer to a cutting board and let rest 15 minutes before slicing.

name: Firehouse Chili And Cornbread Casserole
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over high heat. Add ground beef, onion, and salt. Cook and stir with a wooden spoon or spatula until meat is browned and crumbled into small pieces, about 5 minutes. Stir in flour and cook for 2 minutes. Add poblano pepper, garlic, chili powder, cumin, black pepper, cayenne, and oregano; cook, stirring, for 2 to 3 minutes.

Stir in diced tomatoes and crushed tomatoes. Measure water using the empty tomato cans and pour into the pot. Bring to a simmer, stirring occasionally, then reduce heat to medium-low. Let simmer, stirring occasionally, for 30 minutes before stirring in kidney beans. Continue simmering until bubbling and fragrant, about 30 minutes more. Taste for seasoning and adjust.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Place a deep 9x13-inch baking dish on a baking sheet. Transfer chili to the dish, being sure to leave at least 1 inch of space at the top. Stir to evenly distribute.

Make crust: Whisk together corn muffin mix, 1/2 cup Cheddar cheese, milk, and eggs in a large bowl until smooth. Spoon batter evenly over chili until the surface is covered. Sprinkle with remaining 1/2 cup Cheddar cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven until cornbread crust is browned and a toothpick inserted into crust comes out clean, about 30 minutes.
Spoon or ladle into a dish and garnish with sour cream and cilantro.

name: Firehouse Cornbread By The 3s
instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Lightly grease a 15x10x2-inch baking pan.
Whisk flour, cornmeal, sugar, baking powder, and salt together in a bowl; stir in milk, vegetable oil, and eggs until batter is evenly combined. Pour batter into prepared baking dish.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted in the center of the loaf comes out clean, about 33 minutes.

name: Firehouse Haluski

ingredients.prep: cored and cut into bite-size pieces

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil and cook kluski noodles until tender, about 8 minutes. Drain, chop noodles into small pieces, and set aside.

Cook cabbage and onion, covered, in a large pot with water over medium heat until tender, 8 to 10 minutes. Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat and transfer cabbage and onion into skillet with a slotted spoon. Cook in the hot oil until vegetables begin to brown, about 10 minutes; stir in kielbasa and continue to cook until sausage is heated through. Stir mustard seeds into cabbage mixture; season to taste with salt and black pepper. Stir chopped kluski into the mixture.
Pour eggs over the noodle mixture and stir until eggs are set, 3 to 5 minutes.

name: Fireplace Eggnog
instructions: Add 8 oz. whole milk and 4 oz. heavy cream to a small saucepan, bring to a simmer over medium heat, then reduce heat to low (you want the mixture to be about 140°). Turn ½ vanilla bean inside out and add to the saucepan with 1 tsp. loose smoky tea. Simmer to infuse flavor, about 10 minutes. Strain milk mixture into a liquid measuring cup, then let cool about 5 minutes.

Crack 4 large eggs into a small bowl to make sure there are no shards of shell, then add to a blender and blend on low to medium-low until very frothy, about 3 minutes. Add milk mixture and ½ cup demerara sugar and blend until sugar is fully dissolved, about 2 minutes. Slowly add 4 oz. high-proof bourbon, 2 oz. aged rum, and 2 oz. tawny port and continue to blend on medium-low until everything is fully integrated and mixture is frothy and aerated, about 5 minutes.
