8.  Üzerine önce dana mortadella salamı sonra da büyük top mozzarella peyniri  4’e bölerek yerleştirin.
9.  Afiyet olsun.
10. Focaccia Sandviç Tarifinin Püf Noktaları Nelerdir?Focaccia hamurunu en az 30 dakika mayalanması için bekletin.
11. Oda sıcaklığının yüksek olması, hamurun daha çabuk mayalanmasını sağlar.
12. Fırını önceden ısıtarak her tarafın eşit pişmesini sağlayabilirsiniz.
13. Hazırladığınız focaccia sandviçi, pamuklu beze sararak saklayabilirsiniz.

name: Focaccia With Peppers And Red Onions
instructions: 1. Unu hamur yoğurma kabına eleyin.
2.  Ortasını çukur şeklinde açıp maya, şeker ve tuzu ekleyin.
3.  Azar azar ılık su ekleyip ele yapışır bir hamur yoğurun.
4.  Hamuru içi yağlanmış bir cam kaseye alıp üzerini streç filmle kapatın.
5.  Oda ısısında hamur kabarana kadar bekletin.
6.  İyice kabardıktan sonra ellerinizi biraz sıvıyağ ile yağlayın ve hamuru tekrar yoğurun.
7.  Kabarması için yine aynı kasede aynı şekilde mayalanmaya bırakın.
8.  Kuru domatesleri sıcak suda bekletin.
9.  Hafifçe yumuşadıktan sonra kağıt havlu üzerine alıp suyunu süzün.
10.  Soğanın kabuğunu soyup halka şeklinde dilimleyin.
11.  Biberlerin çekirdeklerini temizleyip parmak şeklinde doğrayın.
12.  Zeytinyağlı karışım için zeytinyağını hafifçe ısıtıp baharatları ekleyin.
13.  Hamuru içi yağlanmış fırın tepsisine alın.
14.  Parmak uçlarınızla bastırarak tepsiye yayın.
15.  Üzerine baharatlı zeytinyağı sürüp sebzeleri dizin.
16.  Kalan yağı sebzelerin üzerine gezdirip dökün.
17.  Önceden ısıtılmış 200 derece fırında 35-40 dakika pişirin (pişirme süresinin ortasında sebzelerin üzerine yağlı kağıt konulmasını tavsiye ediyoruz).
18.  Fırından çıkardıktan sonra ızgara teli üzerinde ılınmaya bırakın.
19.  Servis yapın.

name: Foccaccia With Sausage

ingredients.item: Yarım çay bardağı dilimlenmiş yeşil zeytin

instructions: 1. Unu bir kaba eleyip ortasını açın.
2.  Süt ile karıştırarak erittiğiniz mayayı ve tuzu ilave edin.
3.  Suyu ve zeytinyağını ekleyip maya tamamen eriyinceye kadar yoğurun.
4.  Hamurun üzerini nemli bir bezle örtüp en az 40 dakika mayalandırın.
5.  Dinlenen hamuru bir fırın kabına yayın.
6.  Üzerine parmağınızla bastırıp çukurlar açarak küp dilimlediğiniz sucuk ve dilimlenmiş yeşil zeytini yerleştirin.
7.  Önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında 25 - 30 dakika pişirin.
8.  Fırından çıkarınca üzerine çok az zeytinyağı sürün.
9.  Soğuduktan sonra dilimleyerek servis yapın.

name: Foccacia
instructions: 1. Mayayı ılık suya atıp eriyinceye kadar karıştırın ve 10 dakika bekletin.
2. Geniş bir kaseye unu eleyin.
3.  Ortasını havuz gibi açıp şeker, tuz, zeytinyağı ve mayayı ekleyin ve yoğurun.
4.  Üzerini örterek 40 dakika mayalanmaya bırakın.
5. Hamuru unlanmış zeminde merdane ile dikdörtgen şeklinde açın.
6.  Yağlı kağıt üzerine alın ve bıçakla 3-4 kesik oluşturun.
7.  Hamuru yağlı kağıt ile birlikte fırın tepsisine aktarın.
8.  Üzerini örterek tekrar 30 dakika dinlendirin.
9. Zeytinyağını yumurta sarısı ile karıştırıp hamurun üzerine sürün.
10.  Zeytinin çekirdeklerini çıkartıp üzerine dizin.
11.  Taze biberiye yaprakları ve susam serpiştirip 190 dereceye ayarlanmış fırında kızarıncaya kadar pişirin.
12.  Servis yapın.

name: Foccacia With Olives And Dried Tomatoes
instructions: 1. Geniş bir kapta un, maya, şeker ve tuzu harmanlayın.
2.  Zeytinyağı ve suyu azar azar ekleyip 5 dakika yoğurun.
3.  Gerekirse un ilavesi yapın.
4.  Üzerini örterek 1 saat mayalanmaya bırakın.
5.  Sarımsağı rendeleyip hamura ekleyin.
6.  Zeytin, biberiye yaprağı ve domatesi ilave edip karıştırın.
7.  Hamuru yağlanmış fırın tepsisine bastırarak yayın ve üzerini örterek 30 dakika dinlendirin.
8.  200 derece fırında 25 dakika pişirin.
9.  Ilındıktan sonra dilimleyerek servis yapın.

name: Foil Pack Chicken And Rainbow Veggies
instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C/200˚C.
Place red onion, broccoli, yellow bell pepper, baby carrots, and cherry tomatoes evenly on a baking tray. (Try not to let the vegetables overlap too much so they roast properly.)
Season with olive oil, salt, and pepper (to taste).
Add sprigs of thyme and garlic clove halves on top of the vegetables.
Tear off four pieces of aluminum foil, approximately 12 in x 12 in (30 x 30 cm).
Lay down the foil and place the chicken breast in the center for each one.
Season both sides of the chicken with olive oil, salt, pepper, and paprika (all to taste).
Add sprigs of thyme and garlic clove on top of each chicken breast.
Bring the top and bottom edge of the foil into the center and fold a couple of times. Fold in the left and right sides a couple of times to seal the foil pack.
Place all 4 chicken foil packs on a baking tray.
Bake for 30 minutes.
Enjoy!

name: Folar De Carnes – Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 saquete fermento padeiro seco ou 25 gr  fermento padeiro húmido

instructions: Coloque numa tigela o fermento com a água, mexendo bem  Junte depois o azeite, os ovos e a farinha  Polvilhe com um pouco de sal e amasse tudo muito bem até que fique uma massa homogênea e muito bem ligada  Se necessário polvilhe com um pouco de farinha

Polvilhe um pouco de farinha numa tigela, coloque a massa, polvilhe com mais um pouco de farinha e cubra com um pano húmido ou película aderente  Deixe levedar até que fique com o triplo do seu volume  Decorrido esse tempo, retire a massa da tigela, amasse novamente e divida em duas partes

Unte um tabuleiro com azeite e disponha uma das partes da massa, estique com a mão até cobrir todo o tabuleiro  Retire o coirato do bacon e corte em pedaços  Retire a pele ao chouriço e corte em rodelas  Disponha todos os enchidos por cima da massa

Estique a restante massa numa bancada polvilhada com farinha e disponha por cima  Pincele com a mistura da gema e deixe levedar mais um pouco até crescer aproximadamente 2 dedos de altura  Leve depois ao forno pré-aquecido a 180 graus durante 35 a 40 minutos até que fique cozida e douradinha  Retire do forno, desenforme e sirva decorado a gosto

name: Folar De Olhão

ingredients.item: 1  saqueta de fermento de padeiro seco

instructions: Numa tigela, dissolva bem o fermento no leite morno. Junte depois os ovos, o sumo de laranja, a manteiga, a erva-doce e a farinha. Amasse bem até ficar uma massa bem homogénea. Se necessário, polvilhe com um pouco mais de farinha.
Coloque a massa numa tigela, cubra com um pano húmido e deixe levedar até ficar com o dobro do volume.

Nessa altura, amasse novamente a massa e estenda-a sobre a bancada polvilhada com farinha. Unte-a com manteiga amolecida e polvilhe-a com açúcar amarelo e canela. Corte em tiras largas e enrole-as umas nas outras, conforme vê na foto. Coloque numa forma (22 cm de diâmetro), previamente untada com manteiga, e deixe levedar durante mais 30 minutos.

Decorrido o tempo indicado, pincele o folar com a mistura da gema com o leite. Leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºC, durante cerca de 35 minutos. Retire, desenforme e deixe arrefecer. Sirva cortado em fatias.

name: Folar De Vouzela
instructions: Misture a farinha com o açúcar e uma pitada de sal e disponha na bancada da cozinha. Abra uma cavidade no centro, adicione os ovos, a raspa do limão e a manteiga derretida e amasse, juntando, aos poucos, o fermento dissolvido no leite morno.
Quando estiver bem ligado, forme uma bola com a massa, coloque-a numa tigela polvilhada com farinha e deixe-a levedar, até duplicar de volume.
Divida a massa em duas partes iguais, estenda-as com o rolo, pincele-as com manteiga, polvilhe-as com açúcar e enrole-as, de modo a que a parte polvilhada fique no interior.

Dê o formato de ferradura (em u) às massas, deixe-as levedar mais um pouco e depois disponha-as num tabuleiro, forrado com papel vegetal. Pincele com ovo batido, polvilhe novamente com açúcar e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºc, por cerca de 35 minutos.

name: Folar From Trás-os-montes
instructions: Para preparar esta receita simples, deite os ovos para o copo do robot, junte a manteiga, o azeite, a pitada de sal, a farinha e o fermento e programe a 37°C (40°C na Mycook), durante 5 minutos, na velocidade especial para massas. Polvilhe com mais um pouco de farinha se necessário para a massa descolar do copo.

Retire depois a massa do copo, polvilhe-a com farinha, enrole-a e coloque numa tigela também polvilhada com farinha. Faça um corte em cruz por cima, polvilhe novamente com farinha, cubra com um pano húmido e deixe levedar até ficar com o dobro do tamanho.

Ligue o forno a 180 graus. Retire o couro ao presunto e ao toucinho e corte-os em pedaços pequenos. Corte o salpicão em rodelas. Estenda a massa, disponha-lhe as carnes por cima, amasse novamente, coloque numa forma redonda untada com óleo e deixe levedar mais 10 minutos. Pincele depois com a gema batida, leve ao forno cerca de 45 minutos, verifique a cozedura com um palito, retire do forno, desenforme, deixe arrefecer e sirva.

name: Folar Rich In Meat

ingredients.item: 20 g de fermento seco de padeiro
100 g de entremeada de porco salgada e demolhada

instructions: Dissolva o fermento na água morna. Deite a farinha em cima da bancada, abra uma cavidade, junte o sal, o açúcar, o azeite, os ovos, a manteiga amolecida e a mistura do fermento, misture bem e trabalhe bem a massa até se descolar da bancada e das mãos. Faça uma bola com a massa, coloque-a numa tigela polvilhada com farinha, cubra com um pano e deixe levedar, em local quente, até triplicar o volume.

Corte as carnes e os enchidos em pedacinhos. Unte ligeiramente o tabuleiro do forno com azeite. Deite de novo a massa em cima da bancada polvilhada com farinha, trabalhe-a um pouco e estenda-a depois em forma de rectângulo. Espalhe em cima e na parte central as carnes e os enchidos, dobre as margens para dentro de forma a cobrir, coloque no tabuleiro e deixe levedar mais 40 minutos.

Pincele com ovo batido e leve ao forno pré-aquecido a 180ºC durante cerca de 45 minutos. Se verificar que está a ficar com demasiada cor, baixe a temperatura do forno para os 160 graus. Depois retire, deixe arrefecer um pouco e sirva morno ou frio.

name: Folar Sweet Sausage From The Azores
original_name: Folar doce de linguiça dos Açores

ingredients.item: 11 g de fermento de padeiro seco

instructions: PREPARAÇÃO

Dissolva o fermento no leite morno. Deite a farinha na bancada, abra uma cavidade no centro, deite aí o açúcar, o sal, a manteiga, os ovos e o leite com o fermento. Misture tudo muito bem e trabalhe a massa até esta se descolar da bancada e das mãos. Forme uma bola, coloque-a numa tigela polvilhada com farinha, cubra com um pano e deixe levedar, em local quente, até triplicar de volume.

Entretanto, retire a pele às linguiças e corte-as em pedaços. Depois de levedada, deite novamente a massa sobre a bancada, molde em forma de bola e achate-a. Coloque-a num tabuleiro, polvilhado com farinha, e pincele com ovo batido.
Disponha os pedaços de linguiça por cima do folar, pressionando um pouco. Tape com um pano e deixe levedar por mais 30 minutos.
De seguida, pincele novamente todo o folar com ovo batido e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºC, durante 40 minutos. Retire, deixe arrefecer e sirva.

name: Fontina Mac With Squash And Sage

ingredients.prep: peeled, seeded and cut into 1/2-inch pieces

instructions: Heat oven to 375°. On a parchment paper-lined baking sheet, shape Parmesan into 8 2-inch rounds. Bake until golden, 10 minutes; remove from sheet to cool. Cook pasta as directed on package; set aside. In a medium skillet over medium heat, melt 2 teaspoons butter. Cook whole sage leaves until crisp, 45 seconds. Transfer to a paper towel-lined plate, reserving butter. In the same skillet over medium heat, melt remaining 2 tablespoons butter. Add flour and cook, whisking constantly, until light brown, 1 minute. Slowly whisk in milk and cook, 5 minutes. Add squash, garlic, reserved butter and salt. Cover; simmer until squash is very soft, 25 minutes. In a food processor, puree squash mixture. In a pot over medium-low heat, heat squash puree, Fontina, Swiss, chopped sage and cayenne; stir until cheese melts. Stir in pasta. Serve with Parmesan crisps and sage leaves.

name: Food Processor Butter
instructions: Process cream in a food processor until the butter solids have separated from the buttermilk and you see lots of little clumps of butter clinging together distinctly separated from thin milky liquid, 4–7 minutes (unpasteurized cream will separate more quickly). Carefully drain buttermilk; reserve for another use.

Remove jar with blade still attached. Pour cold water over butter solids left in food processor jar, then drain. Repeat until water runs clear, 3–4 times. Pour off as much water as possible out of jar of food processor, using your hands to hold the butter solids in place while you pour. Continue to process until butter forms a solid ball, about 2 minutes. Pour off water again, then add salt (if using) and process to combine.
If making compound butter, add ingredients for chosen flavor and process until fully incorporated.

Transfer butter to a medium bowl lined with a double layer of cheesecloth. Gather cheesecloth up around butter and twist to squeeze until no more liquid runs out of butter. Transfer butter to a sheet of parchment or waxed paper and roll up into a log. Chill until firm, about 1 hour.
Do Ahead: Butter can be made 5 days ahead. Keep chilled.

name: Food Processor Chocolate Whipped Cream Frosting
instructions: Place cream, sugar, cocoa powder, and vanilla in a food processor with the whip attachment. Mix on high until stiff peaks form, about 3 minutes.

name: Foolproof Fish With Spiced Chickpeas

ingredients.prep: such as cod, halibut, haddock, or hake

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 300°. Time to do some prep! Peel 2 shallots. Cut in half lengthwise, then slice crosswise. Divide shallots between a medium bowl and a small bowl.
Coarsely chop ½ cup raisins and transfer to medium bowl with shallots.

Add 2 Tbsp. red wine vinegar and ¼ tsp. salt to shallot mixture and toss gently with a spoon to combine. This marinated mixture is the beginning of a tangy, herby finishing sauce for the fish, but we're going to wait until the last second to add the mint leaves, otherwise they'll oxidize and go brown. Set both bowls aside.
Peel 3 garlic cloves, then thinly slice.
Using a spoon, peel 1½" piece ginger, then finely chop. (We always like peeling ginger with a spoon, rather than a vegetable peeler—all the better for maneuvering around those knobby bits.)
Rinse 2 medium or 3 small carrots well. (You can peel them if the exteriors are really gnarly, but if not don't bother.) Slice as thinly as possibly into coins on a diagonal.
Drain and rinse two 15-oz. cans chickpeas.

Drizzle 3 Tbsp. olive oil in a medium cast-iron skillet and heat over medium. Add reserved shallots (not shallot-raisin mixture). Cook, stirring occasionally, until light golden in color, 3–5 minutes.
Add garlic, ginger, 1 tsp. turmeric, and ½ tsp. crushed red pepper flakes and cook, stirring constantly, until fragrant, about 1 minute.

Increase heat to medium-high and add chickpeas, carrots, 1 Tbsp. olive oil, and ½ tsp. salt. Cook, stirring occasionally, until everything is combined and well coated and flavors have melded, 3–4 minutes. Remove pan from heat.

Cut 1½ lb. whitefish into even portions if needed so they will fit in your pan. Season fish on all sides with 1½ tsp. salt. Nestle into chickpea mixture in pan and transfer to oven. Bake fish until flesh just begins to flake away easily with light pressure from a fork, looks very juicy, and is just barely opaque, 15–20 minutes. (This will vary greatly depending on how thick your fish is, so keep an eye on the fish and start to take a look at around 15 minutes.)
Coarsely chop 1 cup mint and add to bowl with reserved shallot-raisin mixture. Add remaining 3 Tbsp. olive oil and toss to combine.
Spoon mint salsa over fish. Divide among plates, or serve right from skillet.

name: Foolproof Flat Iron Steaks
instructions: Place steaks, balsamic vinegar, olive oil, green onions, garlic, soy sauce, thyme, mustard, and black pepper in an extra large resealable plastic bag, squeeze out excess air, and seal the bag. Knead the bag with your hands to distribute ingredients evenly and completely coat the steaks. Marinate in the refrigerator for 1 hour.
Preheat grill for medium-high heat and lightly oil the grate. Remove steaks from refrigerator and let sit at room temperature for 10 minutes.
Remove steaks from bag and discard marinade.

Cook steaks on the preheated grill until they start to firm and are reddish-pink and juicy in the center, 6 to 7 minutes per side. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read 54°C (54 degrees C). Remove steaks to a plate and let rest for 5 minutes before slicing.

name: Foolproof Lemon Bars

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 325°. Line an 8x8" baking pan with parchment paper, leaving overhang on all sides. Pulse 1¼ cups (156 g) all-purpose flour, ¼ cup (28 g) powdered sugar, and ¾ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a food processor to combine. Add 7 Tbsp. chilled unsalted butter, cut into pieces, and pulse until mixture is sandy with very small butter pieces. Add 1 large egg yolk and pulse until combined; mixture will be very dry looking and powdery but should hold together when squeezed in your hand.

Transfer mixture to prepared pan and spread into an even layer to fill pan. Using a flat-bottomed measuring cup or glass, pack into a compressed layer (use your fingers to get into the corners). Bake crust until golden, 27–29 minutes. Let cool 5 minutes. (Set a timer; you don’t want to go longer. The crust needs to be warm when you add the lemon mixture.)

While the crust is baking, place 1 cup (200 g) granulated sugar and 2 tsp. finely grated lemon zest in a medium bowl. Using your fingers, massage zest into sugar until fragrant and lightly tinted yellow, about 1 minute. Add 3 large eggs, remaining 1 large egg yolk, and remaining 3 Tbsp. (23 g) all-purpose flour and gently whisk just until combined. Add ⅔ cup fresh lemon juice, ¼ cup whole milk, and remaining ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt; stir to combine.

As soon as the timer for the crust goes off, pour lemon mixture over (the hot crust will start to cook the filling and prevent the layers from inverting). Gently tap pan on counter to pop any air bubbles on surface and return pan to oven quickly. Bake until lemon mixture is set but still jiggles slightly when gently shaken, 20–25 minutes. Let lemon bar cool, then chill until cold, at least 4 hours.
Using parchment paper overhang, lift lemon bar from pan and place on a cutting board. Cut into 16 squares.

Dust lemon bars with powdered sugar just before serving.
Do Ahead: Lemon bars (without powdered sugar topping) can be baked 2 days ahead. Cover and keep chilled.

name: Foolproof Rib Roast
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Place a rack in a roasting pan.
Combine salt, pepper, and garlic powder in a small cup.
Place room-temperature roast on the rack in the roasting pan with the fatty side up and the rib side on the bottom. Rub the seasoning onto the roast.
Roast for 1 hour in the preheated oven. Turn the oven off and leave the roast inside for 3 hours, without opening the door.
Turn the oven back on to 191°C (190 degrees C) and reheat the roast for 30 to 40 minutes. The internal temperature should be at least 63°C (62 degrees C).
Remove from the oven and let rest for 10 minutes before carving.
Serve hot and enjoy!

name: Foolproof Roast Chicken

ingredients.item: ( 0.5 stick) unsalted butter or extra-virgin olive oil

instructions: Arrange a rack in the center of your oven, and preheat to 218°C (218°C). Cut 1 lemon in half crosswise and remove any visible seeds.
Cut 1 head of garlic in half crosswise.
Melt ½ stick butter in a small saucepan or microwave in a small bowl.
Place the 3–4-lb. whole chicken on a cutting board. Pat the entire chicken dry with paper towels; this is crucial for browning.

With chicken breast facing up and legs pointing toward you, use a sharp knife to slice through the loose skin connecting the leg and breast, making about a 3-inch-long incision. Continue cutting downward until you hit the joint that connects the thigh to the body, then stop. Repeat on the second side. This exposes the leg joint, making it easy to tell if the chicken is cooked.

Season every surface of the chicken generously with salt and pepper, including the skin along the backbone, inside the cavity, under the wings, and the exposed part of the leg. If using kosher salt, this should be 4–5 generous pinches (around 4 whole teaspoons).
Transfer chicken breast side up to a large oven-safe skillet. Arrange the lemon and garlic cut sides down in the skillet around the chicken.
Drizzle the chicken all over with the melted butter and transfer to the oven.

Roast until the chicken is nicely browned and cooked through, checking for doneness after 45 minutes. To check, carefully remove the skillet from the oven, poke a knife into the leg joints, and pierce the meat. If juices run clear, the chicken is done. If you see a rosy pink color, it needs more time. Continue to roast, checking every 5 minutes, until the juices run clear.

Let the chicken rest in the skillet for at least 15 minutes before carving. This allows the juices to settle. Transfer the chicken to a platter. Pour all the pan juices over top of the meat and serve with the roasted lemon and garlic alongside.

name: Foolproof Spatchcocked Turkey

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 2 tbsp. plus 2 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: neck and giblets removed, patted dry

instructions: Mix ¼ cup Diamond Crystal or 2 Tbsp. plus 2 tsp. Morton kosher salt, 1 Tbsp. freshly ground black pepper, and 1 Tbsp. light brown sugar in a small bowl; this is your dry brine.

To spatchcock the turkey, place one 12–14-lb. turkey, neck and giblets removed, patted dry, breast side down, on a cutting board. Using sharp kitchen shears, cut along both sides of the backbone to remove it. Using a chef’s knife, make a small incision down the long oblong bone in the center of breast. Turn turkey skin side up and press down on breastbone to flatten—you should hear a crack.

Place turkey, skin side up, on a wire rack set inside a large rimmed baking sheet. Rub dry brine all over turkey, pressing to adhere, and chill, uncovered, 12–18 hours. (The skin should look tight and dry.)

Place a rack in bottom third of oven and preheat to 425°. Remove wire rack with turkey from baking sheet; set aside. Rinse off excess salt from baking sheet and dry. Place a few layers of aluminum foil on baking sheet (this will make clean up much easier) and return rack with turkey to baking sheet. Tuck wing tips behind breast to prevent then from burning in the oven. Let sit at room temperature 30 minutes.

Mix ½ cup (1 stick) unsalted butter, room temperature, ¼ cup thyme leaves, from 8–10 sprigs, and 4 garlic cloves, finely chopped, in a small bowl. Using your hands, carefully separate skin from meat as best as you can and rub butter mixture under the skin. Rub turkey all over with 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil.

Pour ½ cup water into baking sheet and roast spatchcock turkey, rotating baking sheet halfway through, until skin is deep golden brown and crisp and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of breast registers 150°, about 1 hour 25 minutes. (Start checking temperature after 1 hour, or use meat thermometer with a probe that you can leave in the breast while it roasts.) Transfer cooked turkey to a cutting board. Let turkey rest 15–20 minutes before carving.
Now onto the rest of the Thanksgiving dinner. Sweet potato casserole, roasted veggies, and more of our favorite Thanksgiving side dishes await →

name: For Chocolate Lovers: White Chocolate Brownie Recipe
original_name: Çikolata Tutkunlarına: Beyaz Çikolatalı Brownie Tarifi
instructions: 1. Fırını 170°C’ye (fanlı fırın 160°C) ısıtın.
2.  Kare veya dikdörtgen bir fırın kabını yağlayın ve tabanını yağlı kağıt ile kaplayın.
3. Benmari usulü veya mikrodalgada bitter çikolatayı ve tereyağını birlikte eritin.
4.  Homojen bir karışım elde edin ve hafifçe ılınması için kenara alın.
5. Yumurtaları, toz şekeri ve vanilyayı derin bir kapta mikserle köpük köpük olana kadar çırpın.
6. Ilınmış çikolata-tereyağı karışımını yumurtalı karışıma yavaş yavaş ekleyin ve spatula ile nazikçe karıştırın.
7. Un ve tuzu eleyerek karışıma ekleyin.
8.  Hamur homojen olana kadar spatula ile karıştırın.
9. Parçalanmış beyaz çikolatayı hamura ilave edip nazikçe karıştırın.
10. Hamuru hazırladığınız fırın kabına dökün ve önceden ısıtılmış fırında 25–30 dakika pişirin.
11.  Kürdan testi yapın; içi hafif nemli kalmalı.
12. Fırından çıktıktan sonra oda sıcaklığında soğutun.
13.  Dilimleyerek servis edin.
14.  İstersen pudra şekeri veya çikolata sosu ile süsleyebilirsiniz.
15.  Afiyet olsun.

name: For Winter Tables: Tomato And Pepper Pickle Recipe
original_name: Kış Sofralarına: Domatesli Biberli Turşu Tarifi

ingredients.item: 500 gr taze biber (tatlı veya acı, tercihe göre)
Sivri biber yerine kapya biber, jalapeno veya kırmızı biber kullanabilirsiniz.
Acı sevenler için arnavut biberi veya acı yeşil biber eklenebilir.
Klasik domates yerine kiraz domates veya erik domates tercih edebilirsiniz; hem görsel olarak şık durur hem de daha az sulanır.
üzüm sirkesi yerine elma sirkesi kullanarak daha hafif bir tat elde edebilirsiniz.
Daha keskin bir aroma için beyaz sirke tercih edebilirsiniz.
Sarımsak yerine yeşil sarımsak kullanabilir ya da aromasını hafifletmek için daha az ekleyebilirsiniz.
Tane karabiber yerine defne yaprağı, kişniş tohumu, kimyon tohumu gibi baharatlarla farklı aromalar katabilirsiniz.
Hardal tohumu yerine kereviz tohumu kullanabilirsiniz.
Kaya tuzu yerine deniz tuzu veya turşuluk iri tuz tercih edebilirsiniz.
Farklı bir lezzet için kavanoza havuç, kereviz sapı veya taze fesleğen/dereotu ekleyebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Biberleri yıkayıp sap kısımlarını kesin.
2. Domatesleri küçük küpler halinde doğrayın.
3. Sarımsakları bütün veya ezilmiş olarak hazırlayın.
4. Temiz ve steril cam kavanozlara önce biberleri, ardından domates ve sarımsağı yerleştirin.
5. Aralarına tane karabiber ve hardal tohumu serpiştirin.
6. Su, sirke, tuz ve şekeri kaynatın, ardından soğumaya bırakın.
7. Soğuyan turşu suyunu sebzelerin üzerine dökün; sebzelerin tamamen suyun içinde kalmasına dikkat edin.
8. Kavanozları sıkıca kapatın.
9. Turşuyu serin ve karanlık bir yerde en az 10-12 gün bekletin.
10. Bu süre sonunda domatesli biberli turşunuz servise hazır.
11.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Forager Sandwich

ingredients.prep: ribs and stems removed, leaves chopped (about 6 cups)

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: challah, or potato rolls, split, buttered, lightly toasted

instructions: Toss shallot, thyme, mushrooms, oil, vinegar, and salt in a medium bowl. Let sit at room temperature 1 hour.
Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Cook onion and garlic, stirring often, until onion is softened and just translucent and garlic is golden, about 4 minutes.

Working in batches, add kale, tossing and letting it wilt slightly before adding more. Reduce heat to medium-low and cook kale, tossing often, until tender, 12–15 minutes. Mix in red pepper flakes and season with salt and pepper.
Place dried mushrooms in a small bowl and cover with boiling water; let stand until rehydrated and pliable, 5–8 minutes. Drain, squeeze out excess moisture, and finely chop.
Mix mushrooms, shallot, mayonnaise, lemon juice, and rosemary in a small bowl; season with salt and pepper. Cover and chill.
DO AHEAD: Mayonnaise can be made 3 days ahead. Keep chilled.
Heat oil in a medium skillet over high heat. Drain marinated mushrooms, pat dry, and cook until deep golden brown, 6–8 minutes per side.

Meanwhile, heat butter in a medium nonstick skillet over low heat and cook eggs, stirring occasionally with a heatproof spatula, until just barely set, about 4 minutes (or cook over easy, if you prefer).

Heat broiler. Spread cut sides of rolls with mushroom mayo (you may have some left over). Place rolls, cut side up, on a broilerproof rimmed baking sheet. Layer bottom halves of rolls with marinated mushrooms, kale mixture, scrambled eggs, and cheese. Broil until cheese is melted.
Close sandwiches and serve with hot sauce, if desired.

name: Forest Fruit And Cheese Cake
instructions: 1. Lezzet'in yemek tarifleri gibi kek tarifleri çok ilgi görüyor.
2.  Yumurta sarılarını aklarından ayırın.
3.  Peynir, süt, şeker ve yumurta sarılarını mikserle çırpın.
4.  Ayrı bir kapta yumurta aklarını kar haline gelinceye kadar çırpın ve labneli karışıma azar azar ekleyin.
5.  Çok karıştırmadan iki karışımı birleştirin.
6.  Taban hamuru için, oda sıcaklığında yumuşatılmış tereyağı, şeker, elenmiş un ve toz bademi ekmek kırıntısı kıvamına gelinceye kadar karıştırın.
7.  Top şekli verip un serpilmiş düz bir zeminde merdaneyle kalıbın tabanını ve kenarlarını kaplayacak büyüklükte açın.
8.  Yağlanmış kelepçeli kalıba yayın.
9.  Peynirli karışımı içine dökün.
10.  100 dereceye ayarlı fırında pişirip soğumaya bırakın.
11.  Üzerini süsleyin.
12.  Dilimleyip servis yapın.

name: Forest Fruit Brownie Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 su bardağı karışık orman meyvesi (çilek, böğürtlen, yaban mersini, frambuaz)

instructions: 1. Fırını 180°C’ye ısıtın ve kare bir fırın kabını yağlayıp unlayın.
2. Tereyağı ve çikolatayı benmari usulü eritin, pürüzsüz bir karışım elde edin.
3. Şekeri ve vanilyayı ekleyip karıştırın.
4.  Ardından yumurtaları teker teker ekleyerek homojen bir hamur elde edin.
5. Un, kakao, kabartma tozu ve tuzu eleyerek karışıma ekleyin, spatula ile nazikçe karıştırın.
6. Son olarak orman meyvelerini ve isteğe bağlı ceviz/fındık parçalarını hamura ekleyin.
7. Hamuru fırın kabına dökün ve önceden ısıtılmış fırında 25–30 dakika pişirin.
8. Fırından çıkardıktan sonra soğumasını bekleyin, dilimleyerek servis edin.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Forest Fruit Cake Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 su bardağı karışık orman meyvesi (böğürtlen, yaban mersini, ahududu, frenk üzümü – taze veya dondurulmuş)
Glütensiz tercih için badem unu, yulaf unu veya glütensiz un karışımı kullanabilirsiniz.
Daha hafif bir doku için unun bir kısmını nişasta ile değiştirebilirsiniz.
Rafine şeker yerine esmer şeker, hindistan cevizi şekeri, bal veya agave şurubu kullanabilirsiniz.
Diyet versiyonu için eritritol veya stevia tercih edebilirsiniz.
İnek sütü yerine badem sütü, yulaf sütü, hindistan cevizi sütü veya soya sütü kullanılabilir.
Sıvı yağ yerine eritilmiş tereyağı veya daha sağlıklı bir seçenek için zeytinyağı kullanabilirsiniz.
Hafif bir lezzet için hindistan cevizi yağı da uygundur.
1 yemek kaşığı keten tohumu + 3 yemek kaşığı su (bekletilip jel haline getirilmiş)
Ya da 4 yemek kaşığı yoğurt (bitkisel de olabilir) kullanılabilir.
Böğürtlen, ahududu, yaban mersini yerine çilek, vişne, frambuaz, kızılcık kullanabilirsiniz.
Tropikal bir tat için mango veya ananas parçaları da eklenebilir.
Vanilin yerine vanilya özütü veya vanilya çubuğu kullanabilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Yumurta ve şekeri derin bir kapta mikserle beyazlaşıp kabarana kadar çırpın.
2. Sıvı yağ ve sütü ekleyip karıştırmaya devam edin.
3. Un, kabartma tozu ve vanilini eleyerek ekleyin.
4.  Spatula yardımıyla homojen bir kek harcı elde edin.
5. Orman meyvelerini unlayıp harca ekleyin (meyvelerin dibe çökmesini engeller).
6. Yağlanmış ve unlanmış kek kalıbına karışımı dökün.
7. Önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında yaklaşık 35-40 dakika pişirin.
8. Kek ilk sıcaklığını attıktan sonra üzerine pudra şekeri serpip servis edin.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Forest Fruit Liqueur With An Orange Aroma
original_name: Λικέρ φρούτα του δάσους με άρωμα πορτοκαλιού
instructions: Αρχικά, ισομοιράζουμε τα φρούτα του δάσους στα δύο αποστειρωμένα βάζα.
Σε ένα μπολ βάζουμε το ρούμι, τη βότκα και τη ζάχαρη και τα ανακατεύουμε καλά, μέχρι να λιώσει ελαφρά.
Ισομοιράζουμε το μείγμα για το λικέρ φρούτα του δάσους στα βάζα περιχύνοντας με αυτό τα φρούτα.
Πλένουμε το πορτοκάλι και αφαιρούμε 2 κομμάτια από τη φλούδα του (μόνο το κίτρινο μέρος).
Βάζουμε από 1 φλούδα σε κάθε βάζο και στη συνέχεια τα σφραγίζουμε καλά.
Αφήνουμε τα βάζα σε σκοτεινό ντουλάπι το λιγότερο για 1 μήνα.
Όσο πιο πολύ τα αφήσουμε τόσο πιο ωραίο θα γίνει το λικέρ.
Κατά διαστήματα απλώς τα ανακινούμε για να διαλύεται η ζάχαρη που κατακάθεται.
Όταν περάσει ο χρόνος ωρίμανσης, το σουρώνουμε και το μοιράζουμε αποστειρωμένα γυάλινα βάζα που να κλείνουν αεροστεγώς.
Χρόνος ωρίμανσης: 1 μήνας

name: Forest Fruit Panna Cotta Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 yemek kaşığı jelatin tozu veya 4 yaprak toz jelatin
150 gr orman meyveleri (çilek, böğürtlen, ahududu, yaban mersini karışık)
Sadece krema yerine yarısı krema, yarısı süt kullanarak daha hafif bir panna cotta elde edebilirsiniz.
Bitkisel süt (badem sütü, soya sütü, hindistancevizi sütü) ve bitkisel krema kullanarak vegan veya daha hafif bir versiyon hazırlayabilirsiniz.
Toz veya yaprak jelatin yerine agar-agar kullanabilirsiniz; vegan tarifler için uygundur.
Agar-agar kullanırsanız miktarı paket üzerindeki talimatlara göre ayarlayın ve kaynatmanız gerekir.
Toz şeker yerine esmer şeker, bal veya akçaağaç şurubu kullanabilirsiniz.
Orman meyveleri yerine taze veya dondurulmuş karışık meyveler (çilek, yaban mersini, ahududu) kullanabilirsiniz.
Sosu pişirmek yerine mikslenmiş taze meyveler ile daha doğal ve hafif bir sos hazırlayabilirsiniz.
Vanilya yerine badem özü, limon kabuğu rendesi veya portakal kabuğu rendesi ekleyerek farklı aromalar yaratabilirsiniz.
Klasik panna cotta yerine çikolatalı veya kahveli versiyonlar da deneyebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Toz jelatin kullanıyorsanız 2 yemek kaşığı soğuk suda bekletin.
2. Yaprak jelatin kullanıyorsanız soğuk suda 5 dakika bekletip yumuşatın.
3. Kremayı ve şekeri küçük bir tencerede kaynamadan ısıtın.
4. Vanilini ekleyin ve karıştırın.
5. Yumuşamış jelatini kremaya ekleyin ve tamamen eriyene kadar karıştırın.
6. Karışımı küçük kaselere veya kalıplara dökün.
7. Oda sıcaklığına geldikten sonra buzdolabında en az 4 saat, tercihen bir gece bekletin.
8. Orman meyvelerini, şekeri ve limon suyunu bir tavada 5–7 dakika pişirin.
9. İstersen püre haline getirebilir veya parçalı bırakabilirsiniz.
10. Soğuduktan sonra panna cotta’nın üzerine dökün.
11. Buzdolabından çıkardığınız panna cotta’yı kaselerden servis tabaklarına ters çevirerek çıkarabilir veya kaselerde servis edebilirsiniz.
12.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Forest Fruit Puff Pastry Cake
instructions: 1. Kolayca uygulanabilen pasta tarifleri arasında üst sıralarda.
2.  Milföy hamurlarını oda sıcaklığında yumuşayıncaya kadar bekletin.
3.  Yuvarlak bir kalıpla keserek üzerini çatalla bir çok yerinden delin ve yağlı kağıt serili tepsiye dizin.
4.  190 dereceye ayarlanmış fırında kızarıncaya kadar pişirin.
5.  Soğumaya bırakın.
6. Dolgu kreması ve soğuk sütü mikserle katılaşıncaya kadar çırpın.
7.  Milföy hamurunu aralarına krema sürerek üçerli olarak üst üste dizin.
8.  Üzerine pudra şeker serpiştirip orman meyveleri ile süsleyerek servis yapıncaya kadar buzdolabında bekletin.

name: Forest Fruit Rice Pudding
instructions: 1. 4 su bardağı süt, yarım su bardağı haşlanmış pirinç, 1 çorba kaşığı nişasta ve 1 çay bardağı balı bir tencereye alıp karıştırın.
2. Kısık ateşte muhallebi kıvamında pişirin.
3.  Soğuyunca 250 gr orman meyvesi ve sütlacı değişimli olarak kuplara paylaştırın.
4. Üzerlerine 2 çorba kaşığı bademi paylaştırarak serpin.
5.  Meyve ile süsleyip servis yapın.

name: Forest Fruit Sauce
instructions: Για τη σάλτσα με φρούτα του δάσους, ζεσταίνουμε πρώτα σε τηγάνι τα 200 γραμ. φρούτα του δάσους, με την βανίλια και την ζάχαρη.
Διαλύουμε το κορν φλάουρ σε λίγο νερό και το προσθέτουμε στην σάλτσα φρούτων.
Ρίχνουμε μέσα και τα υπόλοιπα 300 γραμ. φρούτα.
Ανακατεύουμε κι αφήνουμε στο πλάι για λίγα λεπτά να κρυώσουν.

name: Forest Fruit Smoothie, Delicious And
original_name: Batido de frutos del bosque, delicioso y fácil
instructions: Lo primero que vamos a hacer es limpiar las frutas.
Luego vas a cortar las fresas, las frambuesas y las moras en pequeños trozos para que se puedan procesar mejor.
Añade las frutas a tu licuadora o procesador junto a la leche y el azúcar y procesa por 1 minuto.
Luego, le agregarás el hielo y volverás a licuar para que se procese y nos quede como un granizado o smoothie.
Sirve en un vaso, decora con algunos trozos de las frutas y ¡Voilá!
¡Disfrútalo mucho!

name: Forest Fruit Strudel

ingredients.item: Birer tutam tuz ve toz şeker

instructions: 1. Hamuru için unu yoğurma kabına eleyin.
2.  Yumurtayı, şekeri ve sıvı yağı ekleyin.
3.  Azar azar suyu ilave ederek yumuşak kıvamlı bir hamur elde edene kadar yoğurun.
4.  Hamuru top şeklinde toparlayıp üzerini bir bezle örtün.
5.  Oda ısısında bu şekilde yarım saat dinlendirin.
6.  İç malzemesi için elmaları yıkayıp süzün.
7.  Kabuğunu soymadan küp şeklinde doğrayın.
8.  Galeta ununa bulayın.
9.  Şeker ile tereyağını tavada eritin.
10.  Elmaları, ceviz içini ve kuş üzümlerini ekleyin.
11.  10 dakika kavurun.
12.  Ocaktan alın, tarçını ve orman meyvelerini ekleyip tatlandırdıktan sonra ılınmaya bırakın.
13. Dinlenen hamuru un serpilmiş tezgahın üzerine alın.
14.  Oklava yardımı ile yuvarlak ve ince bir hamur açın.
15.  Meyveli karışımı kaşık yardımı ile hamurun üzerine eşit dağılacak şekilde serpin.
16.  Hamurun iki ucundan tutup rulo şeklinde sarın.
17.  Yağlı kağıt serili fırın tepsisine yerleştirin.
18.  Önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında, 20-25 dakika pişirin.
19.  Fırından alıp sıcakken üzerine pudra şekeri serpin.
20.  İsteğe göre yanında iyice çırpılmış krema ve vanilyalı dondurma ile birlikte ılık olarak servis yapın.

name: Forest Fruit Vanilla

ingredients.item: 1 vanilya çubuğu, boydan ikiye kesilmiş ve tanecikleri kazınmış
2-3 avuç orman meyvesi (frambuaz, böğürtlen, çilek vs.)
3-4 adet kuru gül (gülgillerden olan çilek ile çok yakışıyor)

instructions: 1. Bütün malzemeleri bir sürahiye koyun ve bir gece buzdolabında dinlendirin.

name: Forest Fruit Yogurt Smoothie Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 su bardağı karışık orman meyvesi (böğürtlen, frambuaz, yaban mersini, çilek) donmuş ya da taze
1 su bardağı yoğurt (tercihen süzme ya da probiyotik yoğurt)
Yarım su bardağı süt (inek sütü, badem sütü veya yulaf sütü olabilir)
1 tatlı kaşığı bal veya akçaağaç şurubu

instructions: 1. Tüm malzemeleri blender’a koyun.
2.  Pürüzsüz ve kremsi bir kıvam alana kadar karıştırın (yaklaşık 30–60 saniye).
3.  Kıvamı koyu gelirse biraz daha süt ekleyebilirsiniz.
4.  Üzerini birkaç orman meyvesi veya nane yaprağıyla süsleyerek soğuk servis edin.

name: Forest Kebab
instructions: 1. İlk olarak tencereyi ocakta ısıtmaya koyun.
2.  Etin üzerine un serpin ve kuzu etine yedirin.
3.  Unlamanın amacı çıtır olmasını sağlamak.
4. Tencere ısındıktan sonra ayçiçeği yağını ve eti ilave edin.
5.  Et altın sarısı kıvamına gelene kadar pişirin.
6.  Bu sırada elinizdeki sebzeleri aşırı küçük olmayacak şekilde doğrayın.
7. Et altın sarısı kıvamına geldikten sonra tabağa alın.
8.  Aynı tencerede biraz tereyağı erittikten soğanları ekleyin ve kavurun.
9.  Daha sonra sarımsakları doğrayıp ilave edin.
10.  Salçayı da erittikten sonra sebzeleri ekleyin.
11.  Sebzeler biraz yumuşadıktan sonra domatesleri ilave edin.
12.  Daha önce ayırdığımız etleri sebzelerle buluşturun.
13. Tuz ve karabiberini ekleyin.
14.  3 bardak et suyu ekleyin ve karıştırın.
15.  Bir adet defne yaprağı ekleyerek lezzet vermesini sağlayın.
16.  45- 50 dakika pişmeye bırakın.
17.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Forest Kebab In Casserole

ingredients.item: 500 gram kuşbaşı doğranmış dana veya kuzu eti
2 yemek kaşığı tereyağı veya sıvı yağ
2 su bardağı sıcak su veya et suyu

instructions: 1. Güveç tenceresine tereyağı veya sıvı yağı ekleyin.
2.  Isındıktan sonra kuşbaşı doğranmış etleri ekleyip yüksek ateşte suyunu salıp çekene kadar kavurun.
3. Doğranmış soğan ve sarımsakları ekleyip birkaç dakika kavurun.
4. Patlıcan, patates ve yeşil biberi ekleyip 3-4 dakika soteleyin.
5. Salçayı ekleyerek iyice karıştırın.
6.  Ardından tuz, karabiber, kimyon ve kekiği ekleyip lezzetlendirin.
7. Küp doğranmış domatesleri ekleyin, birkaç dakika pişirin ve sıcak su veya et suyunu ilave edin.
8. Güvecin kapağını kapatın ve önceden ısıtılmış 180 derecelik  fırında yaklaşık 1,5 saat pişirin.
9.  Ara ara kontrol ederek suyu azaldıysa biraz sıcak su ekleyebilirsiniz.
10. Fırından çıkan güveçte orman kebabını 5-10 dakika dinlendirin ve sıcak olarak servis edin.
11.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Forest Kebab Recipe

ingredients.item: 500 gr kuşbaşı dana veya kuzu eti
3 yemek kaşığı sıvı yağ veya 30 g tereyağı
3 su bardağı sıcak su veya et suyu

instructions: 1. Tencereye sıvı yağı veya tereyağını alın ve kuşbaşı doğranmış etleri ekleyin.
2.  Etleri yüksek ateşte suyunu salıp çekene kadar kavurun.
3. Küp doğranmış soğan ve ince doğranmış sarımsağı ekleyerek birkaç dakika daha kavurmaya devam edin.
4. Ardından doğranmış yeşil biber ve kırmızı biberi ekleyip karıştırarak pişirin.
5. Salçayı ilave edin ve kokusu çıkana kadar kısa süre kavurun.
6. Küp doğranmış patates, havuç ve bezelyeyi ekleyerek tüm malzemeleri birkaç dakika karıştırın.
7.  Dilerseniz patatesleri önceden hafifçe kızartarak da yemeğe ekleyebilirsiniz.
8. Üzerine doğranmış domatesleri ekleyin ve karıştırın.
9. Tuz, karabiber ve kekiği ekledikten sonra sıcak su veya et suyunu ilave edin.
10. Defne yaprağını ekleyip tencerenin kapağını kapatın ve kısık ateşte yaklaşık 35–40 dakika pişirin.
11. Sebzeler yumuşayıp et iyice piştiğinde ocaktan alın ve sıcak olarak servis edin.
12.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Forester
instructions: Το παραδοσιακό και πολύ θρεπτικό πηχτό ρόφημα(σαν πυκνή σούπα) σερβίρεται πάντα ζεστό την Μεγάλη Πέμπτη και Μεγάλη Παρασκευή σαν δυναμωτικό φαγητό.
Ψιλοκόβουμε τον μπαγιάτικο άρτο ή το ψωμί (αφαιρούμε τη κόρα) και το βάζουμε σε μικρή κατσαρόλα.
Προσθέτουμε τα αμύγδαλα.
Περιχύνουμε με το νερό και το αφήνουμε σε χαμηλή φωτιά για 15′ από την ώρα που αρχίζει ο βρασμός, μέχρι να χυλώσει.
Όταν λιώσει τελείως η ψύχα, αποσύρουμε από την εστίας, ρίχνουμε μέσα όλα τα υπόλοιπα υλικά, μαστίχα κοπανισμένη, πρέζα μοσχοκάρυδο κι ελάχιστη ζάχαρη ή άλλο γλυκαντικό για ελαφριά γλύκα.
Το πολτοποιούμε στο μπλέντερ όσο είναι ζεστό.
Έχει πλούσια κρεμώδη υφή και το σερβίρουμε ζεστό σαν γεύμα σε φλυτζάνια ή ποτήρια σε θερμοκρασία δωματίου κάθε ώρα και στιγμή της ημέρας.
Είναι τονωτικό και έχει απίστευτα αρώματα και γεύση.

name: Fork
instructions: 1. Tereyağı, Ayçiçek yağı, yumurta, toz şeker, tuz, mahlep ve yoğurdu yoğurma kabında karıştırın.
2.  Bu karışıma un ile kabartma tozunu eleyerek ilave edin ve yoğurun.
3.  Yoğurduğunuz hamurdan parçalar kopartıp mutfak tezgahında uzun şeritler yapın.
4.  Hazırladığınız şeritlerin iki tanesini yan yana yerleştirip iki ucunu birleştirin.
5.  Diğer bir şeridi yanına yerleştirip uçlarını birleştirerek çatal şekli verin.
6.  Tüm hamuru aynı şekilde hazırlayın.
7.  Üzerlerine yumurta sarısı sürüp çörek otu serpin.
8.  Fırın tepsisini yağlayın ve çatalları aralıklı olarak dizin.
9.  Önceden ısıtılmış 170 derece fırında 25 dakika pişirin.
10.  Ilık servis yapın.
11. Çatalı, beyaz peynir ve söğüş salata ile birlikte servis edebilirsiniz.
12.  Afiyet olsun.
13. Çatal Tarifinin Püf Noktaları Nelerdir?Çatal yapımında, önceden hazırlanmış ve dondurulmuş hamur kullanabilirsiniz.
14. Aynı hamurla, mahleple yapabileceğiniz farklı kurabiyeler de hazırlayabilirsiniz.
15. Hamuru, oda sıcaklığında dinlendirerek daha lezzetli sonuçlar alabilirsiniz.

name: Forked Oven-roasted Potatoes
instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Working in 2 batches, cook potatoes in a large pot of boiling salted water for 3 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer potatoes to a rimmed baking sheet. When cool enough to handle, firmly scrape the tines of a fork up and down potatoes, creating a rough, grooved surface.

Pour oil onto another rimmed baking sheet; bake (to heat oil) for 5 minutes. Add potatoes; turn to coat. Season with 1 tablespoon salt. Roast, turning 3 times during cooking and occasionally basting with oil, until browned and tender, 60–70 minutes.

name: Fortune Cookie Magic Shell Sundae

ingredients.prep: fortunes removed, plus more crushed for serving

instructions: Blend 15 fortune cookies, fortunes removed, in a blender to a fine powder. Add 5 Tbsp. refined coconut oil, melted, and ¼ tsp. kosher salt and blend, scraping down sides of blender with a rubber spatula as needed, until combined.

Place a scoop of vanilla ice cream in each bowl and coat with a thin layer of magic shell. Quickly top each with a few pieces of crushed fortune cookie, some flaky sea salt, and ½ tsp. black sesame seeds.

name: Fortune Cookies
instructions: Print and cut out 3-inch wide paper fortunes.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with a silicone mat or parchment paper.

Whisk sugar, egg white, milk, butter, vanilla extract, almond extract, and salt together in a bowl until sugar is dissolved. Add flour; whisk until batter is smooth and falls off the whisk in ribbons.
Scoop 1 tablespoon batter onto the prepared baking sheet; spread into a 4-inch circle using the back of a spoon. Repeat once more.
Bake in the preheated oven until crispy and golden brown on the edges and still pale in the centers, about 10 minutes.

Working quickly, lift 1 cookie using a spatula; add a fortune. Fold cookie in half, pressing edges together lightly. Bend long side cookie in half over rim of the baking sheet, pulling ends down on either side. Curl ends towards each other to form a brim. Place cookie in a ramekin or muffin tin to hold its shape while cooling. Working quickly, repeat with second cookie.
Repeat scooping and baking with remaining batter, working in batches of 2 cookies per batch, folding and shaping cookies while hot. Remove from ramekins or muffin tins when completely cool.

name: Fougasse

ingredients.item: 1/2κύβο νωπή μαγιά  (12 γρ.) ή 4 γρ. ξερή
1/2κύβο νωπή μαγιά  (12 γρ.) ή 4 γρ. ξερή

instructions: Διαλύουμε την μαγιά και την βάζουμε σε ένα μικρό μπολ. Προσθέτουμε 1/3 φλ. από το συνολικό νερό και 1 γεμάτη κ.σ. από το συνολικό αλεύρι.
Ανακατεύουμε τα υλικά με κουτάλι, σκεπάζουμε το μπολ κι αφήνουμε σε ζεστό σημείο 20’.
Σε ένα μπολ βάζουμε το αλεύρι , προσθέτουμε το αλάτι κι ανακατεύουμε.
Κάνουμε λακούβα στην μέση και προσθέτουμε το ελαιόλαδο, το νερό και το μίγμα μαγιάς.
Ανακατεύουμε τα υλικά να βραχεί το αλεύρι και σιγά-σιγά ζυμώνουμε μέχρι να μαζευτούν τα από τα τοιχώματα του μπολ.
Βγάζουμε τη ζύμη στον πάγκο και την ζυμώνουμε για 6-8 λεπτά μέχρι να γίνει λεία και να μην κολλάει στα χέρια.
Προσθέτουμε τις ψιλοκομμένες ελιές.
Τη βάζουμε σε ελαφρά λαδωμένο μπολ και σκεπάζουμε με μεμβράνη.
Την αφήνουμε για 1 ώρα να φουσκώσει. Την ξεφουσκώνουμε και ιδανικά την ξαναβάζουμε στο μπολ την σκεπάζουμε και την αφήνουμε 1 νύχτα στο ψυγείο.
Αν δεν έχετε τον χρόνο προχωρήστε την διαδικασία για να ψηθούν.

name: Fougasse (french-style Flatbread)
instructions: Gather all your ingredients.
Grease a large bowl with olive oil.

Combine all-purpose flour, spelt flour, yeast, and kosher salt in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with a dough hook. Add water and knead until dough is smooth, elastic, wet, and sticky, about 5 minutes. Transfer dough to the prepared bowl. Cover and let rise on the counter for 30 minutes.

Uncover the dough. Wet one hand and grab one side of the dough in the bowl. Pull it up slightly and fold it in towards the center. Repeat this folding technique 6 or 7 more times, turning the bowl slightly in between each fold. Cover and let rest for 30 minutes.
Repeat Step 3 (above) two more times. Dough will have rested for a total of 2 hours.
Repeat folding technique once more. Cover and place in the refrigerator for 12 to 24 hours.
When ready to bake, line a sheet pan with a silicone liner; sprinkle some flour on the liner.
Transfer dough to a lightly floured surface and pat or press it into an oval shape, flouring lightly as necessary. Cut the oval in half lengthwise into two equal portions.

Shape fougasse: On one piece of dough, fold one end in over the center third, then fold the other end in over top. Dough should resemble a triangle. Transfer dough to the prepared pan. Repeat with the second piece of dough.
Cover both triangles with an oiled piece of plastic wrap and let sit until dough warms up, 30 minutes to 1 hour.
Line two baking sheets with parchment paper; generously sprinkle cornmeal on the parchment. Remove plastic from the dough.

Transfer one piece of dough to a lightly floured surface. Sprinkle some flour over top and use a rolling pin and your hands to stretch the triangle until it's ½- to ¾-inch thick. Sprinkle rosemary over top and press it into the dough. Transfer dough to one of the parchment-lined baking sheets.
Use a pizza wheel to cut through the dough in a vertical line up the center of the triangle; do not cut through the top and bottom edges. Pull dough apart to spread open the cut.

Make two more cuts at the top, one on each side from the center going out toward the edge, making sure you don't cut through the edges. Pull dough gently to spread it out. Make four more cuts, two in the middle, and two at the bottom, and pull dough apart. Make two more small cuts at the bottom. You will have one long cut in the center and 4 going down each side, so the fougasse will resemble a leaf. Cover with oiled plastic wrap and let proof for 30 to 60 minutes.
Repeat Steps 6 to 8 (above) to shape and proof the remaining dough.
Preheat the oven to 232°C (230 degrees C). Remove plastic wrap from one fougasse. Brush olive oil over the entire surface and sprinkle with sea salt.
Bake in the center of the preheated oven until beautifully browned, about 20 minutes.
Transfer to a rack to cool. Repeat Steps 11 and 12 (above) to bake remaining fougasse.
Serve and enjoy.

name: Four Cheese Margherita Pizza
instructions: Stir together olive oil, garlic, and salt; toss with tomatoes, and allow to stand for 15 minutes. Preheat oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).

Brush each pizza crust with some of the tomato marinade. Sprinkle the pizzas evenly with Mozzarella and Fontina cheeses. Arrange tomatoes overtop, then sprinkle with shredded basil, Parmesan, and feta cheese.
Bake in preheated oven until the cheese is bubbly and golden brown, about 10 minutes.

name: Four Cheese Quiche
instructions: 1. Kiş hamurunu tarife göre hazırlayın.
2. Yağlanmış kiş kalıbına elinizle hafifçe bastırarak yayın.
3. Dolmalık biberin çekirdeklerini temizleyip zar şeklinde doğrayın.
4. Un,süt ve yumurtaları çukur bir kaba alın ve mikserle çırpın.
5. Başka bir kapta peynirler,karabiber,doğranmış kırmızı biber ve muskatı harmanlayın.
6. Peynirli karışımla sütlü karışımı aynı kaba alıp karıştırın.
7. Kiş hamurunun üzerine yayın.
8. Önceden ısıtılmış 200 dereceye ayarlı fırında 25-30 dakika pişirin.
9.  Fırından alın.
10.  Dilimleyip sıcak servis yapın.

name: Four Cheese Stuffed Jalapeños
instructions: Place a steamer insert into a saucepan and fill with water to just below the bottom of the steamer. Bring water to a boil. Add jalapeño peppers, cover, and steam until slightly tender, about 5 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil.
Mix cream cheese with Parmesan, Cheddar, and feta cheeses, garlic, salt, black pepper, cayenne pepper, chili powder, and garlic powder in a bowl.
Arrange jalapeño peppers on the prepared baking sheet. Spoon cheese mixture into each pepper.
Bake in the preheated oven until cheese is melted and bubbling, about 10 minutes.

name: Four Meat Ragu Lasagna

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: In a large saucepan, melt the butter over medium high heat. Whisk in the flour and cook, stirring frequently, for 3 minutes. Slowly whisk in the milk and nutmeg. Cook over medium heat for 3-5 minutes, whisking occasionally, until slightly thickened. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Remove from heat and let cool.

Heat a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Add the pancetta and saute, stirring frequently, for 5 minutes. Add the onion, celery and carrots and continue to cook for 6-7 minutes until softened and fragrant. Add the meats and cook, stirring frequently, until deep brown in color. Add the wine to the skillet and reduce the heat to medium low. Cook until the wine has reduced by half, about 3 minutes.

Add 1/2 cup stock to the saucepan and simmer, 10 minutes, or until totally evaporated. Repeat with another 1/2 cup stock. Stir in the last 1/2 cup stock and milk. Partially cover the pot and cook for 1 hour, stirring frequently. Add the tomatoes, crushing them as they go into the pot. Cook uncovered on medium-low heat for another 45 minutes so the sauce resembles a thick, meaty stew. Season with salt and pepper.

In a large baking dish, spread a thin layer of the bechamel sauce. Add a layer of pasta, then a layer of bechamel and then a layer of rag. Repeat until you have used all of your pasta. On the top layer of pasta, spread the bechamel sauce and top with Parmesan and mozzarella cheese. Cover with Reynolds Wrap® Aluminum Foil and bake in a preheated oven at 177°C for 40-45 minutes. Remove the foil and bake another 10 minutes until golden brown. Let rest for 10 minutes before serving.

name: Four Quarters Cake

ingredients.item: 300 g  manteiga sem sal ou margarina

instructions: Aqueça o forno a 180 graus. Unte uma forma de buraco com manteiga e polvilhe com farinha. Reserve.
Bata energicamente os ovos com o açúcar. Acrescente aos poucos a manteiga e, por fim, a farinha com o fermento, previamente misturados.
Coloque a massa na forma e leve ao forno durante 40 minutos. Retire do forno e deixe arrefecer. Desenforme e sirva.

name: Four Seasons Blend

ingredients.item: Coarse sea salt or kosher salt

instructions: {'step': '1', 'description': 'Combine all ingredients in a small bowl.'}
{'step': '2', 'description': 'Working in batches if needed, pulse in spice mill until mixture resembles sand.'}
{'step': '3', 'description': 'Store airtight at room temperature up to 1 month.'}

name: Four-cheese Fathead Pizza Dough
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).

Combine mozzarella cheese, Cheddar cheese, Parmesan cheese, and cream cheese in a microwave safe bowl. Microwave for 1 minute. Remove and mix in almond flour, egg, garlic, and parsley until well combined. Spread dough onto a baking sheet and poke holes into the dough with a fork.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10 minutes. Remove and let cool for 20 minutes.

name: Four-cheese Grilled Cheese Sandwich

ingredients.prep: cut lengthwise, or more to taste

instructions: Mix butter and garlic in a small bowl until well combined. Spread 1/2 of the butter onto one side of each slice of bread; set aside.

Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a large skillet over medium-low heat; stir in spinach and giardiniera. Saute until spinach is wilted and mixture is heated through, 3 to 5 minutes. Remove to a bowl and wipe out the skillet.

Place 1 slice of bread, buttered-side down, into one side of the warm skillet. Heat 1/2 tablespoon oil in the other side of the skillet. Place mozzarella slices in the skillet and cook until soft, 1 to 2 minutes. Place mozzarella slices on top of the bread in the skillet. Repeat with the provolone, Asiago, and Fontina slices.

Add spinach mixture and tomato slices to the skillet, adding more oil if necessary, and cook until warm, 2 to 3 minutes. Place spinach mixture on top of the cheese, followed by the tomatoes and the remaining slice of bread, buttered-side up. Flip the sandwich and cook until browned and cheese has melted, 5 to 10 minutes.

name: Four-layer Chocolate Birthday Cake With Milk Chocolate Ganache And Nutella Buttercream

ingredients.prep: room temperature, plus more for pan

instructions: Preheat oven to 350˚. Butter two 9"-diameter cake pans and line bottoms with parchment paper rounds. Butter parchment and dust with flour, tapping out excess.

Heat chocolate, coffee, and ⅔ cup cocoa powder in a medium heatproof bowl set over a medium saucepan of barely simmering water (water should not touch bottom of bowl), stirring until chocolate melts and mixture is smooth. Let cool, then whisk eggs, buttermilk, and vanilla into chocolate mixture.

Using an electric mixer on low speed, mix salt, baking powder, baking soda, and 2 cups flour in a large bowl just to combine. Add brown sugar, oil, ½ cup butter, and ½ cup reserved chocolate mixture and beat on medium speed until flour is evenly distributed and mixture is smooth, about 2 minutes. Add remaining chocolate mixture in 2 additions, scraping down sides and bottom of bowl as needed and beating until smooth after each addition. Scrape batter into prepared pan and smooth top.

Bake cake until top is firm to the touch and a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, 30–40 minutes. Transfer cake pan to a wire rack and let cake cool in pan 10 minutes before turning out onto a wire rack. Let cool completely.
Using a serrated knife and moving it back and forth in long, even strokes, carefully halve cakes lengthwise.

Place chocolate in a medium bowl. Bring cream and salt to a simmer in a small saucepan over medium-low heat. Pour over chocolate; let sit 10 minutes, then whisk gently until chocolate is melted and mixture is smooth and glossy. Let ganache cool, 30–45 minutes.
Using an electric mixer on medium speed, beat butter into ganache until mixture is light and fluffy and has turned matte, about 3 minutes.

Place 1 cake layer, cut side up, on a platter. Using a rubber spatula, spread one-third of ganache over cake, spreading to edges. Place another cake layer, cut side down, on top and spread another third of ganache over cake. Repeat process once more with another cake layer and remaining ganache; top with remaining cake layer (leave top bare). Chill cake 1–8 hour.

While cake is chilling, beat egg yolks, egg, and salt in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the whisk attachment until mixture is pale and thick and falls back onto itself in a slowly dissipating ribbon, about 5 minutes.

Meanwhile, bring sugar and 3 Tbsp. water to a boil in a small saucepan over medium heat, stirring until sugar is dissolved. Clip thermometer to the side of saucepan and boil, swirling pan (do not stir), until thermometer registers 238˚. Immediately remove from heat.

Reduce mixer speed to low and gradually stream hot sugar syrup into eggs aiming for where the egg meets the side of the bowl (this will prevent hot sugar from splattering). Increase speed to high and beat mixture until light and fluffy and sides of bowl are cool to the touch, 5–8 minutes.

Add butter a piece at a time, beating to thoroughly incorporate before adding the next piece and scraping down sides of bowl often. Add Nutella and vanilla and beat, scraping down sides and bottom of bowl, until mixture is smooth and homogenous.
Spread buttercream all over top and sides of chilled cake, making decorative swirls and swooshes. Decorate with sprinkles, if desired.
Do Ahead: Cake can be assembled 1 day ahead. Chill uncovered.

name: Four-layer Pumpkin Cake With Orange-cream Cheese Frosting
instructions: Position rack in bottom third of oven; preheat to 177°C. Spray two 9-inch cake pans with 1 1/2-inch sides with nonstick spray. Line bottoms with parchment; spray parchment.

Whisk flour and next 4 ingredients in large bowl. Using electric mixer, beat butter in another large bowl until smooth. Beat in brown sugar. Add eggs 1 at a time, beating to blend between additions. Beat in pumpkin. Add dry ingredients to butter mixture in 3 additions alternately with milk in 2 additions, beating to blend between additions. Divide batter between pans.

Bake cakes until tester inserted into center comes out clean, about 40 minutes. Cool in pans on rack 15 minutes. Run knife around cakes to loosen. Invert cakes onto racks. Remove parchment. Using tart pan bottom as aid, turn cakes over onto racks, top sides up, and cool completely. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Wrap cakes in plastic and store at room temperature.
Using electric mixer, beat butter in large bowl until smooth. Add cream cheese and orange peel; beat until smooth. Add powdered sugar and beat on low speed until smooth.

Trim rounded tops from cakes. Using long serrated knife, cut each cake horizontally in half. Place 1 cake layer, cut side up, on large platter. Spoon 2/3 cup frosting atop cake in dollops; spread to edges. Repeat 2 more times with cake and frosting; top with remaining cake layer, cut side down. Spread remaining frosting over top and sides of cake (layer will be thin). DO AHEAD Can be made 2 days ahead. Cover with cake dome; chill. Let stand at room temperature 1 hour before serving.
Decorate cake with walnuts and serve.

name: Fourth Of July Salad
instructions: Combine blueberries, strawberries, watermelon, and grapes in a bowl. Fold in coconut.

name: Foynes' Red Eye
instructions: Add all ingredients except coffee bean to a cocktail shaker. Shake with ice. Strain into a chilled coupe glass. Top with freshly grated coffee bean.
Pour Guinness into a saucepan. Bring to a simmer over medium heat and reduce by 1/3 to 8 ounces (approximately 10 minutes).
Remove from heat and add Demerara sugar. Stir until sugar dissolves. Cool and refrigerate in a clean, covered container. The simple syrup will keep for up to two weeks if you don't drink it first.

name: Fra Diavolo Sauce With Linguine
instructions: Heat crushed garlic and 2 tablespoons oil in a large saucepan over medium heat until garlic starts to sizzle, 1 to 2 minutes. Stir in tomatoes with juice, red pepper flakes, oregano, basil, and salt. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Meanwhile, bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook linguine at a boil until tender yet firm to the bite, about 11 minutes; drain and keep warm.

While the linguine is cooking, heat remaining 2 tablespoons olive oil in a large skillet over high heat. Stir in shrimp and scallops and cook, stirring frequently, until shrimp turn pink, about 2 minutes. Remove from the heat.
Stir shrimp, scallops, mussels, and parsley into tomato mixture; cook until sauce begins to bubble and mussels open, about 7 minutes. Pour sauce over linguine and serve.

name: Fragolini ( Vodka-strawberry Cocktail)

ingredients.item: Φύλλα δυόσμου ή μέντας για το σερβίρισμα
Φύλλα δυόσμου ή μέντας για το σερβίρισμα

instructions: Για το κοκτέιλ με βότκα και φράουλα, βάζουμε πρώτα στο μπλέντερ τις παγωμένες φράουλες, τη ζάχαρη και τον πάγο και τα αλέθουμε.
Προσθέτουμε το αλκοόλ.
Ισομοιράζουμε σε ποτήρια του Martini και γαρνίρουμε με φύλλα δυόσμου ή μέντας.

name: Fragrant Lemon Jam

ingredients.item: Tercihe göre en az 500, en fazla 600 g toz şeker

instructions: 1. Limonları soyun, kabuklarını ince ince dilimleyerek bir kenara ayırın.
2.  Ayrılan kabukları 1 gece soğuk suda bekletin.
3. Ertesi gün 5 dakika suda kaynatıp kabukları yıkayın.
4.  Bu işlemi 2-3 kez tekrar edin ki, kabukların asidi çıksın.
5.  Kaynatma işlemlerinin ardından sularını sıkın.
6.  Kabuksuz kalan limonları tencerede kaynatıp, süzgeçten geçirerek posasını atın.
7.  Limon suyunu, su ile incelterek şerbete dönüştürün.
8.  Limon kabuklarını, şerbete dönen suyu ve toz şekeri karıştırın.
9.  Üzerine pembe renkli ıtır çiçeklerini incecik kıyarak ekleyin ve karışımı kaynatın.
10. Limon kabukları şeffaflaşınca altını kapatın ve henüz sıcakken kavanozlara alın.
11.  Kavanozları ters çevirerek saklayın.
12. Itırlı Limon Reçelinin Püf Noktaları Nelerdir?Tarife başlamadan önce kullanacağınız limonların tadına bakmayı unutmayın.
13.  Bu sayede şeker ölçüsünü daha iyi bir şekilde ayarlayabilirsiniz.
14. Reçeli hazırlarken tat vermesi için mandalina suyu veya rendelenmiş portakal kabuğu da ekleyebilirsiniz.
15. Pişirme esnasında tahta kaşık kullanın ve kıvam alana kadar aralıklarla karıştırın.
16. Reçel pişerken, kullanacağınız cam kavanozları sıcak su ile sterilize edin.
17. Reçel kavanozlarını doldurduktan sonra hava almayacak şekilde kapatın ve serin yerde muhafaza edin.
18. 1 Porsiyon Itırlı Limon Reçeli Kaç Kaloridir?Itırlı limon reçelinin bir porsiyonu, yaklaşık 130 kaloridir.
19.  Şeker değeri yüksek olduğu için, küçük porsiyonlarla tüketilmesi önerilir.

name: Fraisier (strawberry Cream Cake)

ingredients.item: Plus 1 tbsp. plus  0.5 tsp. granulated sugar
Plus 2 tbsp. plus 1  0.25 tsp. granulated sugar

instructions: In a medium bowl, vigorously whisk together 3 large egg yolks and 115g granulated sugar until lightened. Whisk in 45g cornstarch.
In a saucepan, warm 1.875 cups whole milk.
Slowly pour the warm milk into the egg mixture while whisking constantly.
Pour the combined mixture back into the saucepan and cook over medium heat, whisking constantly, until very thick, about 5 minutes.
Cover the surface of the pastry cream with plastic wrap and refrigerate.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (177°C). Line a rimmed sheet pan with parchment paper.
Sift 65g all-purpose flour.
In a large bowl, whisk together 7 large egg yolks and one-third of the 180g granulated sugar until lightened.
In a separate bowl, beat 4 large egg whites into stiff peaks, adding the remaining 180g granulated sugar a little at a time halfway through the beating time.
Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the yolk mixture.
Then, fold in the sifted flour.
Spread the batter evenly into the prepared sheet pan.
Bake for 10 minutes.
Cool the sponge cake completely.
Carefully peel the parchment paper from the cooled cake.
Using a cake ring, cut out two circles from the sponge cake.
Add 150g unsalted butter to the bowl of a standing mixer fitted with the whisk attachment and beat until light and creamy.
Add the refrigerated pastry cream to the mixer and beat until well incorporated.
Transfer the combined butter and pastry cream mixture to a bowl.
Place the cake ring on a serving plate.
Place one cake circle on the bottom of the cake ring.
If necessary, briefly rinse the strawberries and pat them dry on paper towels.
Set aside one dozen of the most attractive strawberries for the top decoration.
Hull and cut similarly sized strawberries in half.
Place the halved strawberries next to each other around the perimeter of the ring with the cut side touching the ring.
Cover the perimeter strawberries with a little of the pastry cream to seal them against the ring.
Hull the remaining strawberries (not set aside for decoration) and place them in the center of the cake.
Cover the layer of strawberries with some of the pastry cream.
Place the second cake disk on top.
Evenly spread a thin layer of the pastry cream on top of the second cake disk.
Hull the remaining whole strawberries (the dozen set aside for decoration) then set them on top of the cake, pointed ends up.
Scrape the remaining pastry cream into a pastry bag fitted with a 1/3-inch plain pastry tube.
Pipe pointed mounds of cream on top of the cake between the strawberries.
Refrigerate the cake overnight.
Just before serving, carefully remove the cake ring.

name: Francesinha

ingredients.item: 1 lata pequena  tomate pelado em pedaços

instructions: Num tacho, deite a cebola e os dentes de alho, grosseiramente picados, junte o azeite e leve ao lume a refogar. Adicione o tomate pelado, a polpa de tomate, a cerveja, o vinho do porto, o brandy, a folha de louro, o caldo de carne e uma pitada de sal e deixe cozinhar, até o molho ficar macio.
Junte piripíri a gosto e a farinha maisena, previamente desfeita num pouco de água fria. Elimine a folha de louro e triture tudo muito bem. Reserve.
Corte as linguiças e as salsichas ao meio, no sentido longitudinal. Leve a grelhar os bifes, previamente temperados com sal, as salsichas e as linguiças.

Distribua metade das fatias de pão por pratos e disponha por cima 1 bife, 1 linguiça, 1 salsicha e 1 fatia de fiambre. Cubra com o restante pão e depois com as fatias de queijo. Regue com o molho bem quente e sirva de imediato.

name: Francesinha To The Mosque

ingredients.item: 2 bifes do lombo  vitela + aparas de vitela q.b.

instructions: Num pequeno tacho com um pouco de azeite, comece por saltear os camarões. Junte 1 cebola e a cenoura, previamente cortadas em pedaços, e o tomilho e deixe alourar bem. Adicione um pouco do vinho branco, deixe evaporar e, de seguida, cubra com água. Tempere com sal e pimenta e deixe ferver, em lume brando, até reduzir e obter um caldo bem aromático.

Num tacho à parte, deite um pouco de azeite e as aparas de carne, previamente passadas por um pouco de farinha. Deixe alourar, retire e reserve. No mesmo tacho, deite a restante cebola e alhos, picados, o aipo, o alho-francês e os tomates, cortados em pedaços, e a folha de louro. Deixe refogar bem, adicione o restante vinho branco e deixe evaporar. Volte a juntar os pedaços de carne, cubra com água, retifique o sal, tempere com pimenta e deixe o caldo reduzir, em lume brando.
Entretanto, num grelhador pincelado com azeite, torre as fatias de pão e depois grelhe as carnes: o fiambre, as linguiças cortadas ao meio e os bifes.

Coe ambos os caldos separadamente. Num tacho, deite o caldo de carne e adicione caldo de camarão a gosto. Leve a lume brando e adicione as cervejas pretas, o vinho do Porto, a mostarda e tabasco a gosto. Deixe ferver em lume brando, até reduzir para cerca de metade e começar a engrossar. Retifique o sal e tempere com pimenta. Quando estiver com a consistência desejada, adicione a manteiga, mexa bem e reserve.

Num prato, disponha uma fatia de pão tostada, seguida de uma fatia de fiambre, de um bife e uma linguiça aberta. Tape com outra fatia de pão e depois cubra tudo com metade das fatias de queijo. Repita com os restantes ingredientes, formando assim outra francesinha. Leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºC, apenas por alguns minutos para o queijo derreter. Retire e sirva com o molho bem quente.

name: Franks And Beans

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a large heavy pot over medium heat. Add onion and garlic; cook, stirring occasionally, until softened, 5–8 minutes. Remove and discard casings from 2 sausages; add sausages to pot. Cook, breaking up with a spoon, until sausages and onions are lightly browned, about 5 minutes.

Add beans and wine to pot and cook until wine is reduced by half, 8–10 minutes. Using kitchen twine, tie parsley and thyme into a bundle; add to pot along with bay leaves and broth. Cook on medium-low heat, partially covered and stirring often, until liquid thickens, 40–50 minutes. Discard bundle and bay leaves. Mix in butter and 2 Tbsp. chopped herbs. Season with salt and pepper.

Meanwhile, after beans have been cooking for about 25 minutes, heat remaining 1 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Cook remaining sausages, turning occasionally, until browned and cooked through, 15–20 minutes. Slice.
Divide bean mixture among bowls. Top with sausage slices and remaining 1 Tbsp. chopped herbs.

name: Frappé Cappuccino Eggnog
instructions: Iniciamos colocando el hielo con la leche evaporada en la licuadora.
Luego agrega la canela y los demás ingredientes antes de batir.
Mezcla hasta obtener una mezcla homogénea y con la textura espesa característica de un frappé.
Sirve en vasos altos y decora con crema batida en forma de corona.
Espolvorea canela en polvo para realzar el sabor y la presentación. ¡Disfruta bien frio!

name: Frascatelli With Pecorino And Mustard Greens

ingredients.prep: center ribs and stems removed, leaves torn into pieces (about 6 cups)

instructions: Spread semolina flour in an even layer in an 8x8x2-inch baking dish. Fill a small bowl with 1 cup water and set next to dish. Working in 4-5 batches, gather your fingertips and thumb of 1 hand together and, working quickly, dip into bowl of water, lift hand from bowl, and splatter water over semolina. Repeat several times until surface of semolina is dotted with ragged wet patches about the size of a nickel. Let stand until water is absorbed, forming individual dumplings, about 5 seconds. Using a fish spatula or slotted spoon, turn dumplings over to coat with semolina, then transfer to a sieve. Shake gently over same baking dish to remove excess semolina; transfer dumplings to a large rimmed baking sheet. Repeat with remaining semolina and water until all of the water or all of the semolina has been used (there may be some water or semolina left over).

Working in 3-4 batches, cook dumplings in a large pot of slowly boiling salted water (if the water is boiling too rapidly, it may break up the dumplings), gently swirling water once or twice to prevent sticking, until al dente, about 30 seconds. Using a slotted spoon, transfer frascatelli to another large rimmed baking sheet.

Heat butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat until butter is foamy and browned bits form on the bottom of pan, about 2 minutes. Add cooked frascatelli and toss gently to coat. Add mustard greens and fold gently just to coat and slightly wilt the greens. Season to taste with salt and pepper and divide among bowls. Top frascatelli with grated Pecorino.

name: Free-form Chocolate Candies

ingredients.item: Toppings as desired (such as pecan halves; dried tart cherries; thinly sliced dried figs; thinly sliced candied ginger; puffed quinoa or rice; salted
ingredients.prep: roasted pumpkin seeds; bee pollen; flaky sea salt; and/or demerara sugar)

instructions: Turn a rimmed baking sheet over and place a sheet of parchment paper on top. Spoon or pipe quarter-size mounds of chocolate onto parchment, spacing about 2" apart (you should have about 30). Using a small offset spatula or the back of a spoon, spread outward in a circular motion to make silver-dollar-size disks. Top as desired. (You don’t need to use all the toppings on every disk.) Chill until cold and set, 30–35 minutes.
Carefully peel candies off of parchment just before serving.
Do Ahead: Candies can be made 4 days ahead. Keep chilled.

name: Free-form Chocolate Candies (mendiants)

ingredients.item: Toppings as desired (such as pecan halves; dried tart cherries; thinly sliced dried figs; thinly sliced candied ginger; puffed quinoa or rice; salted
ingredients.prep: roasted pumpkin seeds; bee pollen; flaky sea salt; and/or demerara sugar)

instructions: Turn a rimmed baking sheet over and place a sheet of parchment paper on top. Spoon or pipe quarter-size mounds of chocolate onto parchment, spacing about 2" apart (you should have about 30). Using a small offset spatula or the back of a spoon, spread outward in a circular motion to make silver-dollar-size disks. Top as desired. (You don’t need to use all the toppings on every disk.) Chill until cold and set, 30–35 minutes.
Carefully peel candies off of parchment just before serving.
Candies can be made 4 days ahead. Keep chilled.

name: Freekeh Paella With Clams And Almond Aioli

ingredients.item: -hot chile (such as a hungarian wax pepper)
Hot pickled peppers from a jar

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast almonds on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until golden brown, 5–8 minutes. Let cool.

Pulse almonds and garlic in a food processor or blender until finely ground. With motor running, gradually stream in oil, lemon juice, then ¼ cup water; process, adding water as needed, until aioli is light, smooth, and consistency of mayonnaise; season with salt. Cover; chill.
DO AHEAD: Aioli can be made 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.

Pulse onions in a food processor until finely chopped; transfer to a large bowl. Repeat, separately, with carrots, garlic, and chile, adding to bowl with onions as you go. Pulse chorizo in food processor until finely ground.
Heat oil in a large skillet over medium and cook chorizo, stirring often, until crisp, about 5 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer chorizo to a plate.
Add vegetables and bay leaf to skillet; season with salt. Cook, stirring often, until moisture is evaporated and vegetables have started to brown, 12–15 minutes; this is your flavor base.

Add freekeh and cook, stirring, until lightly toasted and fragrant, about 3 minutes. Add tomato paste and cook, stirring, until darkened in color, about 2 minutes. Stir in chorizo and 4½ cups water; season with salt. Bring to a simmer, cover, and cook, adding more water if liquid evaporates too quickly, until grains are al dente and almost all liquid is absorbed, 45–50 minutes. Nestle clams in freekeh and cover skillet. Cook until clams open, 7–10 minutes; discard any that don’t open, along with bay leaf. Increase heat to medium-high and cook until clam juices evaporate and freekeh is tender, about 5 minutes.
Top with pickled peppers and parsley; serve with aioli and lemon wedges.

name: Freekeh Salad

ingredients.item: Pomegranate molasses can be found at middle eastern markets

instructions: Cook freekeh in a large saucepan of simmering salted water until tender, 30–40 minutes. Drain and rinse under cold water to stop cooking.
Whisk lemon juice, oil, and pomegranate molasses in a large bowl. Add freekeh, onion, parsley, and two-thirds of cherry tomatoes; season with salt and toss to combine.
Transfer salad to a platter and top with remaining tomatoes and savory leaves and/or mustard flowers, if using.
Do Ahead: Salad (without savory and mustard flowers) can be made 6 hours ahead. Cover and chill.

name: Freekeh Salad With Chicken And Kale

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: ribs and stems removed, leaves torn

ingredients.item: Shaved asiago cheese and chopped fresh chives

instructions: Whisk garlic, cheese, and lemon juice in a medium bowl. Gradually whisk in cream and oil; season with salt and pepper.
DO AHEAD: Dressing can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.
Cook freekeh in a medium saucepan of boiling salted water until al dente, 20–25 minutes; drain, shaking off water. Spread out on a baking sheet; let cool.

Meanwhile, season chicken with salt and pepper. Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Cook until browned and cooked through, 6–7 minutes per side. Transfer chicken to a plate; let cool slightly, then shred with 2 forks.
Combine chicken, freekeh, kale, kohlrabi, and radishes in a large bowl. Add dressing and toss to coat; season with salt and pepper. Top salad with cheese and chives.

name: Freekeh Soup For Two
instructions: Heat oil in a saucepan over medium heat. Add onion and cook until slightly softened, about 3 minutes. Add garlic and cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Stir in freekeh and toast for 3 minutes. Add carrot, celery leaves, parsley, salt, pepper, and bay leaf.
Bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer until freekeh is tender, 15 to 20 minutes. Taste and adjust seasoning.
Allow soup to rest for 5 minutes. Remove bay leaf and serve.

name: Freekeh With Chicken
instructions: Cook the chicken thighs by boiling them in water and desired spices.
Sauté the onions in olive oil. Add the washed freekah and let it cook for a minute.
To this, add the chicken broth and the spices and bring to a boil. Once boiling, cover and cook on medium for around 25 minutes or until cooked and tender.
To broil chicken: Cover chicken thighs with spice mixture and broil on high for 5 minutes.
Garnish with roasted nuts and serve with yogurt or yogurt and cucumber salad.
Enjoy!

name: Freeze & Bake Chicken Pot Pies
instructions: In a deep skillet, melt the butter and cook celery, carrots, and onion until tender.
Pour in the flour, and mix in well.
Stirring constantly, add in the milk and chicken broth a little at a time, alternating between the two. Bring to a boil and continue stirring until thickened.
