Refogue-os noutro tacho com um fio de azeite, junte o pão grosseiramente cortado e adicione uma concha da água. Deixe cozinhar até o pão absorver o caldo.

Adicione depois o tomate e deixe cozinhar, em lume brando, juntando de vez em quando a água fervida e mexendo bem até obter a consistência desejada. Retifique os temperos de sal e pimenta e sirva com os carapaus, salpicando tudo com salsa picada.

name: Fried Ice Cream
instructions: Scoop ice cream into eight 1/2-cup-sized balls.
Place on a baking sheet and freeze until firm, about 1 hour.
Combine cornflakes and cinnamon in a shallow dish. Beat egg whites until foamy in a separate bowl.
Roll ice cream balls in egg whites.
Then roll in crushed cornflakes, covering ice cream completely. Repeat if necessary. Freeze again until firm, about 3 hours.
Heat oil in a deep-fryer or large, heavy saucepan to 191°C (190 degrees C). Using a basket or slotted spoon, fry ice cream balls 1 or 2 at a time in hot oil until golden and crispy, 10 to 15 seconds.
Drain quickly on paper towels and serve immediately.

name: Fried Ipswich Whole Belly Clams With Tartar Sauce
instructions: Line a baking sheet with wax paper. Set up for what we call "standard breading procedure": Put the flour in a shallow bowl; put the eggs in a second shallow bowl and beat them with a fork; put the cracker meal, bread crumbs, cornmeal, and Old Bay in a third shallow bowl and whisk to combine.
Spread the clams out on several layers of paper towels and blot them as dry as possible.
Heat about 3 inches of canola oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat to 182°C.

Toss the clams in the flour and shake off any excess. Dip the clams into the egg, coating them completely. Lift them out by the handful and let any excess egg drip off, then put the clams into the breading mixture and toss to coat them completely. Keep one hand dry and use the other hand for wet. Transfer to the baking sheet. If the breading begins to clump, put it through a coarse sieve.
Fry the clams in small batches—crowding the pan will lower the temperature of the oil and the clams will come out greasy—until golden brown and crisp, about 1 minute. Drain on paper towels.
Pile the clams on 4 dinner plates and serve with individual bowls of tartar sauce—and some fries.

name: Fried Kibbe (lebanon)
instructions: 1. Bulguru 10 dakika soğuk suda bekletin.
2.  Suyunu iyice süzün.
3.  500 gr kıyma, içli köftelik bulgur, tuz ve karabiberi mutfak robotunda 10 dakika yoğurarak kıbbe hamurunu hazırlayın.
4. Çam fıstıklarını yağsız tavada rengi dönene kadar kavurun.
5.  İnce doğranmış soğanları ekleyerek 15 dakika kavurun.
6. Kıyma, tuz ve karabiberi ekleyin.
7.  10 dakika kısık ateşte pişirin.
8.  Bulgurlu harcı 30-40 parçaya ayırın.
9. Her parçayı avucunuzda ortasında bir oyuk açacak şekilde hazırlayın.
10.  İçerisine kıymalı harç paylaştırıp tepesini hafif sivrilterek kapatın.
11.  Ayçiçek yağını tavada kızdırın.
12.  Kıbbeleri ekleyip kızartın.
13.  Sıcak servis yapın.

name: Fried Leeks
instructions: Κόβουμε τα πράσα σε χοντρές ροδέλες, χρησιμοποιώντας μόνο το άσπρο και τρυφερό μέρος.
Ζεσταίνουμε το ελαιόλαδο σε τηγάνι και προσθέτουμε τα πράσα. Τα αφήνουμε να μαλακώσουν σε χαμηλή φωτιά για περίπου 10 λεπτά.
Δυναμώνουμε τη φωτιά και προσθέτουμε το χοιρινό, κομμένο σε μπουκιές. Το αφήνουμε να ροδίσει καλά για 10 λεπτά.
Προσθέτουμε αλάτι και πιπέρι και σβήνουμε με τον χυμό από ένα μεγάλο λεμόνι.
Σκεπάζουμε το τηγάνι, χαμηλώνουμε τη φωτιά και σιγομαγειρεύουμε για περίπου 10 λεπτά, μέχρι να απορροφηθούν τα υγρά και να μείνει το φαγητό μόνο με το λάδι του.
Στο τέλος, πασπαλίζουμε με χοντροκομμένο κόκκινο πιπέρι.
Σερβίρουμε με φρεσκοψημένο, ζεστό ψωμί και απολαμβάνουμε!

name: Fried Lemon And Radish Salad

ingredients.item: Sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar
. plus 1 0.5 tsp. finely chopped drained capers

ingredients.prep: such as arugula or mâche; about 3 cups

ingredients.item: Coarsely chopped parsley leaves with tender stems

instructions:
Whisk shallots, vinegar, lemon juice, capers, mustard, and honey in a small bowl; let sit at least 10 minutes and up to 1 hour. Whisk in oil and season dressing with salt and pepper.
Do ahead: Dressing can be made 2 days ahead; cover and chill.
Toast pistachios in a dry small skillet over medium heat, tossing occasionally, until golden brown in spots, about 4 minutes. Transfer to a cutting board and coarsely chop.

Thinly slice lemon crosswise into rounds; pluck out seeds and discard. Cook lemon slices in a medium saucepan of boiling salted water until just barely tender, about 2 minutes. Drain and pat dry with paper towels.

Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Working in batches, cook lemon slices, turning occasionally, until golden brown, about 5 minutes. Transfer to paper towels and season with sea salt; let cool. Set aside a few lemon slices for serving. Transfer remaining lemon slices to a cutting board and coarsely chop.

Drizzle half of dressing in a large bowl. Add greens, parsley, mint, radishes, and chopped lemon slices; toss to coat. Top with pistachios and reserved lemon slices. Serve remaining dressing alongside.

name: Fried Lentils And Bratwurst

ingredients.item: (or more) plus 2 tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil

ingredients.prep: broken into large florets, florets sliced as thinly as possible

instructions: Cook lentils in a large saucepan of simmering salted water until tender but still firm, 20–25 minutes. Drain; transfer to a medium bowl. Let cool; pat dry.

Place rosemary, garlic, and red pepper flakes in a large bowl. Heat ⅓ cup oil in a large skillet over medium-high until it begins to shimmer. Pour oil over aromatics in bowl; reserve skillet. Let sit 10 minutes, then whisk in lemon zest and juice; season rosemary mojo with salt.

Meanwhile, heat remaining 2 Tbsp. oil in reserved skillet over medium-high. Cook sausages, turning occasionally and pressing down so they are making good contact with the pan, until deeply browned and they have released some fat, 7–9 minutes total. Transfer to a plate.
Add lentils to skillet and increase heat to high. Season with salt; cook, stirring occasionally, until most of the lentils are crisp, about 5 minutes.
Add cauliflower to bowl with rosemary mojo and toss to coat. Taste and season with more salt if needed. Add lentils and toss again. Add more oil if needed.
Divide lentil salad among plates and top with sausages.

name: Fried Liver From Argyro
instructions: Ζεσταίνουμε το μισό ελαιόλαδο στο τηγάνι και αφήνουμε τα κρεμμύδια σε μέτρια φωτιά να γίνουν διάφανα, χωρίς να πάρουν χρώμα.
Τα αλατίζουμε ελαφρά και προσθέτουμε το δαφνόφυλλο.
Τα αφήνουμε για περίπου 10΄-12΄ να ξανθύνουν και να μαλακώσουν.
Τα βγάζουμε σε πιατέλα.
Κόβουμε το συκώτι σε λεπτές φέτες και στη συνέχεια σε μακρόστενα κομμάτια.
Ζεσταίνουμε το υπόλοιπο ελαιόλαδο στο τηγάνι σε δυνατή φωτιά.
Πασπαλίζουμε με λίγο αλεύρι τα κομμάτια και το τινάζουμε ελαφρά να φύγει το περιττό αλεύρι.
Ροδίζουμε το ταμποναρισμένα με αλεύρι κομμάτια στο ελαιόλαδο.
Φροντίζουμε να πάρει χρώμα γύρω γύρω, για περίπου 3 λεπτά.
Τότε προσθέτουμε ξανά τα  κρεμμύδια στο τηγάνι και σοτάρουμε για 1 λεπτό ανακατεύοντας.
Σβήνουμε με το κρασί και αφήνουμε να εξατμιστoύν σχεδόν όλα τα υγρά και να μείνει το φαγητό με το λάδι του.
Πασπαλίζουμε με ψιλοκομμένο μαϊντανό.
Προσθέτουμε αλάτι και πιπέρι αφού δοκιμάσουμε.

Μιας και το συκώτι μοσχαρίσιο στο τηγάνι είναι μια εξαιρετική πηγή πρωτεΐνης και ειδικά πλούσιο σε σίδηρο, για αυτό πρέπει να υπάρχει στη διατροφή μας. Το μαγείρεμά του πρέπει να γίνεται με προσοχή ώστε να έχετε το πιο γευστικό αποτέλεσμα.

name: Fried Liver With Onion
instructions: 1. Ciğerleri yıkayıp iyice süzün.
2.  Kağıt havlu üzerine unu yayın.
3.  Ciğerleri üzerine alıp karıştırarak unlayın.
4. Tavada 5 kaşık sıvıyağı kızdırın.
5.  Ciğerlerin fazla unlarını silkeleyerek kızgın yağa ekleyin.
6.  Tuz serpip kavurun.
7.  Kevgirle yağdan çıkarıp kağıt havlu üzerine alın.
8. Soğanları yarım halkalar halinde doğrayın.
9.  Sarımsakları soyup ince ince dilimleyin.
10.  Maydanozu temizleyip kıyın.
11. Tavadaki yağı süzün.
12.  Kalan 1 kaşık sıvıyağı tavaya alıp soğan ve sarımsakları kavurun.
13.  Ciğerleri ilave edip baharatları serperek karıştırın.
14. Tahta kaşıkla yavaş yavaş karıştırarak 5 dakika pişirin.
15.  Maydanozu ekleyip karıştırın ve ateşten alın.
16.  Sıcak olarak servis yapın.
17. Afiyet olsun.

name: Fried Mackerel
instructions: 1. Uskumruları fileto olarak hazırlayın.
2.  Soğanı soyup piyazlık doğrayın.
3.  Kuş üzümlerini sıcak suda şişmeye bırakın.
4.  Soğanı ısıtılmış zeytinyağında pembeleşinceye kadar kavurun, sonra fıstıkları ilave edip 2-3 dakika daha kavurun.
5.  Balık etini, süzülmüş kuş üzümünü, yenibahar, tuz ve karabiberi ekleyin.
6.  1-2 yemek kaşığı su ilave edip tencerenin kapağını kapatın.
7.  Orta ateşte 10-15 dakika yumuşayıncaya kadar pişirin ve ateşten alıp biraz ılınmasını bekleyin.
8.  Üzerine limon suyunu gezdirip kıyılmış maydanozu serpip servis yapın.

name: Fried Milk, Traditional Recipe

ingredients.item: 1  a cucharadita cafetera de extracto de vainilla
100 gr de azúcar blanco en polvo
½ taza de harina de trigo

instructions: El primer paso para preparar la receta de la leche frita es perfumar la leche. Uno de los aromatizadores que utilizaremos será la piel del limón. Entonces tendremos que lavar bien este fruto y retirar su piel con la ayuda de un pelador de vegetales. Hay que prestar especial atención a retirar solamente la parte verde o amarilla de la cáscara, y lo menos posible de la parte blanca debajo de la piel, porque esta tiene un gusto amargo.

Luego, vamos a calentar la leche líquida en una cazuela u olla (reserva un par de tazas de este ingrediente, para después). Para aromatizarla, agregaremos la piel del limón, la vainilla y la canela. Entonces vamos a esperar que la leche aumente su temperatura y cuando casi rompa a hervir, la apagaremos. Enseguida taparemos la olla, la cambiaremos de lugar y la dejaremos reposar durante media hora. De esta manera, la leche se convertirá en una infusión.

Cuando se termine el tiempo de reposo de la leche, retira la rama de canela y la piel del limón.  Vuélvela a calentar, con el fuego lo más bajo posible. Esto tomará más tiempo, pero es esencial para un mejor resultado. Mientras se calienta, vamos a añadir el azúcar y disolverla. Para esto, moveremos la leche con la ayuda de una cuchara de cocina o mejor aún, de un mezclador.

Mientras la leche se caliente, recuperamos la cantidad adicional de este ingrediente que habíamos reservado. La utilizaremos para disolver poco a poco la fécula, para asegurarnos de que se disuelva totalmente y de que no quede ningún grumo.

Una vez que la Maicena esté totalmente disuelta, mezclaremos esta leche con el resto. Recuerda que el fuego tiene que estar al mínimo. Esto es importante porque hará que la leche vaya espesándose poco a poco.  Mientras la leche se calienta, seguiremos revolviendo con frecuencia. Prestaremos especial atención a que la mezcla no se pegue al fondo de la olla.
La idea es continuar cocinando y moviendo la leche hasta que esté casi cuajada. Más bien se volverá muy espesa y cremosa.

Consigue un recipiente ancho o amplio, con paredes. Engrásalo para que el postre no se pegue. Decide si prefieres utilizar aceite o mantequilla (es mejor si está un poco fundida, pero nunca caliente).  Lo ideal es que es molde sea lo suficientemente ancho para que cuando vertamos el líquido, termine quedando más o menos de un par de dedos de espesor.
Cubre el recipiente con su tapa o en su defecto, con una película plástica. Guárdalo en el refrigerador por varias horas. De hecho, si puedes dejarlo toda una noche, la leche frita te quedará mejor.
Antes de sacar la mezcla del refrigerador, bate un huevo en un bol.  Al lado, acomoda un plato con la harina.
Saca la leche cuajada del frío y muy cuidadosamente, córtala en rectángulos medianos. La mezcla debe despegarse sin problemas de su recipiente, puesto que anteriormente lo hemos engrasado.

Calienta una sartén con un buen chorro de aceite, para freír los rectángulos de leche. Antes de meterlos en el aceite caliente, pasa cada rectángulo por el huevo batido y posteriormente por la harina, para rebozarlo.

Fríe cada rectángulo por ambos lados, hasta que tome un color dorado. Cuando los vayas sacando del aceite, deposítalos en un plato cubierto con una hoja de papel absorbente, para quitar el exceso de grasa.
Al lado, coloca un plato con una mezcla de azúcar en polvo y canela en polvo.  Pasa cada rectángulo de leche frita por esta mezcla, para un toque final de sabor y de textura.

name: Fried Milo Quaker Oat Bites
instructions: Mix all the ingredients together in a bowl.
Heat vegetable oil in a shallow skillet on low heat. Once heated, dollop your batter on like mini pancakes and griddle, just as you would with pancakes.
Serve with powdered sugar, whipped cream, Nutella, syrup, or as is!
Enjoy!

name: Fried Morel Mushrooms

ingredients.item: Fresh morel mushrooms - dirt gently brushed off and mushrooms halved lengthwise

instructions: Place halved morel mushrooms in a large bowl; cover with cold, lightly salted water. Refrigerate mushrooms for about 5 minutes to loosen any dirt; pour off salted water, rinse, and repeat twice more. Crevices of the mushrooms may harbor tiny stones or even insects. Thoroughly rinse mushrooms a final time and allow to drain on paper towels.
Place flour in a shallow bowl. Heat vegetable shortening in a large skillet until very hot.
Roll mushrooms in flour and tap off excess; gently lay mushrooms in the hot shortening.
Pan-fry until golden brown and flour coating is crisp, 5 to 8 minutes, turning often. Drain morels on paper towels, salt to taste, and enjoy your treasures!

name: Fried Mozzarella Puffs
instructions: Combine water, butter, and salt in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat. Bring to a simmer; pour in flour all at once and reduce heat to medium. Stir with a wooden spoon or spatula until dough starts coming together. Cook, scraping up and stirring dough, for 2 to 3 minutes.

Remove from heat; transfer dough to a large bowl. Let cool until no longer hot but still very warm, 5 to 10 minutes. Add egg and season with cayenne and freshly ground black pepper. Whisk vigorously until mixture combines into a very soft, sticky dough. Switch to a spatula and scrape dough into a ball.
Seal dough and spatula with plastic wrap; place into the refrigerator until cool, about 1 hour.

Meanwhile, season marinara sauce with balsamic vinegar, oregano, and red pepper flakes in a small pot over medium heat. Add anchovy fillet. Stir together and bring to a simmer. Let simmer for 10 minutes; turn off heat and let sit, covered, until ready to use.
Remove dough from the refrigerator; uncover. Grate mozzarella cheese over dough and stir to combine.
Heat oil in a deep fryer or heavy-duty pan over medium heat to 177°C (175 degrees C). Preheat the oven to 93°C (93 degrees C) or any temperature for keeping warm.
Scoop out about 2 tablespoons dough per puff and form into a football shape using two spoons.
Fry puffs, 5 or 6 at a time, in hot oil until browned, 2 to 3 minutes. Drain on paper towels. Keep puffs warm in the preheated oven while frying remaining dough. Serve with hot marinara sauce.

name: Fried Mozzarella Skewers
instructions: Make the sauce: Pour the olive oil into a large skillet set over medium-high heat. When the olive oil is hot, add the chopped garlic. Cook and stir until garlic is sizzling and fragrant, taking care not to burn it. Add the anchovies and capers, and stir until capers dissolve into the oil. Add the butter and melt it, then pour in the white wine and lemon juice. Bring to a rapid simmer, and cook until reduced by half, about 6 to 7 minutes. Keep warm.

Lay four slices of bread on your work surface. Top with the sliced mozzarella, making sure the cheese does not extend over the edges of the bread, trimming to fit if necessary. Top with remaining bread, to make four sandwiches. Seal each sandwich at each corner with a toothpick (four picks per sandwich).

Spread flour on a rimmed plate. Beat eggs and milk together in a wide, shallow bowl. Heat about 1/2 inch vegetable oil in a skillet over medium heat; oil is ready when a crust of bread sizzles on contact.

Dredge sandwiches well in flour, making sure to coat all sides and tap off the excess. Soak the sandwiches on all sides in the egg, letting the excess egg drip back into the bowl. Carefully ease the sandwiches into the oil, and fry until they're golden brown on both sides and the cheese is melted, about 1 to 2 minutes per side. Remove the sandwiches, and drain well on paper towels. Remove the toothpicks and use a serrated knife to cut them in half on the diagonal.
Return the sauce to a simmer, and stir in the parsley. Spread the sauce on four serving plates, then top with a sandwich and serve hot.

name: Fried Mushrooms
instructions: Ρίχνουμε το ελαιόλαδο και σοτάρουμε τα μανιτάρια για 3-4΄.
Προσθέτουμε το κρεμμύδι, το σκόρδο και τα λουκάνικα, και σοτάρουμε για 2-3’.
Προσθέτουμε τα φρέσκα κρεμμυδάκια, αλάτι, πιπέρι και τα ντοματίνια.
Προσθέτουμε την κρέμα βαλσαμικού.
Ανακατεύουμε και σβήνουμε τη φωτιά.
Προσθέτουμε στο τέλος και λίγο μαϊντανό.
Τα ντοματίνια θέλουμε να είναι ζωντανά, να δίνουν δροσιά.

name: Fried Mushrooms With Summer Vegetables

ingredients.item: 1 φλ.κυβάκια σκληρή και ώριμη πικάντικη φέτα
1 φλ.κυβάκια σκληρή και ώριμη πικάντικη φέτα

instructions: Κόβουμε το κρεμμύδι σε φέτες.
Ζεσταίνουμε το μισό λάδι και σοτάρουμε το κρεμμύδι.
Προσθέτουμε το σκόρδο σπασμένο για 1΄ να βγάλει το άρωμά του.
Ρίχνουε τα φασολάκια, τα κολοκύθια και τις ψιλοκομμένες ντομάτες. Αλατοπιπερώνουμε και σκεπάζουμε την κατσαρόλα.
Βράζουμε σε μέτρια φωτιά για 15΄.
Τέλος, προσθέτουμε τα βλήτα και τους κολοκυθοανθούς.
Σιγοβράζουμε για 10 – 15΄ να μείνει το τσιγαριστό με το λάδι του.
Λίγο πριν σβήσουμε το φαγητό, πασπαλίζουμε με τα μυρωδικά και τα κυβάκια φέτας.
Δεν ανακατεύουμε.
Σερβίρεται σε θερμοκρασία δωματίου.
Απολαμβάνετε τα βλήτα τσιγαριαστά με φανταστικό σπιτικό εύκολο ζυμωτό ψωμί.

name: Fried Mussels
instructions: 1. Midyeleri yıkayın.
2.  2 su bardağı su ve 1 tatlı kaşığı karbonatı bir kapta karıştırın.
3.  Unu bir kaba alın.
4. Sıvıyağı derin bir tencerede kızdırın.
5.  Midyeleri tahta çubuklara dizin.
6.  Karbonatlı suya batırıp çıkarın sonra una bulayın.
7.  Kızdırılmış yağa atıp kızartın.
8.  Kağıt havlu üzerine alıp fazla yağını çektirinMidye sosu olarak tarator sos kullanabilirsiniz.
9.  Tarator sosu hazırlamak için, sarımsakları soyun.
10.  4 dilim bayat ekmek içi, yarım su bardağı çekilmiş ceviz, sarımsak, tuz ve zeytinyağını robotta ezin.
11.  Sos kasesine alın.
12. Midyeleri servis tabağına alın.
13.  Yanında tarator sosla sıcak servis yapın.
14.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Fried Onions With Vegetable Saute
instructions: 1. Maden suyu, süt ve karbonatı bir kasede karıştırın.
2.  Un ve tuzu yayvan bir kapta harmanlayın.
3.  Patlıcan, kabak ve balkabağını dilimleyin.
4.  Derin bir kapta zeytinyağı, tuz ve baharatları karıştırın.
5.  Dilimlenmiş sebzeleri bu karışıma bulayın ve yağlı kağıt serili fırın tepsisine dizin.
6.  Önceden ısıtılmış 200 derece fırında 15-20 dakika pişirin.
7.  Fırından alıp servis tabağına dizin.
8.  Arpacık soğanları önce una, sonra maden sulu karışıma batırıp kızgın yağda kızartın.
9.  Kağıt havlu üzerine alarak fazla yağını çektirdiğiniz çıtır soğanlarınızı fırından çıkardığınız sebzenin üzerine yayın.
10.  Sıcak servis yapın.

name: Fried Oysters
instructions: Lave bem as ostras, abra-as, retire-as das conchas e seque-as com papel absorvente. Seque também as conchas e reserve.

Passe-as primeiro por farinha, depois pelo ovo batido e, por fim, por pão ralado. Frite em óleo quente, até ficarem bem douradinhas. Retire-as, escorra-as sobre papel absorvente e volte colocá-las nas conchas.
Misture o sumo do limão com o azeite, mexendo bem com uma vara de arames. Tempere com sal, pimenta e a salsa picada. Coloque este molho numa molheira e sirva com as ostras.

name: Fried Oysters With Bacon, Garlic, And Sage

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 2 teaspoons morton kosher salt

instructions: Whisk rice flour, salt, and cayenne in a medium bowl. Toss oysters in flour mixture to coat well, then top with a thin layer of dredge (make sure that none of the oysters are peeking out). Cover with plastic wrap and chill in dredge until ready to fry.
Cook bacon in a large skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium-low, stirring occasionally, until bacon is browned and crisp, 12–15 minutes. Transfer bacon to a small bowl with a slotted spoon.

Pour half of bacon fat into a small heatproof bowl or measuring cup and set aside. Add ½ cup butter to drippings in skillet and heat over medium-high. As soon as butter is foaming, remove half of oysters from dredge and shake off any excess. Add to skillet along with 3 garlic cloves and cook, gently shaking skillet to baste oysters with fat and turning oysters occasionally, until golden brown and crisp all over, about 5 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer oysters and garlic to paper towels and let drain.

Pour off fat in skillet; discard. Wipe out skillet and return to medium-high. Heat remaining ½ cup butter and reserved bacon fat in skillet. As soon as butter is foaming, repeat process with remaining oysters and garlic. Transfer to paper towels and let drain.
Cook sage in same skillet just until crisp, about 30 seconds. Transfer to paper towels.
Arrange oysters and garlic on a platter and top with fried sage and bacon. Serve with mustard.
Do Ahead: Oysters can be dredged 4 hours ahead. Keep chilled.

name: Fried P&j Oysters Amandine

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: A deep-fry thermometer

Cook butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat, swirling pan occasionally, until it begins to brown and smell nutty, about 4 minutes. Mix in vinegar, Worcestershire sauce, and hot sauce; season with salt and pepper.
Toast almonds in a small dry skillet over medium heat, tossing often, until golden, about 4 minutes; let cool.

Fit a large saucepan with thermometer. Heat vegetable oil over medium-high heat until thermometer registers 350°. Whisk flour, cornmeal, cornstarch, and Creole seasoning in a medium bowl. Beat egg whites in another bowl until soft peaks form. Working in batches, coat oysters in egg whites, dredge in flour mixture, then fry, turning, until brown and crisp, about 4 minutes. Transfer to paper towels; season with salt and pepper.

Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add mushrooms and cook, tossing, until softened, about 5 minutes; season with salt and pepper. Add spinach, vinaigrette, and almonds; cook, tossing, just until spinach is wilted, about 1 minute; drizzle with lemon juice.
Serve oysters on top of spinach mixture.

name: Fried Peach Hand Pies

ingredients.prep: peeled, cut into  0.25" pieces, or 1 lb. frozen, slightly thawed peaches cut into  0.25" pieces

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt
. diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions:
Cook 1 lb. peaches (about 4), peeled, cut into ¼" pieces, or 1 lb. frozen, slightly thawed peaches cut into ¼" pieces, ⅓ cup granulated sugar, 1 tsp. finely grated lemon zest, 1 tsp. fresh lemon juice, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a medium heavy saucepan over medium-low heat, stirring occasionally with a heatproof rubber spatula, until peaches are softened, juices are thickened, and mixture resembles a chunky jam, 45–60 minutes. Let cool.
Do ahead: Filling can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.

While the peaches are cooking, whisk 2 tsp. granulated sugar, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 2½ cups (313 g) all-purpose flour in a large bowl until combined. Using a pastry cutter or your fingers, work in ½ cup (1 stick) chilled unsalted butter, cut into 1" pieces, until largest pieces are pea-size. (Alternatively, pulse together dry ingredients in a food processor, then pulse in butter.) Sprinkle 2 Tbsp. apple cider vinegar over and mix with your hands to combine. Drizzle ¼ cup plus 3 Tbsp. ice water over and mix by hand until dough just comes together in a shaggy mass.
Turn out dough onto a lightly floured surface and gather into a ball. Divide in half and pat into disks; wrap each in plastic. Chill at least 15 minutes.

Working one disk at a time, unwrap dough and roll out on a lightly floured surface to ⅛" thick. Using a 5"-diameter cutter or bowl, punch out as many rounds as you can, transferring to a baking sheet as you go. Gather dough scraps, reroll, and punch out more rounds. (You should get 12 or 13 in all.)

Working with 1 round at a time, spoon a heaping tablespoonful of filling onto 1 side. Brush edges with water, then fold empty side of dough up and over filling and bring edges together to create a half-moon shape. Crimp edges firmly with a fork to seal. Arrange pies on a parchment-lined baking sheet and chill until firm, about 15 minutes.
Fit a large heavy skillet, preferably cast iron, with thermometer and pour in vegetable oil to come ½" up sides. Heat over medium-high until thermometer registers 340°.

Working in 3 or 4 batches, keeping remaining pies chilled until ready to fry, and adding more oil between batches if needed, fry pies, turning every 2 minutes with tongs and adjusting heat as needed to maintain oil temperature, until golden brown and crisp, 13–15 minutes; if you see any pies beginning to burst open toward the end of cooking, immediately remove from oil. Transfer to paper towels to drain.

Just before serving, transfer pies to a platter and dust with powdered sugar.
Do ahead: Dough can be made 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.

name: Fried Pepper Recipe

ingredients.item: 10–12 adet yeşil biber (çarliston veya sivri biber)
Kefir + yoğurt karışımı (ferah bir tat verir)
Fırında közlenmiş sarımsak (daha hafif ve tatlı bir aroma)

instructions: 1. Biberlerin saplarını isterseniz koparın, isterseniz bütün bırakın.
2.  Üzerlerini güzelce yıkayın ve iyice kurulayın.
3.  Kızartma sırasında yağ sıçramaması için tamamen kuru olmaları önemlidir.
4. Geniş bir tavaya 1 su bardağı sıvı yağ ekleyin ve yağı orta-yüksek ateşte iyice ısıtın.
5. Yağ kızınca biberleri tavaya alın.
6.  Ara ara çevirerek her tarafı iyice kabarıp hafifçe kızarana kadar pişirin.
7. Kızaran biberleri kağıt havlu üzerine alarak fazla yağını süzdürün.
8. Küçük bir kapta süzme yoğurt, ezilmiş sarımsak ve tuzu karıştırın.
9.  Koyu kıvamlı, pürüzsüz bir sos elde edin.
10. Biberleri servis tabağına alın.
11.  Yoğurt sosunu üzerine gezdirebilir ya da yanında dip sos olarak servis edebilirsiniz.

name: Fried Phyllo With Egg
instructions: 1. Lezzet'in yemek tarifleri gibi yufkalı tarifleri de çok ilgi görüyor.
2.  Yufkayı mutfak tezgahına yayın.
3.  Bir yumurtanın beyazını ayırın.
4.  Sarısını fırça yardımıyla yufkanın her tarafına sürün.
5.  Yufkayı her iki tarafından tutarak 3 cm kalınlığında katlayarak sonuna kadar devam edin.
6.  Elde ettiğiniz uzun yufkayı 4’er cm uzunluğunda kesin.
7.  Aynı işlemi diğer yufkaya da uygulayın.
8.  Bir tavada ayçiçeği yağını iyice ısıtın.
9.  Diğer tarafta bir kaba su aktarın.
10.  Hazırladığınız yumurtalı yufkaları önce bu suya batırın sonra kızgın yağda kızartın.
11.  Sıcak servis yapın.
12.  İsteğe göre yufkaların içine maydanoz, beyazpeynir ve kırmızı pul biberle hazırlayacağınız harcı da ilave edebilirsiniz.

name: Fried Pickle Dogs

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Slice dill pickles lengthwise into strips. Place flour in a dish. Combine eggs and 1 tablespoon mustard in a second dish. Combine cornmeal, salt, and pepper in a third dish.

Heat canola oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Dip a pickle slice in the flour, egg, and cornmeal mixtures. Place in the hot oil. Fry until golden brown, 3 to 5 minutes. Turn and cook the other side until golden, about 2 to 3 minutes more. Remove from skillet and place on paper towels to drain. Repeat with remaining pickle slices. Pour off most of the oil; reserve the rest in the pan for frying hot dogs.

Fill a saucepan with water and bring to a boil. Place hot dogs in boiling water, remove from heat, and let stand for 5 minutes. Remove hot dogs from water and let cool slightly. Wrap each hot dog with a strip of bacon, securing with a toothpick if desired.
Heat skillet with reserved oil over medium heat. Fry bacon-wrapped hot dogs until bacon is crispy, turning occasionally, 5 to 7 minutes.
Spread remaining mustard on a toasted bun and top with a bacon-wrapped hot dog. Tuck in slices of fried pickle. Repeat with remaining mustard, buns, hot dogs, and pickles.

name: Fried Pickle Sliders
instructions: Heat the oil in a large pot until it reaches 350˚F (120˚C).

In a small bowl, combine the flour, garlic powder, onion powder, thyme, cayenne, paprika, salt, and pepper, and mix until evenly distributed. Dredge the pickles in the flour mixture, then the eggs, and then the bread crumbs. Fry the pickles for 3 to 5 minutes, or until browned and crispy on the outside.
For the ranch dressing, add the buttermilk, mayonnaise, sour cream, garlic powder, onion powder, dill, parsley, salt, and pepper to a medium bowl and stir until well combined.
Using a toothpick, assemble a slider by layering a fried pickle, the ranch dressing, a meatball, lettuce, a tomato slice, and one more pickle. Repeat with the remaining ingredients.
Enjoy!

name: Fried Pickled Jalapeños With Zesty Lime Ranch
instructions: Drain peppers and reserve 1/4 cup plus 1 teaspoon of brine from the jar. Pat peppers dry with paper towels.
Combine sour cream, ranch seasoning, the zest and juice of the lime, and one teaspoon of reserved jalapeño liquid. Stir well and set aside. This could be made up to 3 days ahead.
Pour oil in a small saucepan and heat over medium heat to 191°C (190 degrees C).

Whisk together flour, taco seasoning, remaining reserved jalapeño juice, and water in a shallow dish until smooth. Toss dried jalapeños in cornstarch until lightly coated and shake off any excess. Coat slices in flour mixture with a fork and allow the excess to drip off.

Add several coated slices to the hot oil and fry until golden and crisp, 1 1/2 minutes. Transfer to a paper towel to drain and repeat with remaining jalapeños, in batches. Serve immediately with ranch dip.

name: Fried Pickles With Spicy Mayo

ingredients.item: (or more) seltzer water or club soda

ingredients.prep: cut into 1/4-inch-thick rounds and patted dry

instructions: Whisk mayonnaise, Sriracha, lemon juice, and garlic in a small bowl; season with salt.
Pour grapeseed oil into a medium heavy saucepan; fit with deep-fry thermometer. Heat over medium heat until thermometer registers 350°.
Whisk flour, cornstarch, and baking powder in a medium bowl. Whisk in 3/4 cup seltzer water. Whisk in more seltzer, if needed, until batter is the consistency of heavy cream.

Working in batches, coat pickle slices with batter, letting excess drip off, and add to oil one by one (to prevent them from sticking to one another). Fry, turning halfway through, until golden brown and crisp on both sides, about 3 minutes per batch.
Using a slotted spoon, transfer to a paper towel-lined plate. Serve with spicy mayo.

name: Fried Piparras
instructions: Lava y seca bien las piparras frescas. Asegúrate de que estén completamente secas antes de comenzar con la tempura.
En un bol grande, tamiza la harina de trigo, la levadura en polvo y la sal. Agrega el huevo ligeramente batido y la cerveza fría. Mezcla suavemente hasta obtener una masa homogénea y sin grumos.

En una sartén profunda, calienta suficiente aceite de oliva a una temperatura de aproximadamente 180°C. Es importante que el aceite esté bien caliente para lograr una tempura crujiente y dorada. Sumerge cada piparra en la masa de tempura, asegurándote de cubrirlas completamente. Sacude suavemente el exceso de masa y colócalas con cuidado en el aceite caliente.

Fríe las piparras en lotes pequeños para evitar que se peguen entre sí y para mantener la temperatura del aceite constante. Fríe durante aproximadamente 2-3 minutos, volteándolas ocasionalmente, hasta que estén doradas y crujientes por fuera y tiernas por dentro. Retira las piparras en tempura del aceite con una espumadera y colócalas sobre papel absorbente para eliminar el exceso de grasa. Sírvelas inmediatamente mientras aún estén calientes y crujientes.
category: Recetas de Aperitivos, Tapas y Pinchos

name: Fried Plantain Slices Step By Step
original_name: Tajadas de plátano frito paso a paso
instructions: Lo primero que debes hacer será pelar el plátano y cortarlo en tajadas.

Las tajadas de plátano se cortan en rodajas o de una forma transversal o alargada con aproximadamente 3mm de espesor. Una manera sencilla es colocar el plátano en una tabla para picar y vas cortando de forma diagonal, para que queden unas tajadas largas y bonitas.

En un satén a fuego medio-alto, pon a calentar el aceite. Una vez caliente, coloca las tajadas para freírlas. Se cocinan muy rápido, debes hacerlo por 1 minuto o menos por cada lado. Te recomiendo que no te despegues del sartén para que no se quemen.
Espera unos segundos y cuando veas que se está colocando en un tono dorado por la parte de abajo, es momento de voltear con ayuda de un tenedor.
Cuando ya estén dorados por ambos lados, saca tus tajadas y colócalas en papel absorbente, luego incorpora mas tajadas a freír hasta que ya hayas culminado con todas.
Una vez fritas, las tajadas de plátano están listas para servir.
¡Disfrútalas!

name: Fried Plantains

ingredients.item: Aceite vegetal suave para freír (girasol o similar)

instructions: Pela 2 plátanos macho y córtalos en rodajas de aproximadamente 1–1,5 cm de grosor.
Calienta abundante aceite vegetal suave en una sartén amplia a fuego medio hasta que esté bien caliente, sin que llegue a humear.
Añade las rodajas de plátano en una sola capa y fríelas durante 2–3 minutos por cada lado, hasta que estén bien doradas por fuera y tiernas por dentro.
Dales la vuelta con cuidado y ajusta el fuego si ves que se doran demasiado rápido.
Sácalas a un plato con papel absorbente y deja reposar 1–2 minutos antes de servir.

name: Fried Pork
instructions: Κόβουμε με μαχαίρι τις πιπεριές σε λωρίδες.
Σοτάρουμε πρώτα το κρέας στο ελαιόλαδο για 5 με 6 λεπτά, μέχρι να πάρει χρώμα γύρω γύρω.
Προσθέτουμε τις πιπεριές κομμένες σε λωρίδες και συνεχίζουμε το σοτάρισμα για 3 με 4 λεπτά.
Σβήνουμε με το τσίπουρο.
Πασπαλίζουμε με την πάπρικα και προσθέτουμε αλάτι και πιπέρι.
Αραιώνουμε τη μουστάρδα σε 1 φλ. νερό και περιχύνουμε την τηγανιά.
Μόλις το κρέας πιει όλα τα υγρά του και μείνει με το λάδι του προσθέτουμε το κρασί και τη ρίγανη και σιγοβράζουμε για 6 με 7 λεπτά ακόμη, ώσπου να μείνει η τηγανιά μόνο με το λάδι της.
Τη σερβίρουμε ζεστή.

name: Fried Potato Skin With Mayonnaise
original_name: Casca de batata frita com maionese
instructions: Depois de lavadas e bem escorridas, frite as cascas de batata em 300 ml do óleo, previamente aquecido, até ficarem crocantes. Retire e deixe escorrer sobre papel absorvente.
Num copo medidor, coloque os ovos, o restante óleo, a salsa e uma pitada de sal. Triture com a varinha mágica até obter uma maionese.
Disponha as cascas de batata frita numa travessa e sirva com a maionese, colocada numa molheira à parte.

name: Fried Potato Skin With Shrimp Dip
original_name: Casca de batata frita com dip de camarão
instructions: Coza o miolo de camarão em água, escorra e deixe arrefecer. Coloque-o depois num processador e adicione o queijo mascarpone e o iogurte grego.
Junte a mostarda, o sumo de limão e a salsa (reservando um pouco desta para a decoração) e tempere com sal, pimenta rosa e paprica. Triture tudo até obter um preparado homogéneo. Reserve.
Depois de bem lavadas e escorridas, frite as cascas de batata em óleo quente abundante. Escorra sobre papel absorvente e tempere com sal.
Sirva as cascas fritas de batata com o dip de camarão, colocado numa molheira à parte, salpicando tudo com a restante salsa picada.

name: Fried Potato Wedges
instructions: Heat oil in a deep-fryer or large saucepan to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Slice potatoes into 16 wedges.
Combine flour, chili powder, chicken bouillon, paprika, black pepper, and cayenne in a 1-gallon resealable plastic bag.
Dip potato wedges in milk, then shake them in the flour mixture. Fry in the hot oil until golden brown, 5 to 6 minutes per batch. Let drain on paper towels.

name: Fried Potatoes Recipe

ingredients.item: ¼  de taza de crema de leche

instructions: Limpia y pela las papas y ponlas enteras, o picadas por la mitad, en una olla con agua.
Es común que en muchos casos las papas no se pelen completas sino que se le dejen algunas partes con piel y otras sin ella, esto es opcional.
Una vez estén cocinadas las papas retíralas del fuego.
Mientras se van cocinando las papas puedes hacer la salsa.
Pica el tomate en cubos pequeños.
Los tallos de cebollín también los vas a picar en trozos pequeños.
Caliente una sartén a fuego medio, ponle la mantequilla y echa el cebollín. Cocínalo un par de minutos.
Agrega el tomate y las especias: sal, pimienta y comino al gusto.
Mezcla bien y deja que se cocine unos 5 minutos.
Añade ahora la crema de leche y el queso rallado y sigue revolviendo un par de minutos más.
Pon las papas en un plato profundo y echa por encima la salsa.
Como último paso agrega el cilantro picado.
Listo, ya tienes unas deliciosas papas chorreadas.

name: Fried Potatoes With Eggplants
instructions: Πλένουμε και αφαιρούμε το κοτσάνι από τις μελιτζάνες .
Tις κόβουμε σε μεγάλες μπουκιές και τις αφήνουμε για 10΄ σε μπολ με νερό.
Καθαρίζουμε τις πατάτες και τις κόβουμε στα τέσσερα. Αν θέλετε, μπορείτε να προσθέσετε και κολοκυθάκια.
Στύβουμε τις μελιτζάνες από το νερό.
Ζεσταίνουμε το ελαιόλαδο και σοτάρουμε σε μια κατσαρόλα το σκόρδο για 2΄.
Προσθέτουμε τις πατάτες και τις μελιτζάνες και ανακατεύουμε τα υλικά, να λαδωθούν.
Προσθέτουμε τον πελτέ ντομάτας και τη ζάχαρη.
Συμπληρώνουμε με νερό ίσα που να καλύπτει το φαγητό, περίπου 1½ φλυτζάνι.
Προσθέτουμε αλάτι και πιπέρι στο ραγού και προσθέτουμε το δαφνόφυλλο.
Σιγοβράζουμε το γιαχνί για 25΄, μέχρι να μαλακώσουν καλά οι πατάτες και να χυλώσει η σάλτσα.
Όταν μελώσει το φαγητό, είναι έτοιμο να το απολαύσουμε.
Το σερβίρουμε πάντα ζεστό με φέτα ή με φρέσκο τυρί.

name: Fried Potatoes With Tomato-chipotle Sauce And Aioli

ingredients.prep: New Mexico, or guajillo chile, seeds removed

ingredients.item: A spice mill or mortar and pestle; a deep-fry thermometer

instructions: Grind fennel seeds in spice mill or mortar and pestle; set aside. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium. Add onion, season with salt, and cook, stirring often, until golden and soft, 8–10 minutes. Add chiles, garlic, coriander, and reserved fennel and cook, stirring, 1 minute. Add tomatoes, crushing with your hands as you go, and juices; reduce heat and gently simmer, stirring occasionally at first and more frequently as sauce thickens, until sauce is thickened and jammy, 50–60 minutes. Let cool; discard chiles. Pulse sauce in a food processor to a coarse purée.
Do Ahead: Tomato sauce can be made 4 days ahead; cover and chill. Bring to room temperature before serving.

While tomato sauce is cooking, rinse potatoes in a colander under cold water until water runs clear. Transfer to a large pot and pour in cold water to cover by 1". Season with salt and bring to a gentle simmer; cook until potatoes are just tender, 20–25 minutes. Drain and transfer potatoes to a kitchen towel–lined rimmed baking sheet. Chill (uncovered) until cold, about 1 hour.

Meanwhile, whisk egg yolk, garlic, and vinegar in a small bowl to combine. Whisking constantly, gradually drizzle in grapeseed oil and continue to whisk until aioli is thickened and emulsified. Season with salt; stir in 1 tsp. water.

Fit a large pot with thermometer and pour in vegetable oil to measure 3". Heat over medium-high until thermometer registers 325°. Working in batches, fry potatoes until skins begin to slightly bubble around edges but do not brown, about 2 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer potatoes to paper towels to drain.
Reheat oil until thermometer registers 375°. Working in batches, refry potatoes until golden brown and very crisp, about 3 minutes per batch. Transfer to fresh paper towels to drain.
Toss potatoes, paprika, and cumin in a large bowl; season with salt. Serve potatoes with tomato sauce and aioli.
Do Ahead: Potatoes can be blanched 1 day ahead. Let cool; cover and chill.

name: Fried Prawns - Snack
instructions: Descongele os camarões e tempere-os com a cerveja, o pimentão-doce, a mostarda, a malagueta cortada em tiras e sal. Deixe marinar durante 15 minutos.
Descasque os dentes de alho, pique-os e aloure-os numa frigideira com o azeite. Junte os camarões escorridos e deixe cozinhar de ambos os lados.
Regue depois com a marinada e deixe cozinhar mais um pouco, até o álcool evaporar. Retire do lume, retifique os temperos, polvilhe com coentros picados e sirva.

name: Fried Prawns In Soy Sauce
instructions: Heat 5 tablespoons oil in a wok over medium-high heat. Add prawns; saute until pink, about 3 minutes. Transfer to a plate.

Pour remaining 2 tablespoons oil into the wok. Add spring onions and ginger; cook and stir until fragrant, about 2 minutes. Return prawns to the wok; cook and stir for 1 minute. Add chicken stock, sugar, rice wine, soy sauce, bouillon granules, and salt; bring sauce to a boil. Reduce heat to low; simmer until flavors combine, about 2 minutes.
Arrange prawns on a serving plate; pour sauce on top.

name: Fried Pumpkin: A Crunchy And Delicious Dessert
original_name: Fritos de calabaza: un postre crujiente y delicioso
instructions: Lava, pela y corta la calabaza en cubos pequeños.
En una sartén, coloca la calabaza picada con la mantequilla y el azúcar moreno. Tapa y cocina a fuego medio hasta que la calabaza esté blanda.
Tritura la calabaza cocida y colócala en un recipiente, añade el huevo, el azúcar moreno extra y la harina. Mezcla bien hasta obtener una masa homogénea.
Calienta abundante aceite de girasol en una sartén, toma porciones de la masa y fríelas hasta que estén doradas por ambos lados. Retira y escurre sobre papel absorbente.
Espolvorea con azúcar glass antes de servir y disfruta calientes o a temperatura ambiente.

name: Fried Rabbit

ingredients.prep: cut into 6 pieces, rib cage reserved for another use (such as stock)

instructions: Place rabbit in a medium pot; add 1 Tbsp. salt, next 5 ingredients, and water if needed so that rabbit is completely submerged. Bring liquid to a boil over medium-high heat; immediately reduce heat and gently simmer until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of the meat registers 135°, about 20 minutes. Let rabbit cool in cooking liquid. Drain rabbit; discard liquid.

Meanwhile, whisk crème fraîche, Dijon mustard, oregano, rosemary, thyme, and black pepper in a medium bowl. Add rabbit to marinade, turning to coat well. Cover tightly with plastic wrap and chill for 24 hours.
Lightly toast fennel seeds in a small skillet over medium heat until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Grind in spice mill and transfer to a medium bowl; whisk in remaining 2 tsp. salt and flours.

Pour oil into a large deep skillet to a depth of 1 inch. Prop deep-fry thermometer in oil so bulb is submerged. Heat over medium-high heat until thermometer registers 325°. Set a wire rack inside a rimmed baking sheet. Working in 2 batches, dredge rabbit in flour mixture, shaking off any excess, and fry, turning once and adjusting heat to maintain a steady temperature, until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of the meat registers 165°, about 10 minutes. Transfer rabbit to prepared rack. Sprinkle with red pepper flakes, if using, and let cool for at least 10 minutes before serving. Garnish with chives, if desired.

name: Fried Razor Clams
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Mix crushed crackers in a bowl with black pepper, cayenne pepper, paprika, and garlic powder. Place eggs in a separate bowl. Dip clams into eggs, then into cracker mixture to evenly coat.
Fry clams in the hot oil until golden brown. Do not overcook.

name: Fried Rice With Bacon And Sriracha
instructions: Mix corn, peas, and 1 tablespoon water in a microwave-safe bowl. Microwave on high until tender, about 2 minutes.
Whisk 1 tablespoon water and 1 egg together in a small bowl.

Melt butter in a wok or large skillet over medium heat. Pour in egg; cook until set, about 1 minute per side. Transfer cooked egg into to a plate and slice. Repeat with remaining 2 tablespoons water and remaining 2 eggs.
Place bacon in the wok and cook over medium-high heat, turning occasionally, until evenly browned, about 10 minutes. Drain bacon slices on paper towels and slice.

Reheat wok over high heat, about 1 minute. Swirl in oil; heat until it shimmers. Break up large clumps of rice with wet fingers to separate the grains. Add 2 handfuls of rice to the wok and cook, stirring constantly, until it stars to crisp up, about 1 minute. Transfer to a bowl. Repeat with remaining rice.

Reduce heat to medium; return all rice to the wok. Stir in sriracha sauce, soy sauce, and fish sauce until rice is well-coated and heated through, about 2 minutes. Add corn, peas, eggs, and bacon; toss together until combined, about 3 minutes.

name: Fried Rice With Chinese Sausages Step By Step
original_name: Arroz frito con salchichas chinas paso a paso

ingredients.item: 4  tazas de arroz cocido del día anterior
4  salchichas chinas lap cheong (o salchichas ahumadas)

instructions: Desmenuza el arroz cocido frío con tus manos para separar los granos.
Corta las salchichas en rodajas finas en diagonal.
Bate los huevos en un recipiente con un poco de sal.
Calienta una cucharada de aceite en un wok o sartén grande a fuego alto.
Cocina el huevo batido como si fuera una tortilla, retira y corta en tiras.
En el mismo wok, añade otra cucharada de aceite y saltea las salchichas hasta que suelten su aceite y estén ligeramente doradas.
Agrega la zanahoria y saltea por 2-3 minutos.
Incorpora el arroz y rompe cualquier grumo con la espátula.
Añade la salsa de soja por el borde del wok y saltea constantemente.
Incorpora el huevo cortado, la pimienta y el aceite de sésamo.
Finaliza con la cebolleta picada y rectifica el punto de sal.

name: Fried Rice With Egg

ingredients.item: 1 κόκκινο κρεμμύδι κομμένο σε λεπτές φέτες
1 κ.γl σάλτσα σόγια με λίγο αλάτι
1 κομμάτι ψαρονέφρι κομμένο σε λωρίδες λεπτές ή 1 κομμάτι κοτόπουλο
1 κόκκινη και 1 κίτρινη πιπεριά κομμένη σε λεπτά μπαστουνάκια
Φύτρες φασολιών ή φακής ή άλλες φύτρες
Έξτρα σάλτσα σόγιας για το σερβίρισμα
1 κόκκινο κρεμμύδι κομμένο σε λεπτές φέτες
1 κ.γl σάλτσα σόγια με λίγο αλάτι
1 κομμάτι ψαρονέφρι κομμένο σε λωρίδες λεπτές ή 1 κομμάτι κοτόπουλο
1 κόκκινη και 1 κίτρινη πιπεριά κομμένη σε λεπτά μπαστουνάκια
Φύτρες φασολιών ή φακής ή άλλες φύτρες
Έξτρα σάλτσα σόγιας για το σερβίρισμα

instructions: Ζεσταίνουμε σε ένα τηγάνι 1 κ.σ. λάδι.
Ροδίζουμε το κρέας ανακατεύοντας μέχρι να ψηθεί για 4-5 λεπτά, προσθέτουμε το κρεμμύδι να ροδίσει για 5-7 λεπτά, και στη συνέχεια προσθέτουμε το καρότο και τις πιπεριές.
Αφήνουμε να μαραθούν ελαφρά.
Τραβάμε στη μια μεριά του γουόκ τα λαχανικά και ρίχνουμε λίγο λάδι στο άδειο σημείο του τηγανιου.
Ρίχνουμε τα αυγά και αφήνουμε να ψηθούν ανακατεύοντας για 2 λεπτά, να ψηθούν και να σπάσουν σε κομμάτια.
Ανακατεύουμε όλα τα υλικά του τηγάνι, λαχανικά, κρέας, αυγά και ρίχνουμε την σόγια και την oyster sauce (τη βρίσκετε σε μεγάλα σούπερ μάρκετ στο σημείο με τα ασιατικά προϊόντα).
Προσθέτουμε τις φύτρες τα ενταμάμε, το φρέσκο κρεμμύδι και το σουσάμι.
Τέλος ρίχνουμε το βρασμένο ρύζι ανακατεύουμε πολύ καλά για 1-2 λεπτά στη φωτιά κι αν χρειάζεται προσθέτουμε λίγη σάλτσα σόγιας ή oyster επιπλέον.
Σερβίρουμε το τηγανητό ρύζι σε ζεστά μπολ.

name: Fried Rice With Meat

ingredients.item: Bir buçuk su bardağı dövme (aşurelik buğday)

instructions: 1. Nohut ve dövmeyi bir gece önceden ayrı ayrı kaplarda ıslatın.
2.  Ertesi gün ikisini de süzün ve nohudu bir tencereye alın.
3.  Tencerenin yarısına kadar su ekleyin ve yarım saat haşlayın.
4.  Dövmeyi ilave edip tuz ile tatlandırın.
5.  Kısık ateşte nohut ve dövme iyice yumuşayıp, suyunu çekinceye kadar pişirin.
6. Tereyağını bir tavada eritin ve hafif rengi dönünce pilavın üzerine gezdirip, karıştırın.
7.  Diğer taraftan eti ayrı bir tencerede kısık ateşte kendi suyunu salıp çekene kadar pişirin.
8.  Buğdaylı karışımı servis tabağına alın ve üzerine eti dökün.
9. Etli dövme pilavını, zeytinyağlı bamya ve cacık ile birlikte servis edebilirsiniz.
10.  Şimdiden afiyet olsun.
11.  Etli Dövme Pilavının Püf Noktaları Nelerdir?Bir gece önceden ıslattığınız dövmeleri, tarife başlamadan önce sudan geçirin ve süzün.
12. Pilav içinde kuzu eti yerine koyun veya dana eti de kullanabilirsiniz.
13.  Et ve pilavı servis esnasında karıştırın.
14. Eti haşladığınız suyu cam kavanoz içinde muhafaza edin.
15.  İstediğiniz zaman pilav ve makarnaların içinde kullanarak aroma katabilirsiniz.

name: Fried Rice With Shrimps
instructions: Αν οι γαρίδες είναι μεγάλες τις κόβουμε σε κομμάτια κι αν είναι μικρές τις βάζουμε ολόκληρες.
Τις στεγνώνουμε με απορροφητικό χαρτί.
Ζεσταίνουμε το γουόκ σε μέτρια ένταση και προσθέτουμε το μισό βούτυρο.
Μόλις λιώσει προσθέτουμε τις γαρίδες και σορτάρουμε για 1 λεπτό. Τις βγάζουμε σε πιάτο και σκεπάζουμε να μην στεγνώσουν.
Στο ίδιο σκεύος προσθέτουμε το υπόλοιπο βούτυρο και σοτάρουμε το κρεμμύδι με το καρότο για 3-4 λεπτά.
Προσθέτουμε το τζίντζερ, το λευκό μέρος από τα φρέσκα κρεμμύδια, το σκόρδο, την πιπεριά και σοτάρουμε για 1 λεπτό.
Προσθέτουμε το ρύζι διαχωρίζοντας το με τα δάχτυλα να μην είναι κολλημένο.
Σοτάρουμε για 2 λεπτά να αρχίσει να ψήνεται το ρύζι στη βάση του γουόκ.
Μαζεύουμε τα υλικά στο πλάι του σκεύους.
Και στο κενό σημείο προσθέτουμε τα αυγά χτυπημένα.
Αφήνουμε για 1 λεπτό να σταθεροποιηθούν από κάτω κι αρχίζουμε να ανακατεύουμε να ψηθούν.
Σπάμε με την κουτάλα σε κομματάκια και το ανακατεύουμε με τα υπόλοιπα υλικά.
Προσθέτουμε τη σάλτσα σόγιας , τον αρακά και τις γαρίδες.
Σοτάρουμε για 2 λεπτά.
Τρίβουμε πιπέρι και δοκιμάζουμε αν χρειάζεται επιπλέον σόγια.
Προσθέτουμε το πράσινο μέρος από το φρέσκο κρεμμύδι και αποσύρουμε.
Σερβίρουμε αμέσως και προσθέτουμε λίγο λάιμ.

name: Fried Rice With Spring Vegetables And Fried Eggs

ingredients.item: Leftover cooked rice or other grain

ingredients.prep: sliced into 1-inch pieces on a diagonal

ingredients.item: Shelled fresh peas (from about 1 pound pods) or frozen peas
(or more) white or regular soy sauce

instructions: Cut ramp bulbs in half and slice greens into 1" pieces. Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high. Cook ramp bulbs, shallot, chile, and ginger, stirring occasionally, until fragrant and just softened, about 2 minutes. Add beaten egg and stir to break up; cook just until set, a matter of seconds. Add rice; toss everything together, then let cook without disturbing until rice begins to crisp, about 1 minute. Add asparagus, peas, and three-quarters of ramp greens and toss, breaking up rice as needed. Cook until vegetables are softened, about 4 minutes. Add soy sauce and toss to coat. Give it a taste; you may want to add a little more soy sauce.
Divide fried rice among plates. Top each with a fried egg and shower with remaining ramp greens.

name: Fried Rice: Devious Shrimp Scramble
instructions: In a medium bowl, combine the shrimp and teriyaki sauce. Marinate in the refrigerator for 30 minutes.
In a large pan, heat the vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Add the marinated shrimp and cook until pink and opaque, about 5 minutes. Remove the shrimp from pan and set aside.
To the same pan, add the vegetables and eggs to the pan and cook until the eggs are set, about 3 minutes.
Add the cauliflower rice, soy sauce, and sesame oil and cook until heated through, about 5 minutes.
Serve warm.
Enjoy!

name: Fried Rice: Miss
instructions: In a medium bowl, combine the tofu and teriyaki sauce. Marinate in the refrigerator for 30 minutes.
In a large pan, heat the vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Add the marinated tofu and cook until golden and crispy, about 5 minutes. Remove the tofu from pan and set aside.
To the same pan, add the vegetables and cook until heated through, about 3 minutes.
In a small nonstick pan, fry the eggs over easy, about 2 minutes.
Add the rice, soy sauce, and sesame oil and cook until heated through, about 5 minutes.
Top with the fried eggs and serve.
Enjoy!

name: Fried Rice: Sailor’s Scramble
instructions: In a medium bowl, combine the shrimp and teriyaki sauce. Marinate in the refrigerator for 30 minutes.
In a large pan, heat the vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Add the marinated shrimp and cook until pink and opaque, about 5 minutes. Remove the shrimp from pan and set aside.
To the same pan, add the kimchi and eggs to the pan and cook until the eggs are set, about 3 minutes.
Add the rice, soy sauce, and sesame oil and cook until heated through, about 5 minutes.
Serve warm.
Enjoy!

name: Fried Rice: Soy, Spice, And Everything Nice
instructions: In a medium bowl, combine the tofu and teriyaki sauce. Marinate in the refrigerator for 30 minutes.
In a large pan, heat the vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Add the marinated tofu and cook until golden and crispy, about 5 minutes. Remove the tofu from pan and set aside.
To the same pan, add the kimchi and cook until heated through, about 3 minutes.
In a small nonstick pan, fry the eggs over easy, about 2 minutes.
Add the cauliflower rice, soy sauce, and sesame oil and cook until heated through, about 5 minutes.
Top with the fried eggs and serve.
Enjoy!

name: Fried Rice: The Veggie Overlord
instructions: In a medium bowl, combine the tofu and teriyaki sauce. Marinate in the refrigerator for 30 minutes.
In a large pan, heat the vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Add the marinated tofu and cook until golden and crispy, about 5 minutes. Remove the tofu from pan and set aside.
To the same pan, add the vegetables and eggs to the pan and cook until the eggs are set, about 3 minutes.
Add the rice, soy sauce, and sesame oil and cook until heated through, about 5 minutes.
Serve warm.
Enjoy!

name: Fried Rice: Veggie-lovers Delight
instructions: In a medium bowl, combine the tofu and teriyaki sauce. Marinate in the refrigerator for 30 minutes.
In a large pan, heat the vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Add the marinated tofu and cook until golden and crispy, about 5 minutes. Remove the tofu from pan and set aside.
To the same pan, add the vegetables and eggs to the pan and cook until the eggs are set, about 3 minutes.
Add the cauliflower rice, soy sauce, and sesame oil and cook until heated through, about 5 minutes.
Serve warm.
Enjoy!

name: Fried Rinds
instructions: Corte o courato em tiras. Deite óleo abundante numa frigideira, leve ao lume e deixe aquecer bem.
Frite os couratos no óleo bem quente, até ficarem dourados. Retire e escorra bem sobre papel absorvente. Tempere com sal e sirva.

name: Fried Rose Dessert
instructions: 1. Yumurta, yoğurt, şeker, ayçiçeği yağı, vanilya, kabartma tozu ve unu yoğurma kabında yoğurun.
2.  Üzerini nemli bir bezle örtüp 30 dakika dinlenmeye bırakın.
3.  Hamurdan bezeler kopartıp merdane ile ince açın ve uzun şeritler kesin.
4.  Her bir şeridi iki ucundan tutup ters yöne doğru bükün ve rulo şeklinde sararak gül şekli verin ve üstten hafif bastırın.
5.  Ayçiçeği yağını tavada ısıtın.
6.  Hamurları kızartıp kağıt havlu üzerine alın.
7.  Servis tabağına yerleştirip üzerine pudra şeker serpiştirin.
8.  Servis yapın.
9.  Afiyet olsun.
10. Dilerseniz, fırında hazırlanan klasik gül tatlısı tarifini de deneyebilirsiniz.

name: Fried Sausage With Greens And Boiled Potatoes
original_name: Alheira frita com grelos e batata cozida
instructions: Leve uma frigideira a lume médio com 2 colheres (sopa) de azeite, adicione as alheiras e deixe-as fritar até dourarem. Vá virando as alheiras para que não rompam a pele. Retire e reserve.
Descasque e corte as batatas em quartos. Coloque-as num tacho e deixe-as cozer, em água e sal, durante 15 a 20 minutos. Retire, escorra e reserve.

Limpe o fundo da frigideira das alheiras, adicione o azeite restante, 3 dentes de alho descascados e picados e 3 dentes de alho inteiros com casca e deixe refogar. De seguida, adicione os grelos e deixe-os refogar até murcharem. Tempere com sal e pimenta e quando estiverem bem verdes, retire e reserve.
Numa frigideira à parte, leve a fritar 2 dentes de alho, descascados e laminados, e quando começarem a ganhar cor, retire e escorra sobre papel de cozinha.
Coloque os grelos numa travessa, disponha as alheiras e polvilhe com o alho frito e um pouco mais de pimenta-preta. Acompanhe com as batatas cozidas e sirva.

name: Fried Sausage-stuffed Green Olives
instructions: Mix first 8 ingredients in medium bowl until well incorporated. Cut slit lengthwise down 1 side of each olive. Stuff olives with sausage mixture, about generous 1/2 teaspoon per olive, pressing gently on olive to seal (some sausage will show).

Grind panko in processor until finely ground; sprinkle 1/4 cup over rimmed baking sheet and set aside. Place remaining panko in shallow bowl. Place flour in another shallow bowl. Place egg in third shallow bowl; add 1 teaspoon water to egg and whisk to blend. Working with a few olives at a time, roll in flour to coat, then beaten egg, then panko in shallow bowl. Place on sheet. DO AHEAD Can be made 4 hours ahead. Cover; chill.

Add enough oil to heavy large saucepan to reach depth of 3 inches. Attach deep-fry thermometer to edge of saucepan. Heat over medium heat to 177°C. Working in 3 batches, add olives to saucepan and cook until deep golden brown and sausage is cooked through, about 7 minutes, stirring occasionally. Using slotted spoon, transfer fried olives to paper towels to drain. Serve warm.
Pour a Ravello Bianco

name: Fried Scallops On Kiwi Bulgur Cake
original_name: Kivili Bulgur Keki Üzerinde Deniz Tarağı Tava
instructions: 1. İnce bulguru ağzı kapanabilir bir kaba alıp üzerini geçmeyecek kadar kaynar su ilave edin ve kapağını sıkıca kapatın.
2.  20 dakika bekletin.
3.  Patatesin kabuğunu soyup haşlayın.
4.  Haşlanan patates ve portakalın kabuğunu bulgurun içine rendeleyin.
5.  10 dakika yoğurun.
6.  Macun kıvamına gelince kırmızı toz biber (tatlı) ve tuzla tatlandırıp bir streç filmin üzerine ince bir tabaka halinde yayın.
7.  Kiviyi bir kaba ufak küp şeklinde doğrayın.
8.  Üzerine beyaz peyniri rendeleyin.
9.  Ceviz ve fesleğeni ekleyin.
10.  Bu karışımı açılan bulgur kekinin ortasına yerleştirin ve streç film yardımıyla rulo halinde sarın.
11.  Streç filmi çıkarın.
12.  Bulgur kekinin etrafını düzeltin ve yapışmaz yüzeyli tavada kızartın.
13.  Yağlı kağıt serili fırın tepsisine aktarıp 180 dereceye ayarlı fırında 10 dakika kadar pişirin.
14.  Kremayı tavada ısıtın.
15.  Hafif kaynamaya başladığında yavaş yavaş tereyağını ilave edin.
16.  Limon suyunu sıkıp ekleyin.
17.  Limonun kabuğunu sosa rendeleyin.
18.  Tuzla tatlandırılıp kıvam aldıktan sonra ocaktan alın.
19.  Sarımsak, zencefil ve kişnişi ince kıyın.
20.  Deniz tarağını tuz ve taze çekilmiş karabiberle tatlandırıp sarımsaklı karışım, zeytinyağı ve limon suyuyla marine edin.
21.  İyice ısıtılmış yapışmaz yüzeyli tavada iki tarafını da ikişer dakika pişirin.
22.  Bulgur keki servis tabağına alın.
23.  Üzerine deniz taraklarını yerleştirin.
24.  Tereyağlı limon sosla birlikte servis yapın.

name: Fried Scorpionfish Recipe
instructions: Hazle al cabracho dos aberturas en la parte del filete para que se cocine bien.
Calienta una sartén a fuego alto y cuando esté a temperatura, agrega el aceite para que también se caliente.
Pela los dos dientes de ajo y tritura, mézclalo con sal.
Sazona el pescado con la mezcla de sal y ajo por dentro y por fuera.
Cuando el aceite esté caliente, incorpora el pescado y fríe por aproximadamente 6 minutos de cada lado o cuando quede tostado.
Una vez listo, retira del sartén y coloca en papel absorbente para retirar el exceso de aceite.
Acompaña con tus guarniciones favoritas y disfruta.

name: Fried Shad With Breadcrumbs

ingredients.item: 500 g  pão de mistura ou alentejano duro

instructions: Tempere o peixe com sal e o sumo de limão. Demolhe o pão em água, escorra-o e esfarele-o ou triture-o.

Leve ao lume um tacho com o azeite, o louro e os alhos laminados. Junte o pão, seguido do caldo de marisco quente, e mexa até se formar uma papa (se necessário, acrescente um pouco de água a ferver). Tempere com sal e pimenta, deixe ferver por breves minutos, depois acrescente os coentros picados, envolva e retire do lume.

Leve ao lume uma frigideira com o óleo e deixe aquecer. Passe o peixe por farinha de milho, sacuda bem, frite-o de ambos os lados e coloque-o a escorrer sobre papel absorvente. Regue a açorda com um fio de azeite e sirva-a com o peixe frito.

name: Fried Shad With Roe Stew
original_name: Sável frito com açorda de ovas

ingredients.item: 200 g  ovas de peixe a gosto

instructions: Tempere as postas de sável com sal, passe-as por farinha e frite-as de ambos os lados no óleo, previamente aquecido. Retire, escorra sobre papel absorvente e reserve.
Leve ao lume um tacho com água e sal, deixe levantar fervura, junte as ovas de peixe e deixe cozer, até se desfazerem. Reserve as ovas e a água da cozedura.

Corte o pão em pedaços pequenos e demolhe-os na água das ovas. Descasque e pique a cebola e os alhos e aloure-os num tacho com um pouco de azeite. Junte o pão escorrido, mexa e deixe cozinhar bem. Se necessário, adicione um pouco mais de água para tornar a açorda mais homogénea.

Retifique o sal da açorda, tempere com uma pitada de pimenta, adicione as ovas cortadas em pedaços e envolva bem. Retire do lume, coloque num prato e decore com folhas de coentros. Sirva com o sável frito.

name: Fried Shrimp Recipe

ingredients.item: ½ taza  de harina de trigo

instructions: En un escurridor bol ponemos las quisquillas con un poco de sal, pasado unos 10 minutos escurrimos con un colador para retirar el exceso de agua.
Calentamos el aceite a fuego medio.
Pasamos las quisquillas por la harina y le quitamos el exceso.
Cuando el aceite esté caliente añadimos las gambas y las dejamos 1 minuto como mucho o hasta que veamos la harina dorada.
Las sacamos a un papel de cocina para quitar el exceso de aceite.
Las pasamos a un plato y a comer, se le agregan unas gotas de limón al servirlas.

name: Fried Shrimp Tacos

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste
Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place 4 chopped roma tomatoes and arbol chiles in a saucepan. Add water; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium; simmer for 1 minute. Remove from heat; cool to room temperature.

Transfer cooled tomatoes and chiles to a blender or food processor. Add 1/2 of the cooking water, 1/2 chopped onion, cilantro, 1 tablespoon oregano, 1 clove minced garlic, salt, and pepper. Pulse 6 to 8 times to chop ingredients. Transfer mixture to a bowl; stir in 1/2 of the shredded cabbage. Cover and refrigerate until serving.

Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add 1/2 chopped onion; cook and stir until beginning to soften, 3 to 5 minutes. Stir in 2 cloves minced garlic and 2 diced tomatoes; cook 1 more minute. Add shrimp and 1 tablespoon oregano; cook and stir for 1 minute. Add 1/2 cup shredded cabbage, jalapeno pepper, salt, and ground black pepper. Cook and stir until shrimp turns opaque, about 3 minutes. Remove skillet from heat.
Heat oil in large saucepan to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Place 3 tablespoons of the shrimp mixture in the center of each tortilla. Fold in half. Place filled tortillas in hot oil, working in batches if needed. Fry until golden brown, about 3 minutes. Turn carefully with tongs. Brown the other side, about 3 minutes more. Transfer cooked tacos to a paper-towel-lined plate to drain.
Top with cabbage salsa and a slice of avocado.

name: Fried Shrimp With Beer
instructions: Descongele e arranje os camarões e coloque-as numa tigela. Descasque, lave e pique finamente os dentes de alho, junte-os aos camarões, tempere com as folhas de louro, os dentes de alho, a malagueta cortada em rodelas, a cerveja, a paprica , sal e piripirí a gosto, envolva tudo muito bem e deixe marinar durante 20 minutos.
Numa frigideira aqueça o azeite, escorra os camarões da marinada e junte-os à frigideira, deixando corar de ambos os lados.
Junte depois a marinada e deixe ferver até o álcool evaporar. Depois retire do lume e sirva decorado a gosto ou com ervas aromáticas picadas.

name: Fried Shrimp With Beer Recipe
original_name: Receita fácil de camarões fritos com cerveja
instructions: Descasque os camarões, deixando-lhes a cabeça e a cauda. Tempere-os com a cerveja, sal e a malagueta picada.
Descasque e pique, finamente, os dentes de alho. Numa frigideira, aqueça o azeite com a manteiga, junte os alhos picados e, depois, os camarões escorridos. Frite de ambos os lados.
Regue com a marinada e deixe ferver. Retire do lume, polvilhe com coentros e, se quiser, sirva com o limão cortado em gomos ou rodelas.

name: Fried Shrimps
instructions: Καθαρίζουμε τις γαρίδε ς και τις σκουπίζουμε καλά με χαρτί κουζίνας.
Σε ένα μπολ ανακατεύουμε όλα τα υλικά για το πανάρισμα.
Προσθέτουμε τις καθαρισμένες γαρίδες στο μπολ και τις ανακατεύουμε, ώστε να κολλήσει καλά επάνω τους το μείγμα του παναρίσματος.
Φροντίζουμε να ντυθούν ομοιόμορφα με το αλεύρι και τα υπόλοιπα υλικά.
Σε βαθύ τηγάνι ζεσταίνουμε λίγο ελαιόλαδο.
Μόλις κάψει καλά, ρίχνουμε μέσα τις γαρίδες σε δόσεις, λίγες-λίγες, και τις τηγανίζουμε για 1-2 λεπτά, μέχρι να ροδίσουν ελαφρά.
Τις μεταφέρουμε σε απορροφητικό χαρτί για να στραγγίξουν από το περιττό λάδι
Σε ένα μπολ βάζουμε όλα τα υλικά του παναρίσματος.
Ρίχνουμε μέσα τις καθαρισμένες γαρίδες να κολλήσει το πανάρισμα πάνω τους.
Ανακατευτούμε να ντυθούν καλά με το αλεύρι και όλα τα υλικά.
Βάζουμε λίγο ελαιόλαδο σε βαθύ τηγάνι.
Αφού κάψει το λάδι, ρίχνουμε τις γαρίδες λίγες-λίγες και τηγανίζουμε για 1-2΄ να ροδίσουν ελαφρά.
Τις βγάζουμε σε απορροφητικό χαρτί να στεγνώσουν.
Σερβίρετε με σάλτσα ταρτάρ ή με σάλτσα λεμονιού-μουστάρδας .

name: Fried Smelts
instructions: Pour oil into a large pot to a depth of 1/2". Attach a deep-fry thermometer to the side of the pot so the bulb is submerged in oil. Heat oil over medium-high heat to 160°C (160°C).
Season smelt fillets lightly with salt.

Place flour in a wide shallow dish (a pie dish is ideal). Holding 1 fillet by the tail, dredge in flour on both sides, shaking off any excess. Place on a large rimmed baking sheet; repeat with remaining fish.
Working in batches and returning oil to 160°C (160°C) between batches, fry fillets until light golden and just cooked through, about 1 minute per batch. Transfer fish to paper towels to drain.
Heat oil to 182°C (182°C).
Working in batches, fry fillets again until golden brown, about 1 minute per batch. Transfer to paper towels to drain. Season with salt and serve immediately with lemon wedges for squeezing over.

name: Fried Soft-shell Crab
instructions: Lift one pointed side of the top shell of one crab; pull out and discard the gills. Lower the shell and repeat on the other side. Remove the tail flap on the bottom side by twisting and pulling. Use a pair of scissors to cut behind the eyes and remove the face. Repeat to clean remaining crabs. Rinse cleaned crabs thoroughly with cold water, then dry on paper towels.
Heat oil in a deep fryer to 185°C (180 degrees C).

Whisk milk and egg together in a shallow bowl. Combine flour, salt, and pepper in another shallow bowl. Lightly salt each crab. Dredge in flour; shake off excess. Dip into beaten egg. Lift up so excess egg drips back into the bowl. Press into flour to coat both sides.

Working in batches if necessary, carefully lower crabs into the hot oil and fry until golden brown on one side, 1 to 2 minutes. Carefully turn and cook until golden brown on the other side, 1 to 2 minutes more. Drain on paper towels.

name: Fried Soft-shell Crab Sandwich
instructions: Whisk mayonnaise, Dijon mustard, whole grain mustard, and Old Bay seasoning in small bowl.
DO AHEAD: Sauce can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.
Whisk vinegar and mustard in medium bowl. Add cabbage and chile and toss to combine; season with salt and pepper.
Pour oil into a large skillet, preferably cast iron, to a depth of 1/2" and heat over medium-high heat until oil bubbles immediately when a pinch of flour is added.

Meanwhile, whisk flour, cayenne, and 1 tsp. Old Bay seasoning in a shallow bowl; season with salt and pepper. Place eggs into another shallow bowl. Whisk panko and remaining 1 tsp. Old Bay seasoning in a third shallow bowl; season with salt and pepper.
Dredge crabs in flour mixture, shaking off excess, then dip in egg, letting excess drip back into bowl. Coat in panko mixture.
Working in 2 batches, place crabs, shell side down, in skillet and cook until golden brown, about 4 minutes per side. Transfer to paper towels to drain. Season with salt.
Build sandwiches with buns, sauce, crabs, and slaw.

name: Fried Sole Fish
instructions: 1. Temizleyip yıkadığınız dil balığını kemiğinden ayırarak fileto kısmını iri küp şeklinde doğrayarak kenara alın.
2.  Yapışmaz yüzeyli bir tavada Ayçiçek yağını kızdırın.
3.  Balık etlerini önce una bulayın ve kızartarak tabağa alın.
4.  Ayrı bir tavada tereyağını eritin.
5.  İri doğradığınız mantar ve parmak kalınlığında doğradığınız biberleri ekleyerek soteleyin.
6.  Üzerine iri doğranmış domatesi ekleyerek sotelemeye devam edin.
7.  Baharatları ilave edip 1 dakika daha soteleyerek ocaktan alın.
8.  ,Balık kemiğini servis edeceğiniz tabağa kızarttığınız balığı ve sotelediğiniz sebzeleri yayın.
9.  Ilık servis yapın.

name: Fried Spaghetti Squash

ingredients.item: Wondra flour or  0.75 cup rice flour

instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C (191°C).
Pierce squash all over with a knife to vent.
Roast on a rimmed baking sheet, turning every 20 minutes, until tender (knife will easily slide through), 60–90 minutes.
Let cool slightly.
Halve lengthwise and scoop out seeds; discard.
Scrape flesh with a fork to remove in long strands.
Spread out on paper towels to drain.
Fit a large pot with a deep-fry thermometer and pour in oil to measure 2 inches.
Heat oil over medium-high heat until thermometer registers 177°C (177°C).
Meanwhile, whisk Wondra flour (or rice flour), salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, and cloves in a large bowl.
Add squash to the flour mixture and toss to coat, separating clumps.
Working in batches, fry handfuls of squash, turning occasionally to brown evenly and gently separating as needed, until golden brown and crisp, about 2 minutes per batch.
Using a spider or a slotted spoon, transfer fried squash to paper towels to drain; dust with powdered sugar.

name: Fried Spare Ribs With Alentejo-style Migas
original_name: Entrecosto frito com migas à alentejana
instructions: Numa tigela, misture a massa de pimentão com um pouco de sal e os alhos esmagados. Barre o entrecosto com esta pasta e deixe marinar, por cerca de 4 horas ou de um dia para o outro.
Após o tempo indicado, coloque a banha num tacho, deixe aquecer e frite o chouriço, previamente cortado em rodelas. Retire e reserve.
No mesmo tacho, deite o entrecosto cortado em pedaços, juntamente com a marinada, e deixe fritar, ate a carne ficar bem cozinhada. Retire e reserve.

Numa frigideira antiaderente, deite a gordura em que fritou as carnes. Junte o pão cortado em fatias e um pouco de água e mexa muito bem, até este se desfazer e obter um preparado de consistência espessa. Deixe as migas fritarem, de ambos os lados, de modo a ganharem uma crosta dourada, e transfira para uma travessa. Disponha o entrecosto e o chouriço sobre as migas e sirva de imediato.

name: Fried Spare Ribs With Asparagus Crumbs
original_name: Entrecosto frito com migas de espargos
instructions: Corte o entrecosto em pedaços pequenos e tempere-os com a massa de pimentão e o vinho branco. Deixe marinar algum tempo.
Escorra depois o entrecosto e frite-o numa frigideira com metade do azeite. Regue com a marinada e deixe apurar.

Elimine a parte mais rija dos espargos e escalde-os em água a ferver temperada com sal. Escorra bem os espargos, reservando a água. Demolhe o pão, previamente partido, num pouco da água que reservou. Corte os espargos em pedaços, reserve alguns e envolva os restantes no pão, bem como os coentros.

Numa frigideira, frite os alhos picados no restante azeite, junte o preparado de pão e mexa com uma colher, moldando as migas. Se necessário, adicione mais água dos espargos. Sirva as migas decoradas com os espargos que reservou, acompanhando o entrecosto.

name: Fried Spare Ribs With Onion Rice
original_name: Entrecosto frito com arroz de cebola

ingredients.item: Gomos de laranja e limão para decorar

instructions: Tempere o entrecosto com metade dos alhos picados, o colorau, o louro, o sumo de limão, sal e picante. Leve ao lume um tacho com água e sal. Quando começar a ferver, junte o arroz, mexa e deixe cozer. Retire do lume, escorra num coador e passe por água fria.

Leve ao lume um tacho com o azeite e deixe aquecer. Adicione a cebola e os restantes alhos picados, o cubo de galinha desfeito e o louro. Mexa, deixe alourar e misture o arroz. Tempere com sal e pimenta, mexa, retire do lume e elimine as folhas de louro.

Leve ao lume uma frigideira grande e larga com a banha. Deite o entrecosto e deixe corar bem. Retire do lume, coloque num prato e decore com gomos de laranja e limão. Acompanhe com o arroz, decorado com salsa picada, e batata palha. Sirva de imediato.

name: Fried Squid
instructions: 1. Kalamarın içini temizleyin soğuk suda yıkayıp istediğiniz kalınlıkta dilimleyin.
2.  Süt, limon suyu ve karbonatı bir kaba alarak kalamar dilimlerini içine yatırın.
3.  Sudan geçirip kurulayın ve dondurucuya atın.
4.  Dilediğiniz zaman çıkarıp soğuk suya tutun (anında çözülür), kurulayın ve unlayıp derin yağda pişirin.

name: Fried Squid Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 yemek kaşığı sirke veya limon suyu
Maden suyu kullanarak kalamarı marine edebilirsiniz. gazlı yapısı kalamarı yumuşatır ve hafif kabuk oluşturur.
Yoğurt + su karışımı da (yarı yarıya) benzer bir etki yaratır.
Zeytinyağı + limon suyu karışımıyla (2 yemek kaşığı zeytinyağı, 1 yemek kaşığı limon) marine ederek kalamara doğal bir yumuşaklık kazandırabilirsiniz.
Bir tutam kabartma tozu da karbonatın alternatifi olarak kullanılabilir.
Un karışımına az miktarda karabiber, kırmızı toz biber, sarımsak tozu veya pul biber ekleyebilirsiniz.
Marine karışımına birkaç damla limon suyu veya bir diş ezilmiş sarımsak eklemek aromayı artırır.
Hafif akdeniz dokunuşu için una biraz kurutulmuş kekik veya biberiye katabilirsiniz.
Tartar sos, sarımsaklı yoğurt, limonlu mayonez veya aioli sos tercih edebilirsiniz.
Lime (yeşil limon) daha aromatik bir seçenek sunar.
Hafif asidite için birkaç damla sirke de kullanılabilir.
Fındıklı veya bademli tarator da farklı bir lezzet profili oluşturur.

instructions: 1. Kalamarı yumuşatmak için temizlenmiş kalamarları halka halka doğrayın.
2. Derin bir kaba alın, üzerine karbonat, süt ve tuzu ekleyin.
3.  İyice karıştırın ve buzdolabında en az 30 dakika (mümkünse 1 saat) bekletin.
4.  Bu işlem kalamarın yumuşacık olmasını sağlar.
5. Süre sonunda kalamarları süzün ve kâğıt havlu ile kurulayın.
6. Kalamar halkalarını una bulayın, fazla unu silkeleyin.
7. Kızgın yağda, fazla kalabalık yapmadan, her iki tarafı altın sarısı renk alıncaya kadar 1-2 dakika kızartın.
8. Kızaran kalamarları havlu kâğıt serili bir tabağa alın.
9. Sıcak sıcak, limon dilimleri ve dilerseniz tarator sos ile servis edin.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Fried Squid With Aioli

ingredients.prep: white and pale-green parts only, sliced into 3-inch pieces
sometimes sold as masarepa or harina precocida, can be found in Latin markets and some supermarkets.

instructions: Whisk potato starch, baking powder, and ¾ cup arepa flour in a large bowl. Whisk in 2⅓ cups water; let sit 30 minutes to allow flour to hydrate. Place remaining 1 cup arepa flour in a shallow bowl.

Meanwhile, whisk egg yolk, garlic, and lemon juice in a small bowl to combine. Whisking constantly, gradually drizzle in grapeseed oil and olive oil; whisk until sauce is thickened and emulsified. Season aioli with salt; stir in 1 tsp. water.
Fit a large pot with thermometer; pour in vegetable oil to come 3" up sides of pot. Heat over medium-high until thermometer registers 375°.

Meanwhile, cut squid. Slice bodies lengthwise along one side and open to expose interior. Cut in half crosswise (or in thirds if large). Cut each half (or third) into 1½" triangles; cut tentacles in half. Rinse; pat dry.

Working in batches of 5 or 6 and returning oil to 375° between batches, dredge squid, scallions, and lemon in arepa flour, shaking off excess; dip into batter, letting extra drip off. Fry, turning every 30 seconds or so, until golden, crisp, and puffed, about 2 minutes. Transfer to paper towels; season with salt. Top with basil and serve with aioli.

name: Fried Squid With Watercress And Red Onion
original_name: Lulinhas fritas com agrião e cebola roxa
instructions: Descasque as batatas-doces, corte-as em cubinhos e disponha-os num tabuleiro.
Descasque as cebolas e os alhos, lamine-os, junte-os à batata, regue com o azeite, cubra com papel de alumínio e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºc, por cerca de 25 minutos.
Passe as lulas por farinha e frite-as em óleo bem quente e abundante, até ficarem douradas. Retire, escorra sobre papel absorvente e tempere com sal e pimenta.
Junte o preparado de batata-doce com o agrião, tempere com sal e pimenta e sirva com as lulinhas fritas.

name: Fried Stuffed Squash Blossoms

ingredients.item: Soft goat cheese at room temperature

instructions: Bring a pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Prepare a large bowl of ice-cold water. Drop squash blossoms into the boiling water until slightly wilted, 30 to 45 seconds; lift with a slotted spoon and immediately place into the cold water to chill. Remove and drain on paper towels.

Make the filling: Mix goat cheese, Gruyère, egg yolk, pepper, and cayenne together in a bowl until smooth. Spoon into a 1-quart resealable plastic bag, squeeze out the air, and seal the bag. Cut a small corner off the bag.

Gently insert the cut corner of the bag into the open end of a blossom and pipe in about 1 tablespoon filling, making sure it fills all the way to the bottom. Lift petals up and drape over filling to cover completely. Fold any excess petals over the top of the filled blossom to keep them out of the way. Repeat to fill remaining blossoms. Refrigerate until cheese is set and firm, at least 30 minutes.
Meanwhile, make the batter: Combine flour and cornstarch in a mixing bowl. Whisk in ice-cold water, a little at a time, until batter is smooth and has the thickness of pancake batter.
Heat 1 inch oil in a cast iron skillet to 177°C (175 degrees C). A drop of batter carefully dripped into the oil should sizzle immediately.
Remove squash blossoms from the refrigerator and dust lightly with all-purpose flour on all sides. Shake off excess flour and dip blossoms in batter. Let excess batter drip off.
Gently lay about six coated squash blossoms on their sides in hot oil and cook until pale golden brown, about 1 minute on the first side and 30 seconds to 1 minute on the remaining sides.
Transfer to a paper towel-lined plate and repeat to fry remaining blossoms. Let cool slightly before serving.

name: Fried Swordfish
instructions: Tempere o peixe-espada com metade dos dentes de alho, sal, pimenta e sumo de limão. Deixe marinhar durante 30 minutos.
